The election is over.

But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to try and force a recount. Pennsylvania law dictates an automatic recount if the margin is less than .5%. I'm currently leading by EXACTLY .5%, and we expect my opponent to try and force a recount.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7429d1efa7f4495280ee3997bef3d90e&_e=MewghoY7x-ivtZtR1lLQO31S4s6Jb4_WY2SBmQAuX9v7sJnQeVsNnpQVD6ulbNwHkyU-jTuKF-RErIUiKRN8YIvYzLh7fINLgHCrvhW5MjmpGy7l6Rtp7C7d5UG8nr-FY-aiNQwIXc-SBnNvgssuy0vb6v1c5ZbJNtRpkNjU6nfS7Iv0lst5NlqslTF6z1NKNNDOPu3R2fPwfbdlHWKkLZhh-xyduC6vYFnOOLdIe1SRbQaA85co_aPuzDtUkf3J_D2KCpzRQwpP3RNWoyeSEIa9Z4cSKcM8HCFrxq3hVn1VpAMaSrB6mx5qqqBReu6Rt4t3M9tsK5Q8ZIb1DvY0hiOXGjE-Gj2KVw88b4A1PBRMYBOkT8sDtBIBWys3EAda)

**[I'm asking for you to chip in today to help us keep up our fight.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7429d1efa7f4495280ee3997bef3d90e&_e=MewghoY7x-ivtZtR1lLQO31S4s6Jb4_WY2SBmQAuX9v7sJnQeVsNnpQVD6ulbNwHkyU-jTuKF-RErIUiKRN8YIvYzLh7fINLgHCrvhW5MjmpGy7l6Rtp7C7d5UG8nr-FY-aiNQwIXc-SBnNvgssuy0vb6v1c5ZbJNtRpkNjU6nfS7Iv0lst5NlqslTF6z1NKNNDOPu3R2fPwfbdlHWKkLZhh-xyduC6vYFnOOLdIe1T_DjdqgqOLBSlRTlEmoqB9vvrDMPMJLsP7nSXnG_X9MvSX_IfIQgDIu8yhzbCK79zbiXk0Vwnmw32DQwTulYkWIWQLV9O-OwMCsvTu8BYX1VSRFngmRWWavi2pGuf_e3OjCSuxmGC_98SdPpkFwKRB)**

_If you are not in a position to give right now, please don 't. I mean it._

But Bob Casey and the national Democrats won't accept it. And we're fighting back. We have attorneys who have been deployed to fight back. We can't be caught flat-footed and allow liberals to steal this election.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us keep up our fight?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7429d1efa7f4495280ee3997bef3d90e&_e=MewghoY7x-ivtZtR1lLQO31S4s6Jb4_WY2SBmQAuX9v7sJnQeVsNnpQVD6ulbNwHkyU-jTuKF-RErIUiKRN8YIvYzLh7fINLgHCrvhW5MjmpGy7l6Rtp7C7d5UG8nr-FY-aiNQwIXc-SBnNvgssuy0vb6v1c5ZbJNtRpkNjU6nfS7Iv0lst5NlqslTF6z1NKNNDOPu3R2fPwfbdlHWKkLZhh-xyduC6vYFnOOLdIe1S67LowGzuFEOVM_Aj_smkfD6bByksFJ5Nbx6dp666n_gioVRe3u91dysx5BWpFF9O_2gJJkptH3RWzACSs3NANTx32KQYJAADdImtIyaNroggb26omohEzz3UFcPHuYwV9lbWWYv--HD3ELHp_TiRa)**

Dave McCormick

name: Honor Veterans via the USO
subject: MATCH EXPIRING: Time is running out to have the value of your gift DOUBLED!
body:
Our partners at the NFL will only be matching gifts for a limited time!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,

name: Fight for Reform
subject: URGENT: The U.S. House is still up for grabs.
disclaimer_text: paid for by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
---
**The race for CA-27 is too close to call, while control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs.** Team — we have an urgent update from a key California House race where the election is still too close to call.

Former NASA chief of staff George Whitesides, whose tossup race in CA-27 has yet to be called, is only down by a few thousand votes.

George could be headed for a recount, so we're mobilizing our supporters to ensure he has the resources to count every vote fairly and accurately. [**The House is still up for grabs, and we need all hands on deck to keep our hopes of a House majority alive. Can you split $10 between Fight for Reform to help elect state and local and George Whitesides' recount fund today? Help make sure every vote in CA-27 gets counted.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57248?t=7&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and George Whitesides will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57249?t=8&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57250?t=9&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57251?t=10&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57252?t=11&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57248?t=12&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
We know the presidential and Senate outcomes were disappointing, but in California, thousands of ballots are still being counted and George's race could go either way.

We need to make sure every vote gets counted — because everyone deserves to have their voices heard. Our House majority could come down to just a handful of votes in California.
[**George Whitesides needs our help to keep fighting for our values. Will you split $10 between Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats and George's recount fund as the final ballots in this key toss up race are counted?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57248?t=13&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
Thanks for stepping up,

Fight for Reform
[DONATE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57248?t=14&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO)
---
George Whitesides is only asking for contributions of up to $3,300 from individuals and $5,000 froom federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. George Whitesides is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=22530%2E4449941%2Ex6fOkO).**

Hi there, Right now, ballots across the state are having issues with mismatched signatures or missing information. This means election workers need extra verification to ensure these votes are counted. Voters across AZ are being contacted right now to confirm their ballots. Without confirmation, **_thousands_** of eligible votes will be left out of the final count. **Here’s how you can take action:** With the help of volunteers and community members, we can support the pro-democracy champions who are working to make sure every last vote is counted. **[Will you pitch in $10 to help us make sure every vote is counted? clean_body: | = Hi there, Right now, ballots across the state are having issues with mismatched signatures or missing information. This means election workers need extra verification to ensure these votes are counted. Voters across AZ are being contacted right now to confirm their ballots. Without confirmation, thousands of eligible votes will be left out of the final count. Here’s how you can take action: With the help of volunteers and community members, we can support the pro-democracy champions who are working to make sure every last vote is counted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support can make a significant difference in this critical moment. Thanks for your help. — Team ADP Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. RICK MCGUIRE, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

clean_body: | | | | Ends MIDNIGHT tonight! 🇺🇸 Veterans Day Sale – Get Your Tickets for the 2024 Advance Today! 🇺🇸 The 2024 Advance is shaping up to be the most attended in recent history! As we prepare to gather in Charlottesville and celebrate the historic Republican victories across the Commonwealth and the nation, the excitement is building, and spots are filling up fast. To all who have served our nation in the military , we thank you for your courage, dedication, and sacrifice. Your service is an inspiration to us all. 🎟️ Veterans Day Special : Save 15% on all tickets with code USA at checkout. ⏰ This offer ends at midnight TONIGHT , so act fast and lock in your spot at the 2024 Advance for less! We can’t wait to see you there! | Our room block at the Forum Hotel is officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder: A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | | Thank you for your continued support, and we hope to see you in December! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA ==

**Control of Congress will come down to California.**
We have multiple House races left to be called in the Golden State, and we need to make sure every vote is counted in these toss-up congressional districts.

name: Bryan
subject: Campaign Update
body:
A message of gratitude after last week's election results and a summary of Republican victories in the First District. | | | | |
---
| | | | | Happy Veterans Day! Here’s an update from our campaign:
**Thank You** I’m grateful to the voters of the First Congressional District for their continued support and trust in me.
---
| | | | | Together, we can strengthen our country, lower costs and have a nation that works for everyone. I’ll continue working for you.
---
| **Winning Contested Races** The First Congressional District saw Republicans win crucial, contested elections last Tuesday night. Politics is a team sport and I was thrilled to see some of our incredible local candidates make it across the finish line.
1. Kenosha County District Attorney

**Xavier Solis was elected as the first Republican District Attorney in the history of Kenosha County**. We deployed our team into Kenosha County during the final weeks of the campaign to make sure Xavier was successful.
---
| Congratulations, Xavier!
2. Wisconsin’s 61st Assembly District

Bob Donovan was redrawn into a very competitive race in the Wisconsin’s 61st Assembly District. Bob and his team worked hard, knocked on thousands of doors in Hales Corners and Greendale, and came up successful.
---
| Congratulations, Bob!
3. Wisconsin’s 21st Assembly District

Jessie Rodriguez was also drawn into a new district that leans about 4% Democrat. Jessie and her team knocked every door in their new district at least three times and came up successful.
---
| Congratulations, Jessie!
---
| **Team Steil Moving 1st Congressional District Right** The movement we’re seeing towards Republicans in Kenosha and Rock County is encouraging and helps create more pathways for Republicans to win statewide in Wisconsin.
The data we’re seeing in Rock and Kenosha County illustrates this movement.
_Kenosha County_
* In 2018, we received 47.2% of the vote in Kenosha County and **LOST the County by 2%**.
* In 2024, we received 53.3% of the vote in Kenosha County and **WON the County by 8.7%**.

We’ve seen a 10.7% swing in our direction in the last 6 years.
* In 2020, President Trump received 50.7% of the vote in Kenosha County and **WON the county by 3.1%**.
* In 2024, President Trump received 52.3% of the vote in Kenosha County and **WON the county by 6.2%**.
President Trump saw a 3.09% swing in his direction over the last 4 years.

_Rock County_
* In 2018, we received 41.7% of the vote in Rock County and**LOST the County by 13.6%**.
* In 2024, we received 47.5% of the vote in Rock County and **LOST the County by 2.7%**.
* This gain is despite the new district now including the historically Democrat City of Beloit.
We’ve seen a 10.9% swing in our direction in the last 6 years.

* In 2008, John McCain received 34.5% of the vote in Rock County, and **LOST the county by 29.2%**.
* In 2020, President Trump received 43.5% of the vote in Rock County and **LOST the county by 11.1%**.
* In 2024, President Trump received 45.5% of the vote in Rock County and **LOST the county by 7.2%**.

Since 2008, Rock County has swung 21.9% towards the Republican ticket in Presidential Elections.
We believe we have an opportunity to win Rock County next cycle.
**None of this movement would’ve been possible without our supporters and grassroots volunteers.**
On Wisconsin,
Bryan Steil
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/1992eb6e12bc/campaign-update?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * 1818 Milton Ave # 1448 * Janesville, WI 53545-1129 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=40f4724460) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=40f4724460)
---
|

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder

Dear Friend,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5lbotlcmp1q8os1ri5487c7j9vetrnc7v4ppr6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z29icm4kelus007vf6392a5bh77vbdqof2fi4iu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt2edm6ii6nsl7f41tmqsqbg8ub4r111l6sdkvhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmuibg2ma5jpklt2r5spt57iekjcepq60jjdjoc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5iv6542ef176bkug11pl76d3mmom4qupa4nerq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zie81ji0rl2pbbh36n64vh6o1dtvdfump2ql8lko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlhvu9e4ckvn2m0inia5d1ald7eh251eu0brcclo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6aor4cph2bs)

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder

Dear Friend,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb3ajulre78pkm6ej7decs1chrhh2m83v2dad6bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z10478hhkjntr30h9e40chn8rpg3drprrt1kjh50_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu5biqb5nuk0ac4rctq8otoja3t0h6n5tm9hroo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlu8f4o0gv91hlb802r6mos07ufk327ut8us48j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgn3f88g2ljfr8qgcapl0p8frajbrk8nsmtjgif8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znkttecnsqnjtedlnf5j7166ov4b5jhlmua7lu1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zurdb0e55pi930aadva2nfn3a8i0bstgnc795r8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g6eob2chh2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

ICYMI News

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers

Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rjde7qpek7gadbkpcpqhaheqpkrkuf2a5v7ua0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zis7t6t1oapku1jp6icdniu72tauu8m0oia5ggc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cph2bs)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd446lpdl6bb13n46o8jdvki8d4jtb0kdcu6stvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cph2bs)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Happy Veterans Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-cllhhil-didthutlhu-d/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhhil-didthutlhu-r/)
## Happy Veterans Day!
Friend, On this Veterans Day, the Republican Party of Wisconsin would like to take a moment to honor and express our deepest gratitude to all the brave men and women who have served in our nation's military. Their courage, sacrifice, and commitment to protecting the freedoms we hold dear are an inspiration to us all.Today, we celebrate not just their service, but the invaluable contributions they have made to our communities, our state, and our country. To all veterans, thank you for your unwavering dedication. We are proud to stand with you today and every day.With Gratitude,-WISGOP [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhhil-didthutlhu-y/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhhil-didthutlhu-j/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhhil-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cllhhil-didthutlhu-i/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder

Dear Friend,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5o37sg9u30pbu74nae8v3df85u5pmqofb8uohvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmoir9ovpk48mo594ig9j4m7ogj6ldvh2tapubg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbn73dmosgdel23nl4pqulesh9nuskb882chlkeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6e2ciia62tjm7dcq0q7mgrfl452ncja51aqbrfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlq6usn8n05aa9v9pgdpu71q7rmakanl9junsipo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdjbhf2fis5j8e0911unnuod4gvlk80fnaba7njo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd3e2tgb19u1o12cjmr4jggj2lm9u6h02coedm48_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7ge5a4tqe3mnukc5g8hde0s9mb7lnk1e3lmoka8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq6d5iepon3dtnmqpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj6aor6ctjm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5tsgjktvdo8os2j1um8pm5g49fun5tsp3ojjit8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1jc65d9rn2feina945svahjrlo0df80h3g7qm78_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5g69oj1cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Victory Roundup! Thank you for all of your hard work!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-muukjz-didthutlhu-d/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-muukjz-didthutlhu-r/) **November 11, 2024** After months of hard work, the Republican Party of Wisconsin is honored to have Donald Trump serve as the 47th President of the United States. We also saw the re-election of Congressmen Tom Tiffany, Bryan Steil, Derrick Van Orden, Scott Fitzgerald, Glenn Grothman and welcomed Tony Wied as Wisconsin's 8th Congressional District Representative! From everyone here at RPW, we want to extend our appreciation and gratitude to all of the county parties -- our victories would have not been possible without your unconditional dedication and support. 🇺🇸 **Election Night Success** **President Trump Delivers Remarks At Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee, Wisconsin ** **President Trump Delivers Remarks in Green Bay, Wisconsin ** **Dane County**
Just a few days before the election, Dane County Republicans hosted Tulsi Gabbard, Robert F. Kennedy, and others! The Republican Party of Dane County's work on these events and their grassroots efforts helped move the needle for Trump in historically blue counties. **Grant County**
Members of the Republican Party of Grant County came together to hear from Congressman Derrick Van Orden, among others, in their GOTV Rally. **Green County**
The Republican Party of Green County has been active all year, and in their final event before the election, they showed up at the Belleville UFO Parade to demonstrate their support for the Republican ticket. **Jackson County**
The Republican Party of Jackson County hosted an election night watch party with over 30 members! **Jefferson County**
Canvassing and door-knocking were fundamental in our success in Wisconsin this election season. Thanks to these patriots from the Jefferson County Republican Party who joined with Representative Nik Rettinger to GOTV just days before the election! **Kewaunee County**
During their National Weekend of Action, Kewaunee County Republicans had an event, with special guest Tony Wied. We are proud to have Congressman Wied representing the 8th District and grateful to the volunteers from counties like Kewaunee who made it happen! **Manitowoc County**
Manitowoc County Republicans hosted a rally during their Super Sunday, joined by Senate Candidate Eric Hovde, Senator Ron Johnson, Governor Doug Burgum, Congressman Bryan Steil, and others! **Milwaukee County**
The Republican Party of Milwaukee County hosted an incredible Election Night Watch Party at Alito's Restaurant in Wauwatosa. We are so grateful for our friends in Milwaukee who helped mobilize important voter groups. **Monroe County**
The Republican Party of Monroe County had one last flag wave/rally before the election! **Outagamie County**
The Republican Party of Outagamie held a spectacular election night watch party filled with food, fun, and friends. **Rock County **
The Republican Party of Rock County had countless reasons to celebrate after election night! **Sauk County**
Last minute effort to make a difference among Sauk County Republicans! They worked right up to the very end in Sauk County. **St. Croix County**
Celebrations among St. Croix County Republicans at their Victory Headquarters. They have done incredible work over the past election cycle! **Taylor County**
Hoot hoot! Taylor County Republicans held a Trump Train days before the election! **Walworth County**
Thank you to the executive members and volunteers from Walworth County! **Washington County**
>From GOTV rallies to bus tour stops to door knocking events, Washington County Republicans were there every step of the way to support Republican candidates in this past election cycle. **Waukesha County**
The Republican Party of Waukesha County did not slow down in the two weeks before the election, making their presence known at rallies, gun shows, and Halloween celebrations! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-muukjz-didthutlhu-y/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-muukjz-didthutlhu-j/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-muukjz-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-muukjz-didthutlhu-i/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-muukjz-didthutlhu-h/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-muukjz-didthutlhu-k/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-muukjz-l-u)

subject: ‘Fight Fascism!’: Left-Wing Groups With History Of Violent Protest Involvement Recruiting Ahead Of Inauguration
body:

Advisor

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z42616rov8j8m8po5jgq9iin9bu1kn9dg096b23g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5i64o74clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuj72sjkm1qjf8jl64qb4t9m65rucdjnqkqr8d5hmngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpicdjnqpon4t5gekqb2df4c9imcpr1ccj3ctunmcpjct9heng669hmevajcs3lsmq39cdn6lpr49fg

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfvum9949rrq4th9pes60ee45mcpseqijtdrbv1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5i64o74clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq6d5n62onb8pk6pr39djlmmgracphemjn9ctn6mjj4ttle1r7b9rkm5obb85kmponfcjkumjr6dd3eirr3d9jm5qq0sjnm5qjcsblkipr6tthmdqjbd9jm5qq4t9m69qn9cbkmerjb91gmkq32dd7mcqq9ctk6lrjasjk65qbfctnk8iv0

‘Fight Fascism!’: Left-Wing Groups With History Of Violent Protest
Involvement Recruiting Ahead Of Inauguration

Following President-elect Donald Trump’s victory in the 2024
presidential election, flyers began cropping up around the largest

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
body:
In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers

Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zck4f6vrtqkkgm0nb93ps9i12aq68nphrcf0klc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5i62or2c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hdpjl7herahae99dtlfeh3kr3u1ej3h2249jqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5i62or2c1h2bs)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjt5m569p0f6um48ti69oi8rgqknn6rckv4lnneo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5i62or2c1h2bs)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Don't let Trump skip this Constitutional requirement. Trump must get Senate approval for officials he appoints.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Trump must get Senate approval for officials he appoints. Don't let him skip this Constitutional requirement](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8108aa5c-f23e-4682-a814-ca714a2b4f0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40ac0b6f-1894-41ab-8626-9da4eddcef7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Presidential appointees for cabinet and other key positions must get Senate approval. This has long been the case, and it's part of the Senate's job to offer "advice and consent" that is written into the Constitution. **[But Trump is demanding that Republican leaders let him appoint whoever he wants, without a vote.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d24d642-6d08-4123-a973-72f916bdb678/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This would let him unilaterally appoint the most extreme lunatics possible, without Senate approval. And it would let Senators avoid having to cast tough votes.** There is no way in hell the Senate should allow this to happen. Trump cannot be allowed to appoint unqualified and dangerous individuals to critically important positions. [**Tell the Senate to do its job. Demand Trump get Senate approval for his appointments.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bfb2eb5-890b-4e06-9b51-6e84f5da3cc1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99180acf-5f20-4bd6-adab-651e420752a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch

Dear Friend,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fv7zyekemyfEjAOGNqDQHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8xMmU1ZTRlZi02NTdlLTRkMzQtOWYzZi05ZjUyYzhmMTQ3NzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTExX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxVU1BfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ST04tMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZy-oFjNnUwYczVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fv7zyekemyfEjAOGNqDQHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8xMmU1ZTRlZi02NTdlLTRkMzQtOWYzZi05ZjUyYzhmMTQ3NzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTExX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxVU1BfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ST04tMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZy-oFjNnUwYczVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fv7zyekemyfEjAOGNqDQHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8xMmU1ZTRlZi02NTdlLTRkMzQtOWYzZi05ZjUyYzhmMTQ3NzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTExX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxVU1BfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ST04tMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZy-oFjNnUwYczVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fv7zyekemyfEjAOGNqDQHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8xMmU1ZTRlZi02NTdlLTRkMzQtOWYzZi05ZjUyYzhmMTQ3NzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTExX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxVU1BfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ST04tMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZy-oFjNnUwYczVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fv7zyekemyfEjAOGNqDQHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8xMmU1ZTRlZi02NTdlLTRkMzQtOWYzZi05ZjUyYzhmMTQ3NzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTExX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxVU1BfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ST04tMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZy-oFjNnUwYczVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fv7zyekemyfEjAOGNqDQHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0SwaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8xMmU1ZTRlZi02NTdlLTRkMzQtOWYzZi05ZjUyYzhmMTQ3NzY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTExX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxVU1BfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ST04tMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZy-oFjNnUwYczVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MqsicLbqNyHZA1usbhneGA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saWNlZGVmZW5zZS5vcmcvVwNzcGNCCmcvqBYzZ1MGHM1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VeD3vrWIeEFU_ifxYgUP3Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmcvqBYzZ1MGHM1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HRqTzC5HSHXtjDgA0k0kfA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFaBUP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnL6gWM2dTBhzNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility.

The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts.

Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game.

Dear Peter,

Our weekly study session is moving to THURSDAYS starting this week, November 14.

United Sovereign Americans is a fully volunteer organization focused solely on Valid Elections, with our experts deeply studying:
1) voter registration records,
2) voter history or participation records, and
3) inexplicable manipulation, over time, of vote and voter history. Our work is not done, but we have made an impact. State and federal officials and law enforcement have been informed of massive problems with these systems that appear to be rife with Election Fraud. Read the [press release](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWnT9N27fmzsW2tyyYC6NdTqDW3LfLlX5nhXT0N5bb0h-3m2ndW7lCdLW6lZ3p_W3-pSf0307cRkW29XyfV6jDqmwW2rZ_Cx7hwWl9W3WD5285TGqWpW4rfwpN50vttWW2-xzqm14nQlzW47ZsHF1xHc1PW3bGxL11hMfn3W2j_tzY7tHSJVW1bZl7x26YH-bF81nZ2Sh0qRW4GXj1T8drWpNW2GZl1s1q_n7JW1j-bgV4JBltmW2T_GT66TCQGXW5Rr7q57P2gkLW3k2SfW8S9mF8W2Fk78L4lypGVW1-v6c-7ZBdmhW6nnqNv2GsSxKV7KKfK8JP_vDW8-JhqR240dBdW8Gm5ZC3Z4RbRW4jhsFC9jKBXdf7S6Q5K04) from United Sovereign Americans at [UnitedSAmerican](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWnT9N27fmzsW2tyyYC6NdTqDW3LfLlX5nhXT0N5bb0h-3m2ndW7lCdLW6lZ3kxW7cXzXZ3nbG5tW4dwMPn3PYFRSW3yq6fk794l0LW8Bj7dy1jRnTYW5RkwS75lHWYTW3XYG5Q2Xx66kVwXKwS1Gs5lKW84F_QV88tGCrN7gBxNQ-43kWW4Rd12K13QZQlW4b7qV58s6DBhW5Xhwm31v1qZDW7Scs5s6wSB7pW6k4p888LfJ8MW2kKy976-MyQLW1q11xx44dCr9W8nyRMF3Y-_1pW5QkKL87yfjXqN1r3zlm_lCG0TtZSF3YQXpZW27NMGK7c0rWtN1VLnMTsnmH-W6Mm2NT5lhp7XW51wrTK3c8dJMf8DPNg804) on Twitter X to get insight on the 10 million "lost" votes between 2020 and 2024. Your voice and your vote matter, and we continue to **volunteer** , **litigate** , and **advocate** to solve election misconduct.
---
| [ **USA Litigation Update** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWnT9N27fmzsW2tyyYC6NdTqDW3LfLlX5nhXT0N5bb0hH3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3p6W2tvPhZ744MLyW75kn2_7XhbPpW5DzPBl10B8F9VS_MPJ30YNR7W73CWvf3X96ZjN7k3fFnv2q9WW2Thnry5PXtCLW36Qrbx1BTcLmW7npKHl6Y33vTW58x-V98ryMGMW3yCyph8v2_tBW48qGbm4qnFwmN2N_Cqg9pW2LW7vKlkH88_5QFW64VfTb7X7NdfN9cXFvTRyXKBW6s7yr068pD8GN5_38_yqvZVZW1SwllL3Fj2yGV4jW8x6tTWWnW44hHTk3pzvhCW6R1-VG1VNM4qf67MnHM04)

Each week is an opportunity to get smarter about YOUR civil right to a valid election by examining our founding documents, and relevant case law. I'm thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2d3cf438b434c478ba86ef750351300&_e=svNJMTKZc9QefTOmQKm6yHSAFe2zuRBSDuycUH8ebmyVi-9Wx5UE22VZPFXf-LlQUizObLYBoEflwQZenokHdrZrP7Hnt6F2adKE5afj_wO3yNOif_IBVFEeHsy1Wkmwq5Jil0shLZW5o_ktvdLIQK5KKYWKxzuRoPv3-g8-8x2GbVFP7SCcB-pXUsnyXB3i5kV4JLTkS3TiUsC8KyPic1Z4YxzVYFS6-kuCIAqrLZ1sZ3W-MBxzv5CnqgsC2WJc2D-PQA8zHlHg643LpBam9DQ7edSBESfJ6IPcloWPNJEPb4bEFWrit1v6tsGsBasqBsXZyPU-aFMOMajnErAkFe0k1oFcKYoRzIwkIawOYlFGO_E9AkCqRO1dWZTxdUyKT-_x4Re0qKhKX6g3Pni1wHY7q1cLvmzrs4V9Phc_GFs%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

I'm thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

Perhaps you've wondered where the artwork accompanying the lectures in our free online courses comes from. We hear this especially for one of our most popular courses, "The Genesis Story."

The Book of Genesis has inspired some of Western Civilization's greatest artists to produce iconic works. You may be familiar with Michelangelo's "The Creation of Adam" and Rembrandt's "The Sacrifice of Issac."

I can still remember seeing "The Creation of Adam" right after I graduated from Hillsdale at the Sistine Chapel...

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2d3cf438b434c478ba86ef750351300&_e=svNJMTKZc9QefTOmQKm6yHSAFe2zuRBSDuycUH8ebmyVi-9Wx5UE22VZPFXf-LlQUizObLYBoEflwQZenokHdrZrP7Hnt6F2adKE5afj_wO3yNOif_IBVFEeHsy1Wkmwq5Jil0shLZW5o_ktvdLIQK5KKYWKxzuRoPv3-g8-8x2GbVFP7SCcB-pXUsnyXB3i5kV4JLTkS3TiUsC8KyPic1Z4YxzVYFS6-kuCIAqrLZ1sZ3W-MBxzv5CnqgsC2WJc2D-PQA8zHlHg643LpBam9PD-xXINBGnAnRWkXG8HvC2m38xgumpKEz30-vmw1DPXIo3RreXu2iBfqENjrxdmu0m1blMQ4wk-oAOp2mqNQ4roK1pZ-qW8dj3QwR-kmbeksJfuMtmNyqJrvum4Pr5ZrJ6w-EyE9SkzPzMZb089x0U%3D) **We 've compiled these paintings, along with many others featured in this course, into a brand-new coffee table book, "The Genesis Story: Course Companion." And I'd like you to receive a copy.**

With this exclusive book--available only from Hillsdale College--you can read the passages from the Book of Genesis that led Michelangelo, Rembrandt, Gustave Dore, and other masters to create these incredible works of art.

And with these works all in one place, you and your family can enjoy page after page of divinely inspired art.

**You can reserve your copy of "The Genesis Story: Course Companion," an exclusive hard-cover book from Hillsdale College, for a generous donation of $100 or more by clicking the secure link below: **

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/genesis-story-course-companion-book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2d3cf438b434c478ba86ef750351300&_e=svNJMTKZc9QefTOmQKm6yHSAFe2zuRBSDuycUH8ebmyVi-9Wx5UE22VZPFXf-LlQUizObLYBoEflwQZenokHdrZrP7Hnt6F2adKE5afj_wO3yNOif_IBVFEeHsy1Wkmwq5Jil0shLZW5o_ktvdLIQK5KKYWKxzuRoPv3-g8-8x2GbVFP7SCcB-pXUsnyXB3i5kV4JLTkS3TiUsC8KyPic1Z4YxzVYFS6-kuCIAqrLZ1sZ3W-MBxzv5CnqgsC2WJc2D-PQA8zHlHg643LpBam9N8mgVwLsokMuQRvcIWj8UcBboIKhei4pVk44KdwenMhkPH36nQ58m2RZJEvR9wPL42S6WYP2CYyYLgel_7XYRKvTwm_3nt-8-OEnwBy0Efiao6E0_6GBgmGVBxCsCdjCWwze6g6keEoPNU1sLl_8jU%3D)**

Thanks again for your continued support and generosity. I hope you'll enjoy this beautiful book.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch

Dear Friend,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff5fd54802c449a99c2ebf94c2457cb7&_e=sXzsW0F5daMpUI2nyTObB4gYV93Pr26SWYNAYWDATMjHdYxLHwL28rx8QSCmllLagVrNoM0K-7UgSYTVKt8eNcyUjbWSlA1fQBtYVDDKhVOimpclhevUjRQUWF2_GG92NcN6MqPXfrcD4GuNGBDJtb6tCBngo19KHOGXAVvkENJeqdZxvzHJZNcSG9NFDa9Ib6dlcz0XvFlCmgO9UnX2nuGT8cdrDKd4RkTLHLm-axnKH1xMeYNkuLTPI1LRCciFVHRYoPIT9IG1I-OVjHUGEjcNzQqQFXd5k5CCbZzPYp6FqK5bzowZyt6vfWPDxYXnn85IzX0BHCqJMFDkjgoOjd59YX-Y6Kk4OvShXmltM3b7FZpDfbIIQtMLZzrcirtqSteB2ltohW-TM_VGvX5H3g%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff5fd54802c449a99c2ebf94c2457cb7&_e=sXzsW0F5daMpUI2nyTObB4gYV93Pr26SWYNAYWDATMjHdYxLHwL28rx8QSCmllLagVrNoM0K-7UgSYTVKt8eNcyUjbWSlA1fQBtYVDDKhVOimpclhevUjRQUWF2_GG92NcN6MqPXfrcD4GuNGBDJtb6tCBngo19KHOGXAVvkENJeqdZxvzHJZNcSG9NFDa9Ib6dlcz0XvFlCmgO9UnX2nuGT8cdrDKd4RkTLHLm-axnKH1xMeYNkuLTPI1LRCciFbLxSnlTmmPvAeRdeDctG9m6NCtSwLPZJV3Ny_yNS-hsXgqxUT2k2fLLd8vjEu32GouWl80zQc9g7Y86PCGOKihdntEIv4ZKt6C51_yHerW3rv3H3wW0Sc9x1ns1ISyZTkoRs3C1lXLvfomNFZHuEXA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff5fd54802c449a99c2ebf94c2457cb7&_e=sXzsW0F5daMpUI2nyTObB4gYV93Pr26SWYNAYWDATMjHdYxLHwL28rx8QSCmllLagVrNoM0K-7UgSYTVKt8eNcyUjbWSlA1fQBtYVDDKhVOimpclhevUjRQUWF2_GG92NcN6MqPXfrcD4GuNGBDJtb6tCBngo19KHOGXAVvkENJeqdZxvzHJZNcSG9NFDa9Ib6dlcz0XvFlCmgO9UnX2nuGT8cdrDKd4RkTLHLm-axnKH1xMeYNkuLTPI1LRCciFaXL2oTsE5Ymi6ZlLIQA9iJLDLVCIzDulPSntORkmytjb8j_emUmf24Lp9mM_81z7vj6_33HesATZH4iesRXdKDTz_NrvPlDlwTG0lTdSBOyBwWLS1D0zZhE57iDHmx4Wj98zNhK8h5UPhnF7JiK5_g%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff5fd54802c449a99c2ebf94c2457cb7&_e=sXzsW0F5daMpUI2nyTObB4gYV93Pr26SWYNAYWDATMjHdYxLHwL28rx8QSCmllLagVrNoM0K-7UgSYTVKt8eNcyUjbWSlA1fQBtYVDDKhVOimpclhevUjRQUWF2_GG92NcN6MqPXfrcD4GuNGBDJtb6tCBngo19KHOGXAVvkENJeqdZxvzHJZNcSG9NFDa9Ib6dlcz0XvFlCmgO9UnX2nuGT8cdrDKd4RkTLHLm-axnKH1xMeYNkuLTPI1LRCciFNXqtgAPuNqPPZ0J76boQN_cZoTEAZ7rLVhogFe3PjYoeZLb7SfYDTyl4jmTn6xUHUTHOwtzjA5i7n9PtB76RoJJqI_M3xTSicGMfwMJSIeD2c0l6m51I7TwxxkdOC3jlaTbrlmyJunjl1IwBwZyVWQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff5fd54802c449a99c2ebf94c2457cb7&_e=sXzsW0F5daMpUI2nyTObB4gYV93Pr26SWYNAYWDATMjHdYxLHwL28rx8QSCmllLagVrNoM0K-7UgSYTVKt8eNcyUjbWSlA1fQBtYVDDKhVOimpclhevUjRQUWF2_GG92NcN6MqPXfrcD4GuNGBDJtb6tCBngo19KHOGXAVvkENJeqdZxvzHJZNcSG9NFDa9Ib6dlcz0XvFlCmgO9UnX2nuGT8cdrDKd4RkTLHLm-axnKH1xMeYNkuLTPI1LRCciFrFiTrlgqwkYiOKJwVe9DPOCfLxiuRjI7sGxlsJ-bmORGTzkui7-Dug2c4akW1JK7ViurFr11M5j_wRipRv9EAJRmawgmR8kJgyBlRERndGxkuI2uEalpdeAvXZil7Dv8w6039xPmGc8dfMsHjG-NeA%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. clean_body: Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch Dear Friend, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: The Founders' Almanac
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6fcaaac699e4b7f88a0239d02a377ea&_e=_F5_G0i3c4qz82qWOgdRvwUjOP0plL2w8iC7Hbp8OcHNaEW_VzNPP9bFT7pDz8CEWOVNvZzDYW5u3JQFM2cByKXB3UJ2osHA9Iei8A06Onxpo_lGWpixxhnL-v656ibxL5kcS3fYQblmmfjVkVcBwCVHRjFT2SxkDSBz08ABVYBQGPBBTur74kSkF2HoyDk9wgvQgcaDmKRrqyGJc9ugExaLfr_yakY8uTVTu1D2XQa40GC0pbQ6FO-uOH9Hz3-iAJv8GtU16Oi3Z14dTxJUdrQ8RLPSc95HMa_kenvXmGPR-GaVA7rnkicLwm0wPke_TFVIzcozP2q-18GMfxKIbIsRUQIVBUyASwu-hgJ0KlQR57xJyS7nYHbkLHIoD7znGr6Wasz2X8dWQVfglLVFmw%3D%3D)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6fcaaac699e4b7f88a0239d02a377ea&_e=_F5_G0i3c4qz82qWOgdRvwUjOP0plL2w8iC7Hbp8OcHNaEW_VzNPP9bFT7pDz8CEWOVNvZzDYW5u3JQFM2cByKXB3UJ2osHA9Iei8A06Onxpo_lGWpixxhnL-v656ibxL5kcS3fYQblmmfjVkVcBwCVHRjFT2SxkDSBz08ABVYBQGPBBTur74kSkF2HoyDk9wgvQgcaDmKRrqyGJc9ugExaLfr_yakY8uTVTu1D2XQbiteKO4u7jfBbd03bGK1LzazEErX4XFHMZJoPw0RBDgO9ljSbEtmNUzm0o8yg7bcZLuTSPaNEOCE-oBPpJB2fYBPk4mNDFKxpIV7eTQGtHBkyG29KHu0cjnlG50mi2PUWFhhOkB7OJtrmZRukc3CWKEZLFwjZtDKKubeE6MoSz1A%3D%3D) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6fcaaac699e4b7f88a0239d02a377ea&_e=_F5_G0i3c4qz82qWOgdRvwUjOP0plL2w8iC7Hbp8OcHNaEW_VzNPP9bFT7pDz8CEWOVNvZzDYW5u3JQFM2cByKXB3UJ2osHA9Iei8A06Onxpo_lGWpixxhnL-v656ibxL5kcS3fYQblmmfjVkVcBwCVHRjFT2SxkDSBz08ABVYBQGPBBTur74kSkF2HoyDk9wgvQgcaDmKRrqyGJc9ugExaLfr_yakY8uTVTu1D2XQZM_xDJqL-BV1ejwB0YOaWl6w50fNqf_CyXv8LSmfZp4jdFx4vCgGdSO3Snh_ypltjLnKMmLoXbfYNoeB3LbCPl8B6bBxGEmUQFoTydW-QyI9E8ri53dExyVlGp9z5e_HEhqqN2Y_ljH6kTOrwbEgxmHdYoSiEPBYHB2ORByc0LyA%3D%3D)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
