## Migrant Caravan Dwindles After Trump Win
A migrant caravan traveling from southern Mexico to the United States has [shrunk to about half its original size](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PszAQhH-N6Yy8a_NVuHgburztlWjBJrFkcGQvIfn3J0668toZaTTP83WbbhRi2O__afOW32uaUKGRABJwchTiZzKVs7NyA1TeQqfBAKhGVw-rNa3U-K73zar7oUdcqe0MubZvYcChCvYaAwAEwLZpau3UrOZFm7nFRXknjPIucMo1Pzz7N5U1ftLL53pJWxXtg_lZhP4ncBQ4nudZZ3-wz-XqryTl6ASORxE4cj62pzzDLhcqXKRLx8xyPfjIXm7-HZZU5BbumXaWC2V60S5_aVUncKyydc8zxBhK2wmj7huF-HOF_3TzsvgdAAD__8GQZq8) following Donald Trump’s victory last week. Many of the [initial 3,000 or so migrants](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwR0R54Djm4LiNnTZdkuLn-MYCUMExInffuXttxyN9Gk03_f5bmOK-fFlN9L9s5QZBSoOwAHnYGM6ZjUE7US4wUAaJgkKQIxyWLWTN-_PFIJaxvBPgqDgAaW9Lc5P0xD1iQEAAuB1HC8yCCecl8pd0QsKTAkKsZd66St1-ti2pKPsVC--bEPSa-_PxuR_hoahyceztH5WDM0pMzQADI0YGZpX45nejaHxttrdZl4WLoUQfIuPanNvvL7aSo0vpfJX467UQJWXzCmR77FkHuzB0AxVh-c7phTbdWJKPDYb0--i_udFu8afAAAA__-6kWe9) confessed they had hoped Vice President Kamala Harris would win and expressed doubt about being allowed to stay in the U.S. if they were granted asylum before Trump takes office. Some even [criticized Latinos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vwyAUAH-N2bB4D4zjgaFLtnTtaPHxnKBgHGFikn9fpXv30510P5f5YmOK-fptVzL1tWwzClQcgAPOwcb0nhULxokwASMDowQFIAbJbsZJnMSJUKIWoKU7DbSEKWitB42j9yyajwwAEAD1MPQyCCecl8pp9IJCpwSFWLfS1xtVetl9Se_toNL7bWXJ3Gp97J386vDc4bm11mdqeyO6f4AOz2u8Fpsr97bYw-ad12fJ3Fl_53apVHgtz_XBKZGvccu8xcxhOiGOihUTHi2mFHc9dkpcVxvTX7f-O-Iw-BsAAP__Mjpgzg) who voted for the former president. "They forgot about when they were on the other side," said Mahily Paz, a Venezuelan migrant. Trump has promised to finish the border wall begun in his first administration, reinstitute the “Remain in Mexico” policy for asylum seekers, and initiate mass deportations.
## High Lead Levels In Houston Neighborhood
A new study by Texas A&M researchers indicates that the soil of Houston's Greater Fifth Ward contains [high levels of toxic heavy metals](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd1jMQOy4oLiNu9x2S4ufcUAixsIkOG-_SvqtP31HR-fnttxMTHG7_zcP0vVc84ICFQfggIs3Mb0X1XlthZ-gIw2jBAUgLrIL2l5JXZUnK6STg5sMGL_aYb1aBBhRdFF_YACAADhcLr30wgrrpLIDOkGeKUE-1lz6GqjSaY41vfOLSu_yo0s61LofTP5jODOcW2u9CyVvn5XhvFE7GM4hP4-aN_79M5xNqdElYjivca2BN1M8d2ZzVHgi4zmdez6ehThMk1CjmPo97F3Rfm8xpXgMI1Pi_jAxfTXqn11eGn8DAAD__5rPZhA), particularly lead, which exceed U.S. EPA safety benchmarks in an area designated as a "cancer cluster" by state officials. Soil samples collected from residential and recreational areas contain lead concentrations [up to four times that found in Texas overall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCnMd0i72IgKVxcQ5drr0QLXoIlEyPbIeHtT_z9_wDzaWb-PcYH--Bfz7-8iS3fJY6kyQAiII2OfThHUzk7aXfHSiz2DRpE3TbValt9M_dJUz_PC8t0l5tp2bXNgl3neqTK2wtDREKkrm3rxulJT3Njpo5mLU4ZLc6XmOqySpEv5yWc8ZBUz3Grgl1L2bNq_igaFA0lOj7rwtu7FvdWNFy6ogFR0aBbRUOOPkDmbb8mgX_BGt-5xFeGZxIukmDxS1nhw8lBkkM4ZCjx62cIckjIEBcIwu7Knpxchj3wCZyEs6KhStbtHx-Cz12vjH5u7MNP1_LreYel_wEAAP__kQ1yiQ), prompting researchers to speculate that the contaminant could contribute to higher-than-normal cancer rates among the socioeconomically disadvantaged community. The Fifth Ward is also home to a facility that pioneered the use of creosote on railroad ties. Union Pacific, which owns the former Houston Wood Preserving Works site, is [also testing soil](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOrDAQBb_GZB652waGwMFNyOamG6L2g6ElD0a2dx5_v2LzjY9OqVRft-VGnHi__6dHtO295gUVGgkgAZdAnD6L6YJ1KkzQRQujBgOget1t9ko6jH7SarhOhMabSSF6pfzovB_10LE9YQCAADj0_UUH5ZTz2rgBvYpBGBUDt1wubYstvqmu6ZOfsVx8fnTJbq0dVeh_AmeBMzkP-lwEzkeuTeAcD5J5XdkzpSrPZ41Rfu-cd3mQ55W9bLG2KmvmJF_UYpFPOnKRLypB7pHvm8tlyzkInKHv8dqbQeDcFRuOF6fEdRiFUfcHcfrVan92elr8CQAA__98l2rU) and coordinating with the EPA on health risk assessments.
## Galleria Dallas Christmas Tree Goes Up
Crews at Galleria Dallas began assembling the [country’s tallest indoor Christmas tree](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuxCAQRL8GOix2wb6koEjj7tKmtBazZyNhcwJ09v195PTpZqTRPL2f-3SnmOK-fNPGrp2PPKFGqwAU4BQopvdkZXBeh0-Q7OBmwALo3sjVWfZoEQg09b03Qc_G0odh7YdgZu9ldNcZACAADn3fmaC99rOxfsBZcxBWc4gtl66t3Pik-kjv_OLSzXmTya2tPaswXwJHgeNxHN0jn3bno14DgeMVBY4LpcQlkgqUElXVrl6binvIuahWmGVx4XnElGIdbsLqZaOY_jDtX--Xw98AAAD__2VAW_g) on Monday. The process involves around 50 workers and will be completed this Thursday. The 95-foot tree installed in the center of the upscale mall’s ice skating rink consists of a five-ton steel frame, 700 branches, more than 200,000 lights, and thousands of ornaments, including a [100-pound, 10-foot star topper](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvpTAQhH-N6fzktYGXFC6uocu1VyIbL7C6BUf2Buf9-xPpr_5G843mz8f8EYjp3H6HA718r3m2xvYaQIOdUyB-zX2XfDTpHTr08HTQA5jBdbvHJT7HsLpon4AYI7wN0TgzwurenRneOvJ3GQBYADsOw8MlE01cXB9HuxhMqjeYSHJ5yI6C36Gu_MoXlseSj479LvJZlful7KTs1Fp7SAkXcjiT5K_ScuF0R5WdTmxV2SkUoYVR2WkLzFgo6BSYQ9Vf54XEVf9otNy0iqYz5Vz0sheqctygIOpGsusTm5ZG519-acakmbZdbkdXfPpsxEx1fKrebEcg_lks_73w8vZfAAAA__-qWHiA). The tree will be on display for visitors through January 6.

clean_body: A migrant caravan traveling from southern Mexico to the United States has shrunk to about half its original size following Donald Trump’s victory last week. | | | | nt=fridge2&utmmedium=&utmterm= | | Tuesday, November 12, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1915, 22 music clubs from across the state met in Brownwood to form the . The organization still promotes music education and appreciation through community programs, performances, and competitions. The holidays are approaching, and a North Texas mall is once again putting up the nation's tallest indoor Christmas tree. in the Roundup! Today's sponsor is the , with health advice to help you live pain-free. Abilene 🌥️ 76/50° | Amarillo ☁️ 65/45° | Austin ☀️ 83/55° | Brownsville 🌤️ 87/68° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 85/70° | DFW ☀️ 76/51° | El Paso ⛅ 77/47° | Houston ☀️ 80/60° | Lubbock ☁️ 71/47° | San Antonio 🌤️ 83/62° | Texarkana 🌤️ 72/50° | Migrant Caravan Dwindles After Trump Win A migrant caravan traveling from southern Mexico to the United States has following Donald Trump’s victory last week. Many of the confessed they had hoped Vice President Kamala Harris would win and expressed doubt about being allowed to stay in the U.S. if they were granted asylum before Trump takes office. Some even who voted for the former president. "They forgot about when they were on the other side," said Mahily Paz, a Venezuelan migrant. Trump has promised to finish the border wall begun in his first administration, reinstitute the “Remain in Mexico” policy for asylum seekers, and initiate mass deportations. High Lead Levels In Houston Neighborhood A new study by Texas A&M researchers indicates that the soil of Houston's Greater Fifth Ward contains , particularly lead, which exceed U.S. EPA safety benchmarks in an area designated as a "cancer cluster" by state officials. Soil samples collected from residential and recreational areas contain lead concentrations , prompting researchers to speculate that the contaminant could contribute to higher-than-normal cancer rates among the socioeconomically disadvantaged community. The Fifth Ward is also home to a facility that pioneered the use of creosote on railroad ties. Union Pacific, which owns the former Houston Wood Preserving Works site, is and coordinating with the EPA on health risk assessments. Galleria Dallas Christmas Tree Goes Up Crews at Galleria Dallas began assembling the on Monday. The process involves around 50 workers and will be completed this Thursday. The 95-foot tree installed in the center of the upscale mall’s ice skating rink consists of a five-ton steel frame, 700 branches, more than 200,000 lights, and thousands of ornaments, including a . The tree will be on display for visitors through January 6. The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all fifty states. ! | Did your mom ever tell you fruit is healthy? name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Receive your exclusive copy today
body:
I’m thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73b9f095d5c14bfdb276cc34821d4230&_e=yyFCTjVgTYtK9mpyEfrAOm3yGuxPKy3RIP_iSgNerSLiqnTXtft5vOU1n7_WfkV8foa0D0s3ge1w01owzbQyViKRqNxJkstky7KBwZvMNbuKc6MZXvqueqa6Q4_6IxWBQXlTeKfppffUl2YflGDGBTP8y9epVTcisBwzhG7-JIauQMFABuUYVIF5Xob9EQeB7u4UGSVaUt7donXCt8Wb_S_xBvmgcwtWBPPgutY7eY6HEdLYCFmAYVdMnzIxX0MfUTc289xjzmTVEYiUtAyfO9Q6PMAFlSAy5d6hNKhyFBhSMTSRqRkI5oGCdcfacKsY-ayHvjtoLpeytOOE1ccsshss_A7sNjho0rU_-Kk4BLTzNQKutIFh-rZZAglwPcEBBzp9dWF8YeJ68E82U3OTjEbeBMNfG3O4eRW9_srsZR8%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

I'm thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

Perhaps you've wondered where the artwork accompanying the lectures in our free online courses comes from. We hear this especially for one of our most popular courses, "The Genesis Story."

The Book of Genesis has inspired some of Western Civilization's greatest artists to produce iconic works. You may be familiar with Michelangelo's "The Creation of Adam" and Rembrandt's "The Sacrifice of Issac."

I can still remember seeing "The Creation of Adam" right after I graduated from Hillsdale at the Sistine Chapel...

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73b9f095d5c14bfdb276cc34821d4230&_e=yyFCTjVgTYtK9mpyEfrAOm3yGuxPKy3RIP_iSgNerSLiqnTXtft5vOU1n7_WfkV8foa0D0s3ge1w01owzbQyViKRqNxJkstky7KBwZvMNbuKc6MZXvqueqa6Q4_6IxWBQXlTeKfppffUl2YflGDGBTP8y9epVTcisBwzhG7-JIauQMFABuUYVIF5Xob9EQeB7u4UGSVaUt7donXCt8Wb_S_xBvmgcwtWBPPgutY7eY6HEdLYCFmAYVdMnzIxX0MfUTc289xjzmTVEYiUtAyfO4fBoiFNOax15zbZ6xSxTwHlN8nuqnYxoYIkKhlAY-tCJfY-DKHgnKr7mnAVsTJ3BooeGp7twr3l0o2AlsXgbE6zRCeBGsOtQy31veAuZl08jg0IKNlPt23c1CWhCCcEhVVkIYP0Z4XtMgDyXY_rKks%3D) **We 've compiled these paintings, along with many others featured in this course, into a brand-new coffee table book, "The Genesis Story: Course Companion." And I'd like you to receive a copy.**

With this exclusive book--available only from Hillsdale College--you can read the passages from the Book of Genesis that led Michelangelo, Rembrandt, Gustave Dore, and other masters to create these incredible works of art.

And with these works all in one place, you and your family can enjoy page after page of divinely inspired art.

**You can reserve your copy of "The Genesis Story: Course Companion," an exclusive hard-cover book from Hillsdale College, for a generous donation of $100 or more by clicking the secure link below: **

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/genesis-story-course-companion-book](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73b9f095d5c14bfdb276cc34821d4230&_e=yyFCTjVgTYtK9mpyEfrAOm3yGuxPKy3RIP_iSgNerSLiqnTXtft5vOU1n7_WfkV8foa0D0s3ge1w01owzbQyViKRqNxJkstky7KBwZvMNbuKc6MZXvqueqa6Q4_6IxWBQXlTeKfppffUl2YflGDGBTP8y9epVTcisBwzhG7-JIauQMFABuUYVIF5Xob9EQeB7u4UGSVaUt7donXCt8Wb_S_xBvmgcwtWBPPgutY7eY6HEdLYCFmAYVdMnzIxX0MfUTc289xjzmTVEYiUtAyfOzNM9w8Xt-ACW-ZXMuJMUIWntqW_8lnrGjnbsXWbQ9zS-sTcBZmlgfQoH4ehjeRV7m3feQaKgRLGgFKX5fmRzNdY6E2Gq3qmDwkvK8GVRPzHnFeKrY8mDwLEjg_Y8kOCLtBUuHOoBuZwuNVF9zS9g_Q%3D)**

Thanks again for your continued support and generosity. I hope you'll enjoy this beautiful book.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution

## Trump Announces Key Roles for Second Term
President-elect Donald Trump [has begun appointing key positions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L-O8yAQBPCnsTsilj_GKSi-Jl2-9kprDUu8FzCWzSXK25-S_sqfRhqN5us6XZEzr7f_WMi3VCcllREAAtQUkfNrMn30iUiR7smD02AAjIN-8QDRkianHYB183keA0htZBxGZUO0Pft3GwAoAG2NOmGYxzHMqM8WhmRlZyRFbnU_fVde20Ipv-qD9lOopc9-aW07Ov2vU5dOXXBb6Xm8ozf2xiFTpy5t_ymbOBqmJDYO90McjRKufBdPzvThttAqCudMu2i1iKUWXIUyOjo9gJylRk0EYzDRpmF0dsDkQr_7uD05Zz4G1xl5K8j5M639ddXDq98AAAD__xj9anA) in his second administration, focusing on aides and allies who were his most dedicated supporters during the 2024 campaign. On Monday, Trump announced [plans to appoint former](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvTniDjD2wNAlW7p2tDAc8VVgLEwT5d9X6d7x0yc9Pb2v23JznHi_f7pMtsWyoEA1AAyAS3CcXovqg41ESLInC0aCAlAG-s0SBqlpVHoksWqlnIlkvJAqkIZxVj3bNw0AEEBqhRfn12nyq5OzhjFq0SlBgVupl-_Ce9sopld5UL34kvtkt9aOs5MfHV47vLpjp-f5vt6jNvaJOry2-pOP4Wx0bLQPmVOiOhwlsX8NnDPfq2tc9mH2fnRBAkzGzCvKNcZpEojeaUIcRV9tOJ6cEp-j6ZS4Z8fpT6T9F-Zh8TcAAP__6CFkSw) New York Rep. Lee Zeldin to lead the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), longtime adviser Stephen Miller as deputy chief of policy, Rep. Mike Waltz of Florida as his national security adviser, and Rep. Elise Stefanik as U.N. Ambassador. Trump's transition [team earlier tapped](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1v8yAURn-NvRFx-TAwMLxLtrxrR-sC1zEVNhahidJfX7l7x0ePdI50Pm7zDXPJ-_0_buT7UmfBhWIADMScMJf3rMbkFyJBciQPRoICUAbG1ZM2cQrJobJao1PcLjrw4LjUTigjx-xPGgAIAKmVuGAM1saA0mmYFs0HxSnlXtvls-a9r7SUd31Su8S6jcWvvR-PQf4bxHUQVzx2ej3O6xyt51hoENfevraDrXXDneVILNSWqLH4jY2ZROhAB02opHWTdDxYLngSWi3WmrH5dLxyKfkxmUHx-4a5_Mr7XzGeXvwEAAD__1y3Xmk) former ICE director Tom Homan for the position of border czar and senior adviser Susie Wiles as chief of staff, making her the first woman to hold the position. Media sources also reported Monday that Trump was expected [to name Sen. Marco Rubio](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1ieAQenoHiNu7x2SwvDELPCYAGJN3-_SvqtbnGlo6PzdVtuJsSQ7v_NTrr5vOCAkgNwwMWZEF-L7Jz2REiiIw1KgASQCrpNT5MVw6RWb_0oPY7OCCkmM6xKSoEX1wX9pgEAAohRYm_sOk12NeI6wsWPA5MDudBy6b9zSG0jH1_5SaW3ee-i3lo7KhP_GM4M5_M8-7TaRGd9_wznI8fQgq0MZ5eTiY638tgPhvNnOf0cZBs5brecK_FKie-m2MzLYw2ZV7KFmikvXptpxItNBtRVDaor2h1niDHUi2JyuO8mxI9V-6vSU-NvAAAA__8isGui) to be Secretary of State, while cautioning that Trump could still change his mind.
## Spirit Airlines Flight Hit by Gunfire in Haiti
A Spirit Airlines flight out of Florida was hit by gunfire Monday while attempting to land in Port-au-Prince, Haiti, injuring a flight attendant. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX-N2RxxhyFk8NCFLV07IoPPcK1jI3MJyr-vUiljl7c8vU9P39d1vDqOnJZPdyMrIY9Yo9EAGnD0juNzNJW3gQipqcjCuQEDYM5QrXamQN3kutpfLoawDSY0_eR7mpo-eBMqti8aACBA0xo8uXnq-3lyzaWFLrS1MjV5llxO35mTrBTiMz-onOZ8q6JdRbZdNR8KB4VDem55l1elcHiBFQ4A7zhyiV4nOnaFw75xYdGOS-REuw6Rl1V0cT_k9cGy6uWeAhfSx8qRdHTJc1o0J706Fn4PnAgl75LoI9-TJ69wqIr128Ex8t6dlamXm-P4d1j-E_iw-BsAAP__DRx0xg). The flight, [en route from Fort Lauderdale](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFrwzAQhX-NvcXoTrIdDRq6ZEvXjuZineMrkhUUEZF_X1S6dvrg8fF4vK_rciUJctw_KbIrW1pQoTkBnAAXTxLei-m925iRdc8OZg0GwMzQ786zNdoqnlf0NzsT2BE9bEhkpkkp6sW1NgBAAD0aHGi9nc_rjbQdYdpG1RnFXkrKw3eSo-y8hXd6cR7WFPvg9lIez05_dHjp8FJrHaJQlJ0zBd-cDi8H12cDFUnHqaYcfHP_SJGzrNSMnaRIi3KRNTDaUc_WWjPsJYY-O_-oEoI8p7kz6h5Jwu-K8t8rL4c_AQAA___iLmP0), was diverted to Santiago, Dominican Republic, where it landed safely. Toussaint Louverture International Airport grounded all commercial flights following the incident, which occurred just hours before Haiti's new prime minister was set to be sworn in. The attackers remain unidentified, but the shooting aligns with recent [gang violence targeting aircraft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7og8Aza4oHhNurx2S2sCgz0rYiyMEuXvV9l-y6srHR2dr9tyI8myr__pwb6lsuCARgEowCWS5Pdi-ugTM7Lu2YPVYACMhX7zhnQcUkwTUUqWZ32PwAPb6HCaMNle_IcGAAigR4MXCnfnwp30PMKUxqEzA0dppV6-i-xt45Tf5cn1Esqjz35r7Tg7_a_Da4dXOnZ-nZ_rM2qTkLnD63lIlaY2kiYqZVm3dqqV9lU9pWTeAyuSepTaVLBhNqjnkGCG0bmE4MyomcYICMH11cfjJTnLOdnODOuDJP-6tL_aPD3-BAAA___eUmXB) in the region. Spirit Airlines confirmed the incident and announced a suspension of service to Haiti.
## Wildfires Devastate Both U.S. Coasts
Fire crews on both coasts of the U.S. [continued to battle wildfires](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PszAQhH8NdI68iz-gcPE26fK2VyLb7CbOOTgyVhD__sT1181opHmk5-s233zKab3_9y9yjcuMEpUAEIDz4lM-ZtUvjomQhp4c2AEUgLLQP5yO6JVkzWH0Rkk0lqKZNAQp7cjW9MmdbwCAAINWePExjGMMfpg0GNayU5KW1Eq9PEta24M4H-VD9RLLq8_u0dp764Z_HV47vPr3Svt2TmepLcVMHV5X2sWT6kaHOONR6rfgVGkTSDFK9hrNEicmC6OVbMnwFCTpQH11y3tPOafN2E7J-8un_Ituf6n4OPwJAAD__w3EXzc), including one in New York and New Jersey that resulted in the death of a parks employee, and another in Southern California that has destroyed over 170 buildings. Hundreds of firefighters from New York and New Jersey [struggled to contain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ8GdxuxC8RJQXGNu1x7pYXtxSZHIAKSyG9_cqQr_-ZrVvtpZv7cxpsLMaT1t3uwbT6PJEkDIiCNiwtxH3W3WM9MrDq22CvUiLrHbrOul8Z4vhqaaPIXkudeeuWMJqMmN8su2MOGiISojKaTm6fLZZ6cuho8eyOFlryElsvpnkNqG_u45zeX05wfXbRba88q1C9Bg6Ah7c9c23ESNBxiQQPif7wqJP5UQcNn28GHwj6sW-NSwRWG2sprXY-mMJWDd04ppLXCXJj_fh8gJEg7uLRAusMrLVxgzqmVHAUNXbHL8xNiDPXcCy3XhwvxG7T9NNzb0r8AAAD__9UUcBc) nine blazes that have erupted across the region, including the Jennings Creek Fire, located about 30 miles northwest of Midtown Manhattan. Containment was 10% by late Monday. An 18-year-old park ranger, Dariel Vasquez, [died while fighting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OtCAUxvGrgW4M54AfFBRvYzdvu6VBPOrZoEyUSGaufuP22z3Jk_yS_9dzeHqOvC___UYuz2lAheYB8AAcJs_xPRg5uZkISUty0GowAKYFubpgsW117a2pkaxSCgNCAE2WmgatkexuDQAQQNcGKx_Grguj17aGZq6VMIomzumovhPveaU5vtNFRxXSJqNbc36dQv8T2AvsSynVOIb7E9jvVE6BvT8yh0j3DMt2fXT36aY9ycNNr8Ix8tm0wqhl8xx_1fxX5eXwJwAA__-HWFKy) one of the blazes. He worked for New York’s Parks and Recreation Department. In Southern California, strong winds have intensified wildfires. Crews increased containment of the Mountain Fire in Ventura County, northwest of Los Angeles, to 36% as of Monday. The fire continues to span approximately 32 square miles. [You can see fire damage here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvozAQhH-N6RyxBgwpXFxDl2uvRIu9DntnbGQ74fLvn5JXv3a-0afR_LktN-TA8f4bdzLVp0W1qpcAEtTikMNr6RtnPJGiriEDYwc9QD9Cs5lx1DDp8dqqFRXYzk_DqgknPUzX1XvdsHnbAEABdEOvLmjXabIrdtcBtB9a0bfkuKZ8-Zs41o18eKUn5YtNexPMVutRRPdLqFmo-d9-bG8g1BzpLELNIVkMQs17esSKHKXnTLLT8qBsKVZp0ycn902S92wZQ5GOis28ktww53RyvL-7jiunWCQWWdKjbpSjtBjYpxwZ5cnBfTz0_wjJkWuyccfJIXDRo-jb-44cPtvrT18-jfoKAAD__38zesQ).

On Monday, Trump announced New York Rep. Lee Zeldin to lead the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), longtime adviser Stephen Miller as deputy chief of policy, Rep. Mike Waltz of Florida as his national security adviser, and Rep. Elise Stefanik as U.N. Ambassador. Trump's transition former ICE director Tom Homan for the position of border czar and senior adviser Susie Wiles as chief of staff, making her the first woman to hold the position. Media sources also reported Monday that Trump was expected to be Secretary of State, while cautioning that Trump could still change his mind. Spirit Airlines Flight Hit by Gunfire in Haiti A Spirit Airlines flight out of Florida was hit by gunfire Monday while attempting to land in Port-au-Prince, Haiti, injuring a flight attendant. . The flight, , was diverted to Santiago, Dominican Republic, where it landed safely. Toussaint Louverture International Airport grounded all commercial flights following the incident, which occurred just hours before Haiti's new prime minister was set to be sworn in. The attackers remain unidentified, but the shooting aligns with recent in the region. Spirit Airlines confirmed the incident and announced a suspension of service to Haiti. Wildfires Devastate Both U.S. Coasts Fire crews on both coasts of the U.S. , including one in New York and New Jersey that resulted in the death of a parks employee, and another in Southern California that has destroyed over 170 buildings. Hundreds of firefighters from New York and New Jersey nine blazes that have erupted across the region, including the Jennings Creek Fire, located about 30 miles northwest of Midtown Manhattan. Containment was 10% by late Monday. An 18-year-old park ranger, Dariel Vasquez, one of the blazes. He worked for New York’s Parks and Recreation Department. In Southern California, strong winds have intensified wildfires. Crews increased containment of the Mountain Fire in Ventura County, northwest of Los Angeles, to 36% as of Monday. The fire continues to span approximately 32 square miles. . subject: McCormick Campaign Statement on the Outcome of the Senate Race in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

We have a quick update on Dave McCormick's race that we want to share with you.

"McCormick is up 30,679 votes with more to come, as ruby red Cambria County is still outstanding. While votes continue to be counted, any way you slice it, Dave McCormick will be the next United States Senator from Pennsylvania," said Elizabeth Gregory, McCormick communications director.

Your support has played an incredible role in getting Dave this far - from being the underdog with a double-digit deficit to 30,679 votes ahead with more to come. Thank you for all of your help in getting Dave McCormick over the finish line.

name: History Facts
subject: How long did it take to write the Oxford English Dictionary?
body:
The Oxford English Dictionary, also known as simply the OED, is a massive reference book containing not just words — including obsolete ones — and their definitions, but also detailed information on the words’ history and usage. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68beg1pane7vktmc1v30ioj5ewgjrp6itdxpxxkbt60l7gzx4oij7lny5921elxpqnjrbvmbpmg5v08jsq1gzppvt8gqf8sc0xonvuvhu66mqnkk64jd6dsgtd8hfxrt5yqd24g7vk25yzhjl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [It took the Oxford English Dictionary editors five years just to reach the word “ant.” ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he Oxford English Dictionary, also known as simply the OED, is a massive reference book containing not just words — including obsolete ones — and their definitions, but also detailed information on the words’ history and usage. The project was born in 1857, when the Philological Society of London, a group dedicated to the history of literature and words, established a committee to [collect words](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that didn’t appear in existing dictionaries at the time. Their goal was to document the English language going back to Anglo-Saxon times, which ended around 1000 CE — so quite a lot of territory to cover.
---
Work started in earnest in 1879, after Oxford University Press signed on to finance and publish the dictionary, at the time called the New English Dictionary (NED). The staff buckled down and got to work reading and researching; editor James Murray estimated the dictionary would take about 10 years to compile. In 1884, after working on the dictionary for five years, the first fascicle (meaning a part of a book) came out. It only covered the words “a” through “ant.”
The project was clearly more ambitious than the Philological Society had originally imagined. Murray started working on the dictionary full time, and over the next several years he was joined by another editor and two co-editors. The last fascicle was published on April 19, 1928, nearly 50 years after work began. The original plan was for the dictionary to contain 6,400 pages over four volumes; ultimately, the first edition of the NED contained 12 volumes with 15,487 pages, covering a whopping 414,825 words. Today, the OED continues to document the growing English language, and includes more than 600,000 entries, with new words and meanings added regularly.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj4486ou39rpswrbp4tt1v2ozljabtu4hvqm7a7bu4iyjpkmqospto51z1kojm0y6dk0zbaheyu78g4l9dmtbd7q66xwyvxnw0ln50cxmcwvk7irnc3m6oc93lkygiv8k9mikq1smor19tzxbb4n35gv7a5ul58epqaffu14hv58tpizhkmcydr1mj65de81bn44sv3j7fp5p9vtbenamj0vbnnws33gzro1k1p8nqa4b65bd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
## By the Numbers
| | Year OED Online was launched
---
2000
| | New words added to the OED in the September 2024 quarterly update
---
249
| New words added to the OED in the September 2024 quarterly update
---
249
| | Year of the earliest recorded use of the word “dictionary,” according to the OED

## J.R.R. Tolkien worked on the Oxford English Dictionary.
You can, in some small part, thank _Lord of the Rings_ author J.R.R. Tolkien for the Oxford English Dictionary — or maybe you can thank the OED for _The_ _Lord of the Rings_ , since etymology features so heavily in Tolkien’s epic trilogy. A 27-year-old Tolkien joined the OED project in 1919 and spent around 18 months on staff, [focusing](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smu72k&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) on words beginning with the letter “W” (including “wasp” and “walnut”). The author went on to coin words that appeared in later editions of the dictionary, including “hobbit,” “eucatastrophe,” and “dwarves” as a plural form of “dwarf.”

clean_body: The Oxford English Dictionary, also known as simply the OED, is a massive reference book containing not just words — including obsolete ones — and their definitions, but also detailed information on the words’ history and usage. | T he Oxford English Dictionary, also known as simply the OED, is a massive reference book containing not just words — including obsolete ones — and their definitions, but also detailed information on the words’ history and usage. The project was born in 1857, when the Philological Society of London, a group dedicated to the history of literature and words, established a committee to that didn’t appear in existing dictionaries at the time. Their goal was to document the English language going back to Anglo-Saxon times, which ended around 1000 CE — so quite a lot of territory to cover. Work started in earnest in 1879, after Oxford University Press signed on to finance and publish the dictionary, at the time called the New English Dictionary (NED). The staff buckled down and got to work reading and researching; editor James Murray estimated the dictionary would take about 10 years to compile. In 1884, after working on the dictionary for five years, the first fascicle (meaning a part of a book) came out. It only covered the words “a” through “ant.” The project was clearly more ambitious than the Philological Society had originally imagined. Murray started working on the dictionary full time, and over the next several years he was joined by another editor and two co-editors. The last fascicle was published on April 19, 1928, nearly 50 years after work began. The original plan was for the dictionary to contain 6,400 pages over four volumes; ultimately, the first edition of the NED contained 12 volumes with 15,487 pages, covering a whopping 414,825 words. Today, the OED continues to document the growing English language, and includes more than 600,000 entries, with new words and meanings added regularly. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year OED Online was launched 2000 | | New words added to the OED in the September 2024 quarterly update 249 | New words added to the OED in the September 2024 quarterly update 249 | | Year of the earliest recorded use of the word “dictionary,” according to the OED 1480 | | Castes in an ant colony (queens, workers, and males) 3 | Castes in an ant colony (queens, workers, and males) 3 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- J.R.R. Tolkien worked on the Oxford English Dictionary. You can, in some small part, thank Lord of the Rings author J.R.R. Tolkien for the Oxford English Dictionary — or maybe you can thank the OED for The Lord of the Rings , since etymology features so heavily in Tolkien’s epic trilogy. A 27-year-old Tolkien joined the OED project in 1919 and spent around 18 months on staff, on words beginning with the letter “W” (including “wasp” and “walnut”). name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/12/2024
body:
With Evans victory in 8th District, Colorado Republicans earned split in U.S. House
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
We got lots of great feedback on the new format of the Mountain Minute with a summary at the top, so here's what you can expect from today's newsletter:
☑️ **Colorado's Election Results** – With [Gabe Evans' win](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Colorado’s 8th District, Republicans secured a split in Colorado’s representation in the U.S. House, and as of Monday, helped Republicans flip six seats to hold a 214-204 advantage. [Ryan Gonzalez’s victory in HD50](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), along with tight races in other districts, show that conservative values continue to resonate strongly with Coloradans.
**🇺🇸 Honoring Veterans Day** – A heartfelt piece by Sean Verhoeff reflects on the importance of Veterans Day and the challenges faced by many Colorado families who couldn’t observe the holiday together due to [school still being in session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). We also feature Colorado's own [Vietnam Veteran Ray Gooch](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) who now teaches classes on the U.S. Constitution, filled with rich anecdotes that bring history to life.
💼 **New Key Appointments in Trump’s Team** – You won't see articles about this below, but we thought it was important to inform you about the critical new faces to Trump's team as he prepares for his second term, including former Rep. Lee Zeldin to [lead the EPA](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), NY Rep. Elise Stefanik as [UN Ambassador](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Tom Homan to [oversee border security](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Stephen Miller as [deputy chief of staff for policy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
There's more below than we could cover so we hope you read on! And I know I'm a day late, but thank you to all the veterans who risked their lives to protect our freedom. We honor and salute you.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, November 11, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[With Evans victory in 8th District, Colorado Republicans earned split in U.S. House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Gabe Evans has delivered on a seat Republicans always believed they could capture.
“Black Hawk helicopter pilot, Army veteran, Arvada police officer, state representative, grandson of immigrants, and now: Congressman,” said Delanie Bomar, a spokeswoman for the Republican National Congressional Committee. “Gabe Evans is a fighter for the American Dream who will work tirelessly on their behalf in Congress, and we look forward to seeing the valuable results Congressman-elect Evans will deliver for Coloradans.”
Shortly after the Kansas City Chiefs blocked the Broncos’ kick for victory on Sunday, Evans blocked Democrat Yadira Caraveo’s bid at re-election to Colorado’s 8th District seat in the U.S. House.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Ryan Gonzalez hands GOP win in HD50; Tight races for Woog in HD19, Keltie in HD16](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Ryan Gonzalez secured a Republican victory in Colorado’s House District 50, a traditionally Democratic seat, defeating incumbent Mary Young and marking a notable GOP gain in Weld County.
* In House District 19, Republican Dan Woog narrowly leads Jillaire McMillan, and in House District 16, Republican Rebecca Keltie holds a slim advantage over incumbent Steph Vigil, with both races likely heading for recounts due to the tight margins.
* These close races reflect ongoing efforts by Republicans to increase their representation and potentially break the Democratic supermajority in the Colorado House, with final results pending certification and potential recounts.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Western Slope livestock raisers seek answers on wolf concerns from CPW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Livestock raisers on Colorado's Western Slope are expressing concerns about the planned relocation of wolves by Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW), especially with calving season approaching, which makes livestock more vulnerable.
* CPW provided guidance on mitigation strategies, including using guardian dogs, fencing, and hazing techniques, but producers are frustrated, citing the high financial and logistical costs imposed by wolf management.
* Many ranchers feel that the wolf reintroduction program, approved by Front Range voters, has unintended consequences that impact rural communities, leading some to question the state's financial priorities in managing wolf populations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Vietnam veteran Ray Gooch educates younger generations on U.S. Constitution](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Vietnam veteran Ray Gooch, inspired by his upbringing and service during the Cold War, teaches the U.S. Constitution to younger generations through his Constitution Alive program, aiming to instill patriotism and historical understanding.
* Gooch's classes emphasize the founding principles of the U.S., connecting historical context to present-day challenges, with the goal of empowering citizens to defend their heritage and constitutional values.
* His work serves as a tribute to veterans’ enduring dedication, highlighting the importance of passing on values of duty, service, and knowledge of constitutional freedoms.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Carr: Risk-limiting audits in Colorado have little chance of finding and fixing incorrect election outcomes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY TASHA CARR, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Voters have the right to ensure that our votes are counted correctly. The Risk-limiting Audit (RLA) is the only method available for Colorado voters to be assured that wrong election outcomes are detected and fixed._
_Yet, the RLAs in Colorado have little chance of fixing any incorrect outcomes because the Secretary of State is violating key assumptions of the RLAs and not complying with best practices._
_Fundamental to RLAs is the statistical concept of a risk limit. In plain English, the risk limit is the risk (chance) of not discovering and fixing wrong election outcomes. To ensure our elections are valid, we want the chance of missing a wrong outcome to be very low._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Verhoeff: On Veterans Day, we honor service and sacrifice, yet many Colorado schools remain open](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN VERHOEFF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_As we approach Veterans Day, a day dedicated to honoring the men and women who have selflessly served our nation, we are reminded of the sacrifices these individuals and their families have made._
_This federal holiday offers the nation an opportunity to reflect on the courage, commitment and resilience of our veterans, and to express gratitude for the freedoms we enjoy as a result of their service._
_However, in Colorado, many public schools do not observe Veterans Day as a holiday, meaning students attend classes as usual, and families often miss the chance to celebrate together. For families with a legacy of military service, this lack of observance can feel like a missed opportunity to pass down stories, traditions and lessons that Veterans Day embodies. In some cases, this decision even feels like a slight to the sacrifices of those who have served, as the day goes by without pause or ceremony within school walls._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Garfield County deputy terminated for alleged embezzlement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY LINDY BROWNING | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 11** _Corp. Trisha Worley, a 14-year veteran of the Garfield County Sheriff’s Office has been terminated for allegations of embezzlement, a a press release from Garfield County Sheriff Lou Vallario reads._
**[Gilmartin: Win in House District 50 by Ryan Gonzalez, age 29, is historic](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JACK GILMARTIN | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 9** _In a groundbreaking election for Colorado Republicans, 29-year-old Ryan Gonzalez claimed victory in House District 50 in Greeley, unseating incumbent Democrat Mary Young._
[**Kalam: Lessons (not) learned from the 2024 election**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY AHNAF KALAM | COMMENTARY |****NOVEMBER 8** _As I settled into my usual spot at my go-to Colfax bar for its election watch party, donning my black MAGA hat, I could feel the tension even before the manager approached me._
__
__
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** Veterans Day and Memorial Day both honor U.S. military personnel, but with **different focuses** : Memorial Day commemorates those who died in service to the country, while Veterans Day celebrates all veterans, especially those still living, for their service and contributions.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY**
“Part of being a winner is knowing when enough is enough. Sometimes you have to give up the fight and walk away, and move on to something that’s more productive.” – Donald J. Trump
|

Democratic New York City Mayor Eric Adams sent a letter to a federal judge Monday, pressing to expedite his trial on corruption and bribery charges. Adams’s attorney, Alex Spiro, submitted a formal request to the federal judge overseeing the case, asking for the trial to begin on April 1, according to The Associated Press.

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: They STILL don’t get it
body:
Peter, Leftist Lunatics thought they would run away with New Jersey – and the country. Now that things clearly went the oth
|
---
| Peter, Leftist Lunatics thought they would run away with New Jersey – and the country. Now that things clearly went the other way by A LOT, they are trying to understand why and STILL not getting it. WATCH: Morning Joe’s Joe Scarborough and guest Al Sharpton claim Hispanic voters are racists. Yep, blame the voters for being bad people.
---
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link016.com/v2/click/c79ff5f17874994872cbcf7dd65998b4/eJyNkE1PwzAMhv9LzlXTjzFBb9M0TVXHDgjOkZd6SrQ0iRKvZUz972SAdgKJq_34sV9fGaEFS23PGvZOH1VVs4wFlNprtLR2lkB-dauHRVmXGTPanrbBnT1rrr8O34FbuS6elhmji8eEvL6s1l2734pdu-8S6SGkHf_0PFZ3z-Z51e7YPP8pxkHTZkzuyBoKZ7wl6nVKRW_BJF4R-dhwPk1THhCMNAjBO6NJy5hLN_BR9-h4VVQLXpa8WHIwIqoEkbMChHEk3FEoHT1YLcXoCEMUCkYUPriDwSGKSZMSBwPyJCTYXvdAGHNFg0kngvdo-5__dnj5PnT-BAfYiDg=)
---
| AND WATCH: The View’s Sunny Hostin insists Latinos in Texas went for Trump because of – get this – sexism and misogyny! Not because of maybe...the border or the economy or wokism in their childrens’ schools.
---
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link016.com/v2/click/53c2c8f5e9cf44557b0ff1a847130608/eJyNkF0LgkAQRf_LPEuaFpgQIRVhZh9Sz2E60JLuLrtjZOF_b_ugp4JeZ86cy50bEPKMU1RAABe6uq4HFijMmWTIaSw4Zflz6_Z7Xa9rQcn4aaZELSG4fT3-AI-x5wx8C6iRaJBtGo7jaDnbL6JlbEiZKZPxp8d3P55pEkYLaNufYqwYTc_GrSEgVeOjUcFMK9qp0vBHIqkD225ETfUBO7mobH0UirTt78V6MK9yRs5Is-F6gn6aJhcsncNm1SRGnkmJvHh_JsbmFdHeAVHbbAY=)
---
| You see, the Left NEEDS this to be about identity politics. Because otherwise, they would have to acknowledge that rather than being bad people, American voters simply don’t want to buy the failed policies and woke vision they’re selling. They aren’t willing to grapple with the fact that maybe, just maybe, they aren’t the majority after all, despite reigning in academia and Hollywood and despite holding the shrinking megaphone of mainstream media. It’s THIS kind of stupidity, arrogance, and elitism that is exactly why they lost.
---
| | [JOIN the Common Sense Majority](https://xtz223.keap-link016.com/v2/click/7c1f9f30f4b34f26539877cfb095c808/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCXzI4i9iUiI5iHqHLYOteR-sI6Rhf-9taJTQTCnmWee4Z07EKpaUd4AgyvdwjACDyxyYQQqSrWimj-n4SIOosCDVqjzyureALt_Xf4AUzsK5rEHNBh0yHaTpEVerfZlXhWONLV1N_7zzJfhx5Otk7yEcfwpRikouzh3B4xsj1OiRrhUtLOt409EpmO-z7WUWnXoirf9Yabt0ZcoD2i7kzC-M9XGoGrebyhwePnGB6ghZls=)
---
| | [I’m already a member, but I’d like to chip in for 2025!](https://xtz223.keap-link016.com/v2/click/8855e0c42d6c3d76627c1588ee795d2c/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l69a-FKS7UkRK1YXoWsZpwME2M0zT4oP-u-MD3Si4Tc494eYKjCSIiwpSOPEljhPwwKJURiFxromFfGzjyThKIg9qRce51Z2B9Po1_Abu4yQKYw_4bNAhm3WWl8VqvlsUq9KRRlh34z9POP14ZsusWMAw_BRjo3jWO3cLKdsO740q5Vrx1taOPzCbNg0CqZtGk98itejLutuPLPb9SOqg0iQYnUoYg1S9_lDi-SkcbvgcZk4=)
---
| But let’s look at the reasons common sense WON.
1. We refused to stay silent, despite the assumptions about how New Jerseyans would vote.
2. Donald Trump articulated a clear position on the issues Americans and New Jerseyans actually care about – from the border to crime to the economy to men in women’s sports.
3. Common sense ideas are...common sense. And a majority of Americans still have common sense.

I’m going to level with you. We have a challenge and an opportunity ahead of us in 2025. We can’t sit back and rest on what happened this year. We absolutely must capitalize on this momentum to grow the Common Sense voice and take back our state. Dozens of critical offices are up in this next election from Governor on down to local school board races. So I hope you’ll join us as we identify more common sense New Jerseyans, hand them megaphones, and get loud together. The Left is CRAZY – but Common Sense is rising up! Let’s go, Common Sense friends! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|

| President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link016.com/v2/click/38698d8a6c82260a311593c84ae3e45f/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnDVLC8pbSIRYHqLOYTro0rq7rGNk4n9v-qBTQTCnmWee4Z0eCFWmKC4ghCvdfD8AByzmwghUFGlFWf6c-rPpJJg4IIU6r61uDYT91-UP8GgH48XUAeoMMrLfLaMkTtfHTZwmTJrM8o0_PXP_41ltl_EGhuGnGGtBqwu7GwjJtvhIVAhORQcrma-ITBN6Xq7rWqsGuXLZnkbalh5V2LkNCSndgtO7JZIryGNrZgyq4v2SBLuXe7gDk-pqnw==)

November 12th, 2024
|
---
#1 Survival Item of 2024
# #1 Survival Item of 2024
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19053/6374453/b6510eda8b4645f3a5ff1fc0e00f93813cff1077/3ba1cad2116c20adfa5884bc24e0bd0f6d5429d0) [](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19053/6374453/b6510eda8b4645f3a5ff1fc0e00f93813cff1077/3ba1cad2116c20adfa5884bc24e0bd0f6d5429d0) [**People are buying these in 4 packs – Learn More**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19053/6374453/b6510eda8b4645f3a5ff1fc0e00f93813cff1077/3ba1cad2116c20adfa5884bc24e0bd0f6d5429d0) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19053/6374453/b6510eda8b4645f3a5ff1fc0e00f93813cff1077/3ba1cad2116c20adfa5884bc24e0bd0f6d5429d0) [](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19053/6374453/b6510eda8b4645f3a5ff1fc0e00f93813cff1077/3ba1cad2116c20adfa5884bc24e0bd0f6d5429d0) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19053/6374453/b6510eda8b4645f3a5ff1fc0e00f93813cff1077/3ba1cad2116c20adfa5884bc24e0bd0f6d5429d0)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it. ---|--- | Shirley C. I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much. ---|--- | Wing C. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank. ---|--- | Richard G. It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much. ---|--- Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. name: Chairman Eric Underwood
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
2024 Election Statement and More | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/be9815289ff1/n41kepo7ku-12719231?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6007dc0e53&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

**Proverbs 22:4** _True humility and fear of the Lord lead to riches, honor, and long life._

As we reflect on the 2024 Election results, I encourage all to remember the blessings we have in this country. I encourage everyone to spend time giving thanks. But most of all, strive for the humble attitude that lifts others up. This election was a team effort and I thank everyone for their efforts. Let no one boast of individual efforts when the truth is many hands and hearts and volunteers came forth to save this country.
* * *
Today's election WAS going to be _**HISTORICAL**_.

[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d18858de0f&e=25844e23a8)

In the upcoming Chairman's Newsletters, I will showcase the leaders and newsletters and communication that is happening from across Nebraska. The more we coalesce through the activities within our state, the more opportunities to achieve our objectives.

We will have work to do.
We will have preparations and planning to accomplish.
We still have to Make America Great Again.

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---
|
---

The Book of Revelation is a **love story** between God and humanity. Yes, it's content is potentially daunting, featuring **mayhem and chaos** , but it also reassures us that God is ultimately in control, guiding and directing events. In fact, He's not just **allowing** events to happen, He's calling them into existence...much like He is today. Blessings
[Revelation 2.C (The Worldly Church)](https://substack.com/redirect/268c993c-74d1-46e3-88c3-e161b57a89b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: CHOP dodges questions on trans operations
body:
Beth Ann Rosica | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Beth Ann Rosica:_ CHOP’s key board members refuse to answer questions about sex reassignment surgeries_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6b653de2b4&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "Last month, I [reported](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a5e9a227b7&e=b7b3eddce2) about Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia’s (CHOP) refusal to provide information or answer questions about gender reassignment surgeries performed on children and the prescribing of puberty blockers and sex hormones for children. Despite over ten requests for comment to CHOP and their Gender and Sexuality Clinic, the organization refused to speak with me or provide their annual reports which they claim on their website are available upon request. Subsequently, I attempted to contact two of CHOP’s [Board of Trustees](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a58bb39fbd&e=b7b3eddce2), including the Chairman, Christopher Gheysens, and Vice Chair, Gregory Davis. The emailed request for comment asked if they were aware that CHOP was performing these surgeries and prescribing hormone and puberty blocker medications to children. It further asked if they were aware that CHOP failed to respond to my numerous requests..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2e734b562d&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Beth Ann Rosica:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=15b6a8525b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Beth Ann Rosica holds a Ph.D. in Education and has dedicated her career to advocating on behalf of at-risk children and families. She became politically active during the extended school closures, speaking out about the detrimental effects on children. Beth Ann led the local grassroots movement to open schools and eliminate mandatory masks while assisting school board candidates across the state and country with their campaigns. She has a consulting business and covers education issues for _Broad + Liberty_. Beth Ann resides in West Chester, PA with her husband and two teenage sons.

Read more from Beth Ann [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f14b0ac2a2&e=b7b3eddce2) at _Broad + Liberty_.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Join me in the fight for Virginia families
body:
Friend,

I want you to be among the first to know: today, with hope for a brighter future for our Commonwealth and our nation, I am proud to announce my campaign for Attorney General of Virginia.
I’m running because we need an Attorney General focused on keeping Virginians safe, not a personal, partisan political agenda. If you’re already fired up to support our campaign to retire Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General, please chip in right now to become one of the Founding Donors of this campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=5] If you have a few more minutes, keep reading to learn more about my vision and my plans for Virginia...

I am the descendant of slaves. My grandfather, a Civil Rights attorney, was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia. My father was in the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms, even as the Attorney General at that time shut down the schools to stop it.

Last week, we awoke to an uncertain future and a President-elect who openly flouts the rule of law. In times like these, I draw strength from my ancestors. In the very darkest days of our history, when things looked far more grim than they do today, they held unswervingly to hope that a brighter future was possible.

As Virginia’s Attorney General, my highest priority will always be the safety of my family and my fellow Virginians.

The incoming Trump administration threatens families with higher health care costs, higher prices, and hazards to our health. And President-elect Trump will find an eager accomplice in Virginia Attorney General Miyares. Jason Miyares has used his office to advance his own radical, ideological agenda, not protect Virginians.

As your Attorney General, I will protect Virginia families, our children, and the most vulnerable. We’ll crack down on those who would do our kids harm by working with law enforcement to get illegal guns off our streets, shut down drug traffickers, and hold to account gun manufacturers whose weapons of war are used to commit mass shootings and crimes.

I’ll take on the social media companies fueling a mental health crisis among young people and corporations that pollute our air and water. I’ll crack down on price-gougers, predatory lenders, and corporate landlords that break the law and make life unaffordable for the middle class.

If the Trump administration again tries to raise health care costs by taking apart the Affordable Care Act, I’ll be the first to take them to court to stop it.

And I will always fight back against any attempt to undermine abortion rights in Virginia.

If you’re ready to fight for Virginia families, to fight back against MAGA politics in Virginia and protect abortion rights, I need you with me.

Our team has set a goal to earn the support of 1,000 Founding Donors. We’re counting on folks like you, team, to help us reach this ambitious goal and kickstart this campaign. Will you chip in any amount to help us launch our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

Now is our moment to hold tightly to hope. Thank you for joining me in this fight.

– Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=HJfMJqIsPugJR2HsCc5qqF9jvXNVdlU2z5NsfTtYuXlhTc6kTXMwbLHH%2BqRqNYTO6LyrW%2FD8qGni8VWBnooe%2BB1QqDxl9KJUMD3CadRwAYvt9eXctDeMupzmPZMqMs58LUZ5uQKBt1x80z2wqw1E2Ci%2F7VATWnReDMg2AOaXifN82CB0Jy5ov9ttLGHVNDOyYQXl3KfFS36KCwfS%2FSc0Z2OiwxC5lEZ4KVgMHKxUSwcRec2P08t%2FATyFeQI1soWzLDgrMg3I8OWBmWR0jt0xyjBz2QuYK9MTy7n4r3RTVTLF2CTrMXbJVoWPsSoL7Y6Lp6Fw4NAWPtZnCqeFYFPg7%2BW%2FF%2FOy1RKVrpMNH4V%2F6mh5zpaCUdPng81Hz39P1x%2Fy5BDyy7VagTHm7l9OCCUtWAlvsk3Zcww9bcb0rjEOsNW7DDOeDaPZygZxmJTsGS7u .

name: SkyTree Book Fairs
subject: The Election's Over... Now What?
body:
Let’s get back to what’s important: family values

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zso6h1mmmf2k4j3irhvvvb7i104fjlq21tdtb65o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Now that the election is over, many people are thinking, _“What now?”_

At SkyTree Book Fairs, we continue to teach kids morals and family values!

Now more than ever, it is important to foster personal responsibility, civic duty, and the preservation of traditional principles in the next generation.

If this election has shown us anything, it’s that we have to get back to promoting family values and morals within our communities.

SkyTree provides the perfect way to do this through our fun and engaging book fairs.

**Our school book fairs provide an enriching educational experience that promotes wholesome and developmentally appropriate literature.**

Parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians can rest assured that we review every book in our collection to ensure it is free of harmful messaging, foul language, and other inappropriate content.

**You can help SkyTree uphold family, community, and educational values by donating today to support our book fairs. Click below to donate now.**
[Donate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztvh7lb0k3br5dl903nel61onlhnm9pes68q1a0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs was founded to champion wholesome content that promotes integrity, respect, and a strong moral foundation for future generations.

This approach is so popular that in just 12 short months, we’ve...
* Hosted over 180 book fairs in 35 states.
* Impacted the lives of over 86,563 children and families.
* Expanded to a new warehouse.
* Developed relationships with 35+ publishing partners.

_Why is our approach so popular?_ The answer is simple.

**SkyTree book fairs are just like the wholesome book fairs you remember when you were younger: free from confusing or inappropriate content and filled with beloved classics along with new and engaging characters. **

You can help us provide an uplifting experience that lets kids remain kids by donating today.
[Donate $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8m1r81lkdjt32c5p737ugeu9hemb12qcu3qm58_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfdg8s4ut2jjjb1d8curfd88ts9mblbm8jhv7eb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5fiqpnrlcd7fp45cbok7vde4tjbminccllg24a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zak5qk5a5b9i6hh78sj8n6fkerdlens71ieb6p80_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd6tipqpobchulqi733d6f9sraffbi8agttrg1po_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1cd9bkae49jj9nfgrhfskm16u88qb1dtp0793lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf1tljs8icr36972t54f4navreltpsbojrmtppgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)

[Donate Other Amount](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk8edurr3nd5cft13n6oa9o30452pv5m17mv5q1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)
Friend, the future depends on today’s children.

**But it’s up to you and me to protect their innocence, develop their moral character, and provide a solid foundation upon which to build their lives.**

SkyTree Book Fairs strives to be the national leader in educational initiatives that inspire lifelong learning and build strong community and familial connections.

By providing wholesome and engaging books to future generations, we will see a positive change in our culture and our politics.

**Donate today to provide children with an enriching and supportive educational environment and help them realize their potential. Click below to make your tax-deductible contribution now.**
[Donate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlaj5gf1rf2qjccnhbg0k0496mrtcmqflc1oeshg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5j61o36c9h2bs)
Thank you in advance for your support.

SkyTree Book Fairs

name: Dave Min
subject: Update from CA-47: Victory hinges on us counting every vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Hi Peter – Dave Min here, Democratic nominee in California’s 47th Congressional District. I wanted to give you an update on my race here in CA-47:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc4d7cae-8192-4cc8-9e86-674a48db044b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter – Dave Min here, Democratic nominee in California’s 47th Congressional District. I wanted to give you an update on my race here in CA-47: It’s currently still too close to call. From the moment I launched this campaign, we knew it was going to be a tight race. And right now, my team and I are still working to ensure every vote is counted. Bottom line, Peter: This race isn’t over. There are tens of thousands of outstanding ballots yet to be counted in this race, and ensuring that every eligible vote is counted will be a long but important process. [That’s why I am reaching out today: We need the resources to ensure that every vote in this race is counted: Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my legal fund so we can protect the vote in California’s 47th district?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b51e38c-c9a4-4690-ae21-19eed29c0a22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7a8e24d-8064-4b75-a8a7-ffa08350a5bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The greatest strength of this campaign is our grassroots team, and we’re so grateful for everyone who’s joined. But right now, the stakes of winning couldn’t be any higher. It is more important than ever to send proven fighters to Congress and take back the House Majority to hold President Trump accountable. We believe that when every vote is counted, we’ll have what it takes to win – but that’s why we need your support today to count every vote. [So can you help us out? Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my legal fund today to help us count every vote and ensure Democrats can take back the House?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00abfba8-281a-4c77-802f-f2def3099553/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) All the best, Dave [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b5a7214-c44c-4833-9f79-b32d0d49c6f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241112_vote_b2_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00517b1c-18b9-4430-be95-0d7cafe8a068/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

USO Supporter,
This is not the update we wanted to send, but unfortunately, we missed our $100,000 Veterans Day goal.
As one of our most dedicated supporters, we know you wouldn't want to miss out on this opportunity to make your gift for service members worth twice as much thanks to our partners at the NFL. **[So please, will you show your gratitude for our heroes by making a gift of $29 or more that will be DOUBLED in value to support our service members in honor of Veterans Day?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/rjbeH2Kk~LfW/dHJqL0N6WTFQVyswSWZFUkpSMGhQVFZEWEtSencvckRMbVdaaFRFSmZlTnFzV3JZbEkyQzMrQm1TWmpyTWhPRGlHYXMvN0RlTVZmMEVlVUUybmtzOFl2OGIrNTVBTjZiVktvcVBUT1EzeEk9S0/ZC9INzRXcVVDcVJMcEFYUjdGekc0SXVzMjFiT3p5ZVZWQWlDVis1TVlqdUdLWWJxL3Z2Q2dIaXZ3N0RQSzZMTm9MTWFYdkpKYXJqTEx2aUdwRHVtd0ljZEUrZWt4eG9pS0)
---
Since 1941, the USO has been beside our service members for every step of their military journey to provide them with critical supplies, holiday meals and connections to home.
But none of our efforts are possible without the generosity of Americans like you. And right now, we need your urgent help to close the gap before our extended Veterans Day goal deadline at midnight so that we can keep providing our service members with what they need to be their best.
**[Please: Rush an immediate MATCHED donation of $29 (becomes $58!) or more now to provide critical resources for our military heroes who put themselves in harm's way to protect us. Time is running out, and this rare match offer will end soon.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-)**
[RUSH $29 (BECOMES $58)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)
---
[RUSH $58 (BECOMES $116)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $116 (BECOMES $232)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DOUBLE MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/jbd6CAg_W6Cb/dHJqL0N6WTFQVyswSWZFUkpSMGhQVFZEWEtSencvckRMbVdaaFRFSmZlTnFzV3JZbEkyQzMrQm1TWmpyTWhPRGlHYXMvN0RlTVZmMEVlVUUybmtzOFl2OGIrNTVBTjZiVktvcVBUT1EzeEk9S0/ZC9INzRXcVVDcVJMcEFYUjdGekc0SXVzMjFiT3p5ZVZWQWlDVis1TVlqdUdLWWJxL3Z2Q2dIaXZ3N0RQSzZMTm9MTWFYdkpKYXJqTEx2aUdwRHVtd0ljZEUrZWt4eG9pS0)
---
It's times like these when your support matters most. Thank you so much for being there for our service members.
--The USO

name: Qasim Rashid, Esq.
subject: How Joe Biden Can Still Slow MAGA Fascism & Save American Lives
body:
In his final two months in office, Biden can make seismic changes to help tens of millions of Americans -- but will he have the courage to act?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..M9E-Cxj0WL0S1Y0rZ6kqRgDQBZ3LMGtC9xLVJt3H1-c?) for more
