---
Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription!
* * *
# [How Joe Biden Can Still Slow MAGA Fascism & Save American Lives](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151378609&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzc4NjA5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE0MjEwMDAsImV4cCI6MTczNDAxMzAwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OtcVlbC4qNYMlHsc8aYTIMhZIezQoMbAV4iU0sOamlg)
### In his final two months in office, Biden can make seismic changes to help tens of millions of Americans -- but will he have the courage to act?
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151378609&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzc4NjA5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTQyMTAwMCwiZXhwIjoxNzM0MDEzMDAwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.o7AsyZs5F0ObNVkrFVxOjQ8NwIwtWeyPjVLiG4ogeZ8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151378609&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzc4NjA5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE0MjEwMDAsImV4cCI6MTczNDAxMzAwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OtcVlbC4qNYMlHsc8aYTIMhZIezQoMbAV4iU0sOamlg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151378609&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzc4NjA5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE0MjEwMDAsImV4cCI6MTczNDAxMzAwMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OtcVlbC4qNYMlHsc8aYTIMhZIezQoMbAV4iU0sOamlg)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9ob3ctam9lLWJpZGVuLWNhbi1zdGlsbC1zbG93LW1hZ2E_.pw5P6ZK4LEuzaHIq0gn-pVhiwH4f7i6uQCkPi6Tj27U?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/how-joe-biden-can-still-slow-maga?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
Today we receive the terrible news that [Republicans will retain the House majority](https://substack.com/redirect/97be956f-1461-46a8-a6c3-acec4f596d6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), meaning that Democrats have handed Donald Trump a trifecta government--again. Make no mistake. This will be devastating for human and civil rights over the next two years and beyond. Right now, with fascism on the rise and the lives and freedoms of millions at risk, it is not enough for Democrats to simply "stand up." They need to _fight_ -- and so does President Biden.
Every single tool at Biden's disposal should be used to slow down Trump's MAGA agenda. What are these tools, and perhaps just as importantly, what exactly is stopping Biden from taking these vital actions right now? **Let 's Address This.**
I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FRWkhsk-Mq98Kd_-6aONjC79i0nMD4tWE6puaAovx1Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151378609)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b20a1fd6-c4b6-4f62-8c6b-f61c17a0aa4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Biden calls Trump a fascist. If he truly believes that, then rather than [simply invite Trump to the White House for a meet and greet](https://substack.com/redirect/376b2269-7ae8-4523-b94b-f91756b5bc14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he should act with urgency to build protections for the people Trump will try to hurt. Here's what that looks like.
### Actions Biden Could Take Now, If He's Willing to Fight
1. **Protect Abortion Access Nationwide**

As I've written in painful detail before, [we have a national health crisis in abortion access](https://substack.com/redirect/fa56fdab-f40f-4e51-a602-a2bdc02ec90f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with devastating effects on women's health, safety, and autonomy. Biden could issue an executive order protecting abortion access nationally and saving lives in the meantime. While such an order might only be in place temporarily, even a short-term reprieve means more women would be able to access essential care, protecting their lives and well-being. And if your response to this proposal is--"won't Trump just repeal Biden's executive order on Day 1 in office?" I address that extremely valid point below. For now, let us recognize that even affording women another two months to prepare for a potential national abortion ban will be life saving.
2. **Cancel All Student Debt & Cap Rates at 1%**

Biden has the authority, through the Department of Education, to cancel student debt. He has already [used that authority to cancel $175B in student debt](https://substack.com/redirect/fb6449c9-d3de-4937-b9c0-35f6d89f7968?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Now, he has the opportunity to cancel it all--just as he promised when he ran for President in 2020. [As I wrote for NBC](https://substack.com/redirect/ca67b27e-7c05-4a1f-babe-06583dfc3952?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), cancelling student debt will increase GDP, strengthen the economy, create up to 1.5 million new jobs, increase home buying and enable parents to afford to have more children, help level the playing field in the current racial economic injustices Black and Latino students face, and decrease depression and suicide rates. Biden can provide these benefits literally with the swipe of a pen. Indeed as [The Debt Collective further points out](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d58d1f-e37f-4a51-ba58-d5292cff6cb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> A lot of people on the right don't seem to understand this but it's actually quite simple: student debt cancelation doesn't require that any money be drawn from the Treasury. Your taxes aren't "going up" because of student debt relief. It's just simply not true. The money has already. gone. out. the door. When people are forced to borrow from the government, the money is disbursed *then.* Canceling debt that has existed for 10, 20 and 50+ years is simply not requiring money to be paid back that was NEVER going to be repaid anyway.
Again, some may argue that Trump would likely try to roll this back -- but if so, let's force him to make that choice publicly. Imagine Trump explaining to the 40 million Americans shackled by $1.7 trillion in exploitative debt that he plans to reinstate that burden while simultaneously cancelling $2 trillion in taxes for the wealthiest Americans?
3. **End All Arms to Netanyahu**

Biden must end the U.S. supply of arms to Israel under Netanyahu. Not only does Netanyahu's administration violate U.S. and international law, [but Biden's own State Department has confirmed this](https://substack.com/redirect/e9197600-d855-44ef-83cd-1d41a45d12d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The election is behind us, so there exists not even a political excuse any longer. Stop funding genocide, Mr. President. Uphold constitutional and international human rights law. Do it because it's right. Do it because our government must stop funding war crimes against Palestinians. Do it because the American people expect moral leadership, not complicit silence.
4. **Preserve Civil Service and Prevent Military Deployments on Civilians**

President Biden can also steps to secure the civil service from political interference, update and strengthen the Posse Comitatus Act ("PCA"). Most people have never heard of this piece of legislation because it has not been relevant in 150 years beyond combatting drug trafficking. But sadly, it will be critical to prevent Trumpian fascism from expanding use of the PCA--[especially as he promises to deploy the military to quell civil and peaceful protest](https://substack.com/redirect/38214382-f306-490a-890a-fc33f6c0ce49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As the Department of Justice [explains](https://substack.com/redirect/afeba4ef-5e49-496c-b905-710c735ba403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The Posse Comitatus Act of 1878, which removed the military from regular civil law enforcement, was enacted in response to the abuses resulting from the extensive use of the army in civil law enforcement during the Civil War and the Reconstruction. The Act allows legislated exceptions.
Those exceptions currently largely revolve around drug enforcement. Biden must work to pass additional restrictions, however possible, to prevent the military from being misused, and work with the Pentagon to ensure the military cannot be turned into a personal security force by future administrations.
5. **Commute the Death Penalty for Federal Prisoners**

Right now there are roughly 2500 people on federal death row. When Trump was last in office, he lifted the moratorium on executions, and now that he's returning to the White House, there is little doubt that the "pro life" President will execute as many of those 2500 people as possible. [As I've written before](https://substack.com/redirect/2466a735-0f8a-407f-9eaf-6551842be8f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we must abolish the death penalty in the United States because it is unjust, it executes innocent people, it is extremely costly and wasteful, and it does nothing to actually make our communities safer.
President Biden could take the federal death row prisoners off of death row before Trump reinstates federal executions. He could commute the executions of each person and relegate them to life in prison. This act alone would prevent further exploitation of people's lives for political gain. Again, this is literally the swipe of a pen away.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FRWkhsk-Mq98Kd_-6aONjC79i0nMD4tWE6puaAovx1Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151378609)
### But won't Trump repeal each EO on Day 1 in Office?
Now let's address the elephant in the room, and I don't mean Donald Trump. Many argue that these executive orders could be overturned by the next administration. And yes, technically, that's true. But I ask you to first consider three critical facts.
First, temporary isn't the same as ineffective. These actions would provide crucial breathing room, relief, and protection for millions of Americans over the next two months while laying down a strong marker against Trump's agenda. Protecting human rights by delaying injustice is a good thing, actually.
Which brings me to the second point--we've already seen the power of organizing against injustice. For example, after Trump enacted his bigoted "Muslim ban" in January of 2017, the people's resistance delayed its full implementation for over a year by keeping the order in federal litigation. That hard-won delay, from January 2017 to June 2018, wasn't a miracle; it was a direct result of people showing up and pushing back, and it saved lives. We need that same fighting spirit today. Eventually, that effective organizing resulted in the "No Ban Act," which forbids faith based discrimination in travel.
And finally, force the judicial conundrum that will emerge from an executive order protecting abortion access nationwide. For example, consider the judicial impact of an executive order to protect abortion rights nationally. Republicans have already gutted Roe under the absurd theory that abortion should be a States issue. A national abortion protection order would force Republicans to argue again that since Dobbs ruled that abortion should be dealt with at the state level--a national abortion protection executive order is invalid. The right wing Supreme Court would be forced to confirm this once more. This would open up a unique opportunity to legally challenge any future national abortion ban--[a proposal Republicans have made clear they intend to enact](https://substack.com/redirect/549d4f8f-8bcb-48d4-8d1d-8f004c85ec2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
So if and when Republicans try to implement a national ban, Democrats could take a page out of the right wing playbook, go to the most progressive district courts, and seek a ruling that such a ban violates the "state rights principle" established in Dobbs. This would place the six conservative justices in a bind: uphold state control of abortion access, or rule in favor of a national ban? A ruling of a national ban would undermine Roe altogether or mean Biden's executive order was valid. A repeal of a national ban would ensure left leaning states can continue to protect abortion rights. Meanwhile, the time it would take to navigate through the court system would still afford women more time to ensure they can receive the critical reproductive healthcare they need.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FRWkhsk-Mq98Kd_-6aONjC79i0nMD4tWE6puaAovx1Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151378609)
### Biden Is the One Stopping Biden
The bottom line is that we need fighters in the Democratic Party who understand the stakes and refuse to simply watch the country's democratic values be stripped away. In truth, the only one stopping Joe Biden from acting is Joe Biden. This is not the time for hesitation -- it is the time for decisive, bold action that shows the American people that their President will fight for them. He's got nothing to lose, while the American people have everything to lose
Imagine the possibilities if Biden were to go all-in on defending our rights? Imagine him standing up against a second Trump term by preserving basic human rights and protections that the American people have fought so hard to secure? Every bit of progress counts, and slowing down Trump's fascism is worth every effort.
It is long past time for Biden to act -- for the present, for the future, and for every American counting on a government by, of, and for the people, that fights for their freedom and dignity. Let us demand he rise to this challenge and have the courage to act.

body:
Ted is fired up for the incredible opportunity before us. Read more >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,
It's been a week since Election Day 2024 - a monumental moment in time that will go down in history - and we're so grateful for your support to get the job done in a big way for our conservative movement here in the Lone Star State.

Ted prevailed by 9 points over Colin Allred and the woke-left Democrat campaign machine to Keep Texas Red.

These victory margins are significantly higher than in previous elections...

**Our victory margin this year was more than _3 TIMES HIGHER_ than in 2018!**

Texans have spoken. The American people have spoken.

Voters have rejected the failed Biden-Harris agenda and are backing our Republican fight to get our great nation back on track. Ted is fired up for the incredible opportunity before us.

All of us here at Team Cruz want to express our heartfelt gratitude for your encouragement, prayers, and support this year. Whether you joined our grassroots team, upgraded your team status, volunteered, made a financial contribution, or purchased campaign gear, it made a real impact to fuel our fight.

_**We truly can 't thank you enough and we certainly won't forget it! **_

We'll be sure to keep you posted as we prepare for the battles ahead and we're grateful to know Ted has you and so many other conservative patriots standing behind him.

\- Team Cruz
---

* **2024**

"**Trump flipped these Texas counties to help propel him to victory,** " Houston Chronicle's **Matt Zdun** , **Leila Darwiche** and **Janie Haseman** -- "Voters across the country swung to the right in the 2024 presidential race, [propelling](https://substack.com/redirect/49540da9-d625-43c4-a6ae-1df6cae01804?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Donald Trump** to victory.. He flipped more than 60 counties from blue to red this election cycle compared to 2020 and did better this time around in 90% of the counties where at least 95% of the vote has been tallied.

In Texas, 239 of the state's 254 counties shifted right, a Houston Chronicle analysis of Associated Press voting data shows. Ten of the counties that Biden won in 2020 went to Trump this year, including Williamson and Tarrant Counties -- the two most competitive counties in the state in 2020 -- and a host of counties along Texas's southern border.

Trump won the state by six percentage points, or about 631,000 votes in 2020. He defeated Harris by 14 points this year with a margin of about 938,000 more votes overall, according to the AP tally.

Harris did not outperform Biden in any of the 22 counties where he won four years ago.

The colors on the map show change from 2020.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/084a99a6-ee8c-4bb9-b413-e11f65061d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Counties along Texas's southern border have seen some of the starkest political change over time.

For example, Starr County, a county of about 66,000 people in the Rio Grande Valley, has voted for Democrats in [every presidential election since 1896](https://substack.com/redirect/5f5105c8-d2f0-4d8d-b1d7-b9aa5a93ac20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the longest voting streak in the country. It voted for President **Barack Obama** over Republican **Mitt Romney** by 73 points in 2012, which was the largest Democratic victory of any county in the state that year. That blue edge shrank over the following eight years. In 2020, the county handed Biden the victory over Trump by only five points.

This year, however, the county bucked its more than 100-year voting history, choosing Trump over Harris by a whopping 16-point margin. Neighboring counties saw similar trends.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/084a99a6-ee8c-4bb9-b413-e11f65061d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Williamson County in the Austin metro area and Tarrant County in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area handed Trump slight victories over Harris this year: three points and five points, respectively.

Both counties were solidly red in 2012, with over two-digit margins. In subsequent elections, the margins appeared to be getting less red before the counties both flipped in 2020. But they didn't stay blue for long, returning to their red roots in this presidential election.

The president isn't chosen by who wins counties or towns. In most cases, electoral votes are assigned based on the popular vote statewide. However, local numbers and trends can help us understand how a candidate claimed victory in a state.

Nationally, Harris failed to build on**Joe Biden 's** margins even in blue counties. In counties (or towns, for Connecticut) where she won, her victory was slimmer than Biden's 2020 win by an average of about 5,500 votes. That added up to a loss of 2.5 million votes in blue counties alone.

Trump, on the other hand, saw stronger vote margins this year in counties he won in 2020. He received an extra 600 votes on average in these areas, collecting 1.6 million more votes there overall.

Texas saw this trend play out as well, with Harris gaining more ground in only six of the state's 254 counties." [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/6da9f5bf-8826-4736-92d6-96285991cf83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) 2024 "Trump flipped these Texas counties to help propel him to victory, " Houston Chronicle's Matt Zdun , Leila Darwiche and Janie Haseman -- "Voters across the country swung to the right in the 2024 presidential race, Donald Trump to victory.. He flipped more than 60 counties from blue to red this election cycle compared to 2020 and did better this time around in 90% of the counties where at least 95% of the vote has been tallied. In Texas, 239 of the state's 254 counties shifted right, a Houston Chronicle analysis of Associated Press voting data shows. Ten of the counties that Biden won in 2020 went to Trump this year, including Williamson and Tarrant Counties -- the two most competitive counties in the state in 2020 -- and a host of counties along Texas's southern border. Trump won the state by six percentage points, or about 631,000 votes in 2020. He defeated Harris by 14 points this year with a margin of about 938,000 more votes overall, according to the AP tally. Harris did not outperform Biden in any of the 22 counties where he won four years ago. The colors on the map show change from 2020. Counties along Texas's southern border have seen some of the starkest political change over time. For example, Starr County, a county of about 66,000 people in the Rio Grande Valley, has voted for Democrats in , the longest voting streak in the country. It voted for President Barack Obama over Republican Mitt Romney by 73 points in 2012, which was the largest Democratic victory of any county in the state that year. That blue edge shrank over the following eight years. In 2020, the county handed Biden the victory over Trump by only five points. This year, however, the county bucked its more than 100-year voting history, choosing Trump over Harris by a whopping 16-point margin. Neighboring counties saw similar trends. Williamson County in the Austin metro area and Tarrant County in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area handed Trump slight victories over Harris this year: three points and five points, respectively. Both counties were solidly red in 2012, with over two-digit margins. In subsequent elections, the margins appeared to be getting less red before the counties both flipped in 2020. But they didn't stay blue for long, returning to their red roots in this presidential election. The president isn't chosen by who wins counties or towns. In most cases, electoral votes are assigned based on the popular vote statewide. However, local numbers and trends can help us understand how a candidate claimed victory in a state. Nationally, Harris failed to build onJoe Biden 's margins even in blue counties. In counties (or towns, for Connecticut) where she won, her victory was slimmer than Biden's 2020 win by an average of about 5,500 votes. That added up to a loss of 2.5 million votes in blue counties alone. Trump, on the other hand, saw stronger vote margins this year in counties he won in 2020. He received an extra 600 votes on average in these areas, collecting 1.6 million more votes there overall. Texas saw this trend play out as well, with Harris gaining more ground in only six of the state's 254 counties." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. * **2024**

"**Trump flipped these Texas counties to help propel him to victory,** " Houston Chronicle's **Matt Zdun** , **Leila Darwiche** and **Janie Haseman** -- "Voters across the country swung to the right in the 2024 presidential race, [propelling](https://substack.com/redirect/08b648ee-d654-4cdf-8a2c-5894d29bcbf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Donald Trump** to victory.. He flipped more than 60 counties from blue to red this election cycle compared to 2020 and did better this time around in 90% of the counties where at least 95% of the vote has been tallied.

In Texas, 239 of the state's 254 counties shifted right, a Houston Chronicle analysis of Associated Press voting data shows. Ten of the counties that Biden won in 2020 went to Trump this year, including Williamson and Tarrant Counties -- the two most competitive counties in the state in 2020 -- and a host of counties along Texas's southern border.

Trump won the state by six percentage points, or about 631,000 votes in 2020. He defeated Harris by 14 points this year with a margin of about 938,000 more votes overall, according to the AP tally.

Harris did not outperform Biden in any of the 22 counties where he won four years ago.

The colors on the map show change from 2020.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/2ba1372d-e8b9-47ee-90bd-58017df83670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Counties along Texas's southern border have seen some of the starkest political change over time.

For example, Starr County, a county of about 66,000 people in the Rio Grande Valley, has voted for Democrats in [every presidential election since 1896](https://substack.com/redirect/c197be8f-f335-47a4-ba18-8b83a70d720d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the longest voting streak in the country. It voted for President **Barack Obama** over Republican **Mitt Romney** by 73 points in 2012, which was the largest Democratic victory of any county in the state that year. That blue edge shrank over the following eight years. In 2020, the county handed Biden the victory over Trump by only five points.

This year, however, the county bucked its more than 100-year voting history, choosing Trump over Harris by a whopping 16-point margin. Neighboring counties saw similar trends.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/2ba1372d-e8b9-47ee-90bd-58017df83670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Williamson County in the Austin metro area and Tarrant County in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area handed Trump slight victories over Harris this year: three points and five points, respectively.

Both counties were solidly red in 2012, with over two-digit margins. In subsequent elections, the margins appeared to be getting less red before the counties both flipped in 2020. But they didn't stay blue for long, returning to their red roots in this presidential election.

The president isn't chosen by who wins counties or towns. In most cases, electoral votes are assigned based on the popular vote statewide. However, local numbers and trends can help us understand how a candidate claimed victory in a state.

Nationally, Harris failed to build on**Joe Biden 's** margins even in blue counties. In counties (or towns, for Connecticut) where she won, her victory was slimmer than Biden's 2020 win by an average of about 5,500 votes. That added up to a loss of 2.5 million votes in blue counties alone.

Trump, on the other hand, saw stronger vote margins this year in counties he won in 2020. He received an extra 600 votes on average in these areas, collecting 1.6 million more votes there overall.

Texas saw this trend play out as well, with Harris gaining more ground in only six of the state's 254 counties." [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/9c603db8-1dbc-434d-8c0c-d41ec6fee184?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) 2024 "Trump flipped these Texas counties to help propel him to victory, " Houston Chronicle's Matt Zdun , Leila Darwiche and Janie Haseman -- "Voters across the country swung to the right in the 2024 presidential race, Donald Trump to victory.. He flipped more than 60 counties from blue to red this election cycle compared to 2020 and did better this time around in 90% of the counties where at least 95% of the vote has been tallied. In Texas, 239 of the state's 254 counties shifted right, a Houston Chronicle analysis of Associated Press voting data shows. Ten of the counties that Biden won in 2020 went to Trump this year, including Williamson and Tarrant Counties -- the two most competitive counties in the state in 2020 -- and a host of counties along Texas's southern border. Trump won the state by six percentage points, or about 631,000 votes in 2020. He defeated Harris by 14 points this year with a margin of about 938,000 more votes overall, according to the AP tally. Harris did not outperform Biden in any of the 22 counties where he won four years ago. The colors on the map show change from 2020. Counties along Texas's southern border have seen some of the starkest political change over time. For example, Starr County, a county of about 66,000 people in the Rio Grande Valley, has voted for Democrats in , the longest voting streak in the country. It voted for President Barack Obama over Republican Mitt Romney by 73 points in 2012, which was the largest Democratic victory of any county in the state that year. That blue edge shrank over the following eight years. In 2020, the county handed Biden the victory over Trump by only five points. This year, however, the county bucked its more than 100-year voting history, choosing Trump over Harris by a whopping 16-point margin. Neighboring counties saw similar trends. Williamson County in the Austin metro area and Tarrant County in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area handed Trump slight victories over Harris this year: three points and five points, respectively. Both counties were solidly red in 2012, with over two-digit margins. In subsequent elections, the margins appeared to be getting less red before the counties both flipped in 2020. But they didn't stay blue for long, returning to their red roots in this presidential election. The president isn't chosen by who wins counties or towns. In most cases, electoral votes are assigned based on the popular vote statewide. However, local numbers and trends can help us understand how a candidate claimed victory in a state. Nationally, Harris failed to build onJoe Biden 's margins even in blue counties. In counties (or towns, for Connecticut) where she won, her victory was slimmer than Biden's 2020 win by an average of about 5,500 votes. That added up to a loss of 2.5 million votes in blue counties alone. Trump, on the other hand, saw stronger vote margins this year in counties he won in 2020. He received an extra 600 votes on average in these areas, collecting 1.6 million more votes there overall. Texas saw this trend play out as well, with Harris gaining more ground in only six of the state's 254 counties." | | | Now that Trump has won the election, January 6th rioters are [expecting](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0db383fc-9fc7-47d6-9f83-dd8f477ade74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) him to pardon them when he takes office. Trump called the rioters "patriots" while campaigning and said they were "political prisoners." To this we say, NO WAY! The rioters brought chaos and destruction upon our Capitol, beat police officers, sought out members of Congress who they threatened to attack and kill, and tried to overturn the results of a free and fair election, all in Trump's name. They deserve to be held accountable to the fullest extent of the law. **[Sign your name to demand NO PARDONS for January 6th rioters>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T100794a9-f48e-461d-b287-7fa75904b5c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: The Fight Continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral]
Hi Friend,
Now that we are a week out from the election, I wanted to share with you some of my thoughts on what happened and, more importantly, what comes next. Before I do, please know that I am here for you - whether you are my constituent or not - and I want to hear your concerns. If you have any questions, thoughts to share, or if you need assistance, please respond with them to this email. We need each other more than ever and I am ready to work with and stand with each of you.
Last Tuesday was gut-wrenching . To move from the hope and excitement of working so hard to elect an eminently qualified woman - our first Black and South Asian woman - to the reality of facing a second term of Trump was absolutely heartbreaking. Like so many of you, I am working through my feelings and trying to figure out where we went wrong. It should be no surprise that I have been focusing on the available data and I have faith that we will recalibrate once a clear picture of this election emerges.
While we continue to analyze the available data, there are some things that I am clear about. First, it is important to acknowledge and appreciate the enormous amount of work that so many of us poured into this 107 day sprint to elect Kamala Harris. This work mattered and is an essential component of our democracy. When ready, we must continue to talk to our neighbors. We must continue to stay engaged.
Second, we need to do a better job communicating . We are competing against organized and well-funded systems pushing fake news and misinformation and, unfortunately, they are not going away any time soon. We need clear consistent messaging and engagement - NOT just during election season - and people need to be heard and responded to in an accessible way. We need to deepen our engagement with our neighbors and commit to the difficult relational organizing that allows people to be heard and allows us to respond to the needs of our neighbors. Having been through many elections, I know that there are far too many in our communities that are not being heard.
Third, we must each focus on what we can do for our neighbors and for our country. I am heartened by the knowledge that Philadelphia can and MUST continue to be a beacon for America . I am grateful for the power that you have entrusted in me to fight for the people of Philadelphia. I am focusing in on how I can best stand as a legislator to fight for the well-being and safety of Philadelphians during these uncertain times.
There will be no escaping the national fights on the horizon, but we must also resolve to focus locally - on our families, friends, and neighborhoods.
Together, we must resolve to stand firm on our values and fight for our communities. I am prepared and I am grateful that we stand with each other.
Nina
Please donate $25, $50, $100, $1000 or more to help me continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmY1ZTE3NTQtMDNhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AeMlqcwD_3-QHof0lgibaWJiMlbV6cB1LwyKBC99-KY=]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I will head to the United States Senate to represent Arizona and ensure that your voice is heard.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter — we did it.
I will head to the United States Senate to represent Arizona and ensure that your voice is heard.
You know my story. You know I never thought I’d make it this far. Growing up poor, the son of immigrants. Working my way through high school to support my mom and my sisters. Trying to survive in Iraq.
To be here, today, the first Latino Senator in Arizona history... It’s so incredibly humbling. And I know that it would not have happened without your support. As tough as this week has been, I hope that you know your support made all the difference in this race.
As hard as I fought to get out of poverty, as hard as I fought in the Marine Corps, as hard as I fought and continue to fight for my family, I will be fighting for you in Washington, DC.
This is for you, Peter.
Thank you to the voters of Arizona for their trust.
And thank you for helping us get here.
Now, the real work begins.
Semper Fi,
Ruben
[JOIN US](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_nov24/?refcode=em241112-1-160e&akid=3557%2E734936%2EG-4PUJ)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers

Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdeh37rujbrqlssol9anpnnbsqb3455d0eabqi50_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5gm0pr2cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk1s5teiu2986s0dqf18evlea68nk52ul9grej28_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5gm0pr2cph2bs)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6gm6kmn4k8fu7vog49772u5sfth3inkv17ujmh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5gm0pr2cph2bs)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp8qssadshqceb4ocm9bksmeqktn32jqf00ged1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5gm0pr2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cpb3cjj6eoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj1f6v8cpcomknr8i0etn0071776ul4lc0ilgr5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c5gm0pr2cph2bs)_

name: Team TFVC
subject: TFVC Tuesday: Turning Election Wins Into Policy Wins
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjExNzkxMjU2MzEyODc5OTcxJmM9Yzl2NiZlPTAmYj0xMzg0MDY3Mjk2JmQ9ZTBxMm0xYg==.ZZRDZzZh82W5MoMKKJU2_V_OriDaRPLGy391wiPTaDk)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| What a wild ride the 2024 election season has been! From heated state legislative primaries that went to tight runoffs, to a Presidential race for the history books, we have ridden a bumpy but exciting roller coaster these past eleven months. Now that it’s all over, we can **enjoy some much-deserved victories** at the local, state and national levels.
**But our work at TFVC is just starting!**
The bill pre-filing period for the 2025 session begins today, and we already have **numerous bill drafts in the hopper** , so to speak. There is much to celebrate but also much to do, so get ready for another exciting legislative session! **It’ll be here before you know it!**

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Why your money story matters & what it says about you
body:
| Hi Peter, What's your money story? What narrative plays in your brain when you think about money? Whatever it is, your parents and upbringing likely shaped that story.1 And that story is the bedrock of your money personality. So, what does that story say about your money personality and mindset?
---
|
---
[**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtBDlgcWkYKpC7dz1jsq3V8p?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Talking about your money story can help you truly understand your financial personality. It can give you an opportunity to identify and work through your negative feelings about money. It can also help form more positive money beliefs — not just for you but for your children and grandchildren too. That can kick off an ongoing dialogue and open up a faster track to building a stronger money mindset.1 [**Want to read more about money mindsets and different financial personalities? Click here to check out the rest.**](https://financeinsights.net/aQYgtBDlgcWkYKpC7dz1jsq3V8p?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IldhTG1GWUQwNHRZM1FrRSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. What's your earliest memory of interacting with money? What happened and what "lesson" did you learn? Hit "reply" and share your story. I'd love to hear more about your early experiences with finance and what has framed your money story.
---
Sources 1\. [https://bigthink.com/sponsored/childhood-money-anxiety/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC9iaWd0aGluay5jb21cL3Nwb25zb3JlZFwvY2hpbGRob29kLW1vbmV5LWFueGlldHlcLyIsImhhc2giOiJXYUxtRllEMDR0WTNRa0UiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)

subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
| | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=177fecdedd61457588e15ba6b460b091&_e=Ofd8gG4NpQNQlP3QNoQgYrKhykS-keaACB-2WXBvRsvBLpwItg6GuAFMsnsqA1Tfej-0B7bNvPX229h3qOPBUQGWJNbOub2U3b3gxKHgSb1JsT6t0YmqMImyUzznShqjteC-841LTNHZ-yoDxM3lBoAg0nuWQCixZ_Djq5xNSmfC0NN0KENQ4-XSjlrWKZMtDFn9tDt9RQEOQWCZwkW9CaL7gDQ-UpKeRgkK6Jm5_EQunO5FhLoAF8BBQ2xBx0vQz_4McqW1VEU77uhJAy5RqDuYPi9zxlxkBTgaYeTpBmA-R0fZ2Ei9iXAKzaipKU8P5icL4LCEaQ2RY2UwWBGsAv-LtxlTXyD8EOoQ6DA1JjvwUY3B94dAKRd92bQ3266cOo2Sht-fsguCqcSb5N__4m4FwLx34-uZnUl8FBjk07a7QT-dKRicuFZ2sVJCNO1nFqqfoEsxEzB9FI0LI1H9Oxvale5WShY30bLmxXhQ_6Cepv5s7BbmoU8RqWH9xnFH)
---
Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=177fecdedd61457588e15ba6b460b091&_e=Ofd8gG4NpQNQlP3QNoQgYrKhykS-keaACB-2WXBvRsvBLpwItg6GuAFMsnsqA1Tfej-0B7bNvPX229h3qOPBUQGWJNbOub2U3b3gxKHgSb1JsT6t0YmqMImyUzznShqjteC-841LTNHZ-yoDxM3lBoAg0nuWQCixZ_Djq5xNSmfC0NN0KENQ4-XSjlrWKZMtDFn9tDt9RQEOQWCZwkW9CaL7gDQ-UpKeRgkK6Jm5_EQunO5FhLoAF8BBQ2xBx0vQz_4McqW1VEU77uhJAy5RqDuYPi9zxlxkBTgaYeTpBmA-R0fZ2Ei9iXAKzaipKU8P5icL4LCEaQ2RY2UwWBGsApEJo595w2Uzi9B_jiiTgVL4TRlhCrgA6du75H7syn8s664WV6HnOCIGT647AAjR8CXLEtnVOYjcKnqDEfFzpzwGznKBeiINIrhdGloUIEeI8fFCDwH0f9zzORWKnTg59AYeHrQxAuQixyfeyMXkLvDbd5j47acAMnJXfi5xMmyq)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=177fecdedd61457588e15ba6b460b091&_e=Ofd8gG4NpQNQlP3QNoQgYrKhykS-keaACB-2WXBvRsvBLpwItg6GuAFMsnsqA1Tfej-0B7bNvPX229h3qOPBUQGWJNbOub2U3b3gxKHgSb1JsT6t0YmqMImyUzznShqjteC-841LTNHZ-yoDxM3lBoAg0nuWQCixZ_Djq5xNSmfC0NN0KENQ4-XSjlrWKZMtDFn9tDt9RQEOQWCZwkW9CaL7gDQ-UpKeRgkK6Jm5_EQunO5FhLoAF8BBQ2xBx0vQz_4McqW1VEU77uhJAy5RqDuYPi9zxlxkBTgaYeTpBmA-R0fZ2Ei9iXAKzaipKU8P5icL4LCEaQ2RY2UwWBGsAhUVcG3oCD4HWwfadGAssQmwUjTCBNWJ0rIAZRh8EXDEVuHDpqxiu3WzAhjPtTIxo1rsrArHnzI_kWZJMUc7dHwQC0S0tAfZOKk1OTovCeH1qUQw1PEExznp5b18cfbhn08xh42xmK_n4pCNnf6U4kOSEdrgs_E5Dh5Je-FHGnXp)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Justice Democrats
subject: This bill is an attack on the pro-Palestine movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Congress is back in session
today, and one of their first acts will be to vote on an incredibly
dangerous bill: H.R. 9495 the so-called “Stop Terror-Financing and Tax
Penalties on American Hostages Act.”

This bill should be a five-alarm fire for anyone who seeks to protect free
speech, civil society, and democracy from the incoming Trump White House.

H.R. 9495 would grant the incoming Trump administration unprecedented and
unchecked power to shut down any nonprofit organization — including social
justice groups, media organizations, universities, and civil liberties
organizations — based on a unilateral accusation of wrongdoing and without
due process.

A version of this bill already passed the House and then stalled in the
Senate last spring. Now, the House has attached it to another unrelated
bill and is looking to vote on it as soon as TODAY.

[ https://act.jewishvoiceforpeace.org/a/tell-house-no-hr-9495?source=jd-em20241112-36141 ]Will you send a message to your members of Congress urging them to vote
NO on H.R. 9495 now?

[ https://act.jewishvoiceforpeace.org/a/tell-house-no-hr-9495?source=jd-em20241112-36141 ]The Intercept: Congress is about to gift Trump sweeping powers to crush
his political enemies. The House is set to vote Tuesday on a bill that
would let the administration destroy nonprofits it claims support
terrorism.

This legislation is part of a broader far-right assault on democracy and
the right to protest, aimed at outlawing the social justice movements
fighting for progressive change—particularly the pro-Palestinian movement.

These MAGA forces often start by attacking Palestinian rights groups and
then use this as a tool to openly attack groups pushing for racial
justice, LGTBTQ+ rights, immigrant rights, and environmental justice by
labeling activists as “terrorists.”

If this bill passes both chambers of Congress, Trump’s Treasury Secretary
would be able to strip nonprofit status from organizations it doesn't like
— without due process. Imagine how this could be used to crush our
progressive movement.

[ https://act.jewishvoiceforpeace.org/a/tell-house-no-hr-9495?source=jd-em20241112-36141 ]Please, send a message to your Congressmembers now before it’s too
late!

[ https://act.jewishvoiceforpeace.org/a/tell-house-no-hr-9495?source=jd-em20241112-36141 ]Take Action

For the sake of our movement, our democracy, and our freedom of speech, we
cannot let this bill become law.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241112-36141-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36141_1203867_p7I4xS&akid=36141%2E1203867%2Ep7I4xS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36141%2E1203867%2Ep7I4xS

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4830%2E552475%2EkDNtUD)

There’s so much we don’t know, but there’s something we still can do to fight back.
**Bob Casey’s Senate race in Pennsylvania is still too close to call.** There are tens of thousands of ballots left to be counted, and Pennsylvanians deserve to have their voices heard.

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Takes Stand as Democrats in Mass Prioritizes Partisanship Over Massachusetts Residents
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BED8fpdxrJL1r56x0PlcgoMWYMCUutoL7cDbco8GUhpkqH4xgKXUfHB-SLd-I11U3fcmSad6KtLAFEMunymraCRn4bryid4YFxvjMACj9hP50nERJ7m-j5ONwHTUYnKeE-xkwygnHsp0ZQFe1M5NmQ==&c=UhZg5TTgieAliHPItHFyxtW1t8dMbpOtMcZim8ea5YQhJcsh0yqzJw==&ch=riSuiM5_sbuORFalQBNAxIYJu1csH6qyaVf9vgAR5XP0C8TVhPKqgg==)
---
| MassGOP Takes Stand as Democrats in Mass Prioritizes Partisanship Over Massachusetts Residents
---
---
| Boston, MA-- In the wake of a historic election for Republicans at both the state and federal levels, Massachusetts Democrats find themselves grappling with widespread criticism and deepening divisions. Following President-elect Trump's decisive victory, Governor Maura Healey declared her refusal to work with the incoming federal administration to address the state's migrant crisis--a stance that has intensified debate across the Commonwealth. Instead, Governor Healey has chosen to "lean into" progressive policies that have only exacerbated the crisis.
Massachusetts Republican Party Executive Director John Milligan responded to Governor Healey's statements, remarking, "Our Democratic leadership, particularly Governor Healey, is failing Massachusetts residents. Rather than working toward a solution with President-elect Trump, she chooses to go on the offensive, attacking the incoming administration. This approach will only harm Massachusetts' chances of securing much-needed federal support."
Milligan continued, "It's astonishingly hypocritical for Governor Healey who has spent the better part of a year and a half shifting blame onto the federal government for the state's migrant crisis and then refuses to collaborate with an administration committed to addressing it. By openly rejecting federal deportation efforts against criminal illegal immigrants, Governor Healey is effectively sending a message that Massachusetts welcomes those who enter the United States unlawfully. No matter how she tries to frame it, this position is incredibly dangerous."
As Massachusetts Democrats assess the recent election results and consider the shift among voters toward conservative principles, Congressman Seth Moulton made an observation about the Democratic Party's growing focus on identity politics. His comments, particularly regarding trans women in sports, reflect a sentiment shared by many across the state and nation. However, Moulton's remarks were met with swift and intense backlash from out of touch and condescending Democratic leaders, who labeled him as a bigot, demanded his resignation, and even saw the Chair of Tufts' political science department threaten to cut ties with his office.
"It's perfectly reasonable for Massachusetts residents to respect gender identity while acknowledging the physical differences that impact fairness and safety in sports," said Milligan. "The Democratic supermajority, rather than examining their policies and listening to the voices of Massachusetts residents, have abandoned common sense and attack anyone who dares to disagree. The residents who don't agree with the Democratic supermajority's extreme stances are neither bigots nor extremists, as Democratic politicians and pundits like to imply--they are logical, reasonable people who have had enough."
Milligan emphasized that Republicans on Beacon Hill and within the MassGOP are prepared to take a stand. "We intend to be vocal this legislative session, holding the Democratic supermajority accountable on issues like the migrant crisis, reckless spending, and overregulation. The people of Massachusetts are fed up with the progressive partisanship, and the MassGOP looks forward to building on our momentum as we gear up to take on Governor Healey, or whoever the Democratic nominee for Governor is in 2026."
###

subject: The House Majority comes down to CA-13

body:
The path for the Democratic House Majority runs through this California race
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbee548e-7eab-48a4-8e1b-3fd15d6fc791/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| CA-13:
Adam Gray (D) vs. John Duarte (R)
TOO CLOSE TO CALL
---
| Peter, Right now, one of the most competitive House races in the country is still too close to call. Former California Assemblymember and Democratic nominee in California's 13th District, Adam Gray, and his extremist opponent remain locked in a dead-heat in a race that could determine the House Majority. With Donald Trump in the White House and extreme Republicans controlling the Senate, a Democratic House Majority would be our last line of defense against the extremist agenda. [Flipping CA-13 and the House Majority blue has never been more important. Will you split a $10 donation between Blue Amp Action and the Adam Gray for Congress recount fund today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfde130d5-3f53-468b-89dc-cfa66b08e060/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In 2022, this district came down to only 564 votes. That’s right, just 564. We know this race is on track to be even closer this time around – and with the House Majority hanging in the balance, we can’t afford to fall short. [Will you split a donation between our team and Adam Gray’s recount fund to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and stay on our path to victory in the House?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T360fc55f-e075-430c-8d93-0809f057d355/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31e78a11-2309-46bb-b42b-dc6d7af290f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Free Thinker Daily Sponsor
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtuszAUhJ_G7II44wuw8OL_G1GpSjaVqKLuANvBikkot5S3r5Km2Y6-c-bTVF0fvFs1S_8zoPVmZADj_xgwT_yjKsv9sG5q5Jsrh73FDC8PcsGTPTcVbXfz6TjvRiuG4rCXXws96Wnt7ZN9VMa2q3y4pek2MlqgItdEVlPKSSAF8ajVxhiVqcTVpFxe8zwRUokqdbXLnIBD5DUSCCICSZkBcdZIgsyQK5C0ecZEci-K3WDt1PrzyQ6m8mGNm0sXBd1OUz_exQqG4mLq-Dw3wc7j71Vz6RiKhzJDsTAU3_nwJsvX-bAyXtwn41tFxzKo989o0Ka_-hD8qFImkuPfl2jR-AkAAP__ExVsnw)

We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **“health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.”** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, “**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
“It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
“Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.”
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

name: John Milligan (MA GOP)
subject: Gov. Healey lost BIG and left MA behind
body:
She’s got little to show...
| | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h0_4L8X3a8dlLvJVXVE8WAbQCrndKvIC603a3XTMPRaWcaLQZvMYoFTp5uvTj1zZO_5tqR_63CTZEoBPkNfWVU_x0TjP1bdOxibR9Na7z6gTD0DQIogVoEhqmRKaFD_YfgdR0BBmyYET3ZwfTVZD6w==&c=q08dGOxtUbZCYfrl1dz7v3aMm1K0YyDBnZnKZvgXw9qLkD9CzsuFCw==&ch=CtxXiclanzGkRIDCP7X-HnWh_VLs_BKd4-M8fT_H1Mqux6skHg8VmQ==)
---
| Peter,
As I reflect on all that we did together to help catapult Republicans to victory across Massachusetts last week, I've realized who the big loser was this Election Day...our very own Gov. Maura Healey!
Gov. Healey threw her weight behind Kamala Harris (LOSS!), against Kelly Ayotte (WRONG!), and to top it off, October's revenue collection was $86,000,000 short of her projections (OUCH!).
Rather than addressing the urgent issues facing Massachusetts - from the costly migrant crisis to affordability and transparency in government - Gov. Healey spent the last few months on the campaign trail in PA and NH, gambling her political capital only to return to MA with nothing to show.
Truth is, not only did Gov. Healey fail on Election Day, her administration and the Democratic Supermajority are failing Massachusetts altogether.
The MassGOP is standing ready to provide a strong alternative come 2026. But I need to know, are you going to stand with us?
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR 2026 SUPPORTER LIST](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h0_4L8X3a8dlLvJVXVE8WAbQCrndKvIC603a3XTMPRaWcaLQZvMYoHXXLDAOUvvbYQCDbVa6CZe0dMhfo9kAZgjk38Mr0KuzBMv8wbceWUwRU2L6c94Los7hdf8p6g7WSBH-qmN0D-DT4vmt0vbrd8276S14zx1csi7MCxh-gaxIOn7kU2r7vzJSovYeJtfC&c=q08dGOxtUbZCYfrl1dz7v3aMm1K0YyDBnZnKZvgXw9qLkD9CzsuFCw==&ch=CtxXiclanzGkRIDCP7X-HnWh_VLs_BKd4-M8fT_H1Mqux6skHg8VmQ==)
---
| Thanks, John
- John Milligan Executive Director, MassGOP
---
|

---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWZJmFZWN4
We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans,
it's a question
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWZJmFZWN4

Friend,

We're in
a moment of national reflection.

And for
many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our
culture, institutions, and daily lives-for the better.

Friend,
over the past year, I wrote my new book, Right Wing Revolution,
as a guide for a return to an America where…

We
are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief
in American Greatness.

We
have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our
Constitution.

We
have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide
spiritual renewal.

We
trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have
to lock our doors at night.

We
bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with
integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for
all Americans.

Can I
send you a FREE copy of Right Wing Revolution to read today? All
I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning
Point USA-and our critically important work to make kids LOVE
AMERICA again.

Make
your gift & get your FREE book

Friend,
I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO OTHER book
you've read from the Right before:

It's
NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between
Left and Right.

It's
NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I
do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

It's
NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference -
instead, its focus is on how all Americans can improve our
country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving
ourselves.

I want to
get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as
possible-which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover
edition for FREE.

All I ask
for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning
Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!

Make
your gift & get your FREE book

In this
defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a
spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to
find all that's possible in the days ahead.

Thank YOU
for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of
Turning Point USA.

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Peter, our work is far from over
body:
| We must make sure every vote is counted and every close race has the support it needs to win.

[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2412?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241112_b1_kh_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-whs-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241112_b1_kh_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-whs-&t=1&akid=269%2E2563979%2EWHNlRS)
Hi Peter, The election outcome isn’t what we wanted, but I will never give up the fight -- the fight for freedom, for opportunity, for fairness, and the dignity of all people. Now is not a time to throw up our hands. This is a time to roll up our sleeves. This is a time to organize, to mobilize, and to stay engaged. And right now, there are still a number of critical races across the country that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. **[We must continue to fight to ensure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard in those elections. That is why I am asking you to contribute $50 to the Harris Fight Fund program today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241112_b1_kh_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-whs-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&countdown=-7&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ak&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241112_b1_kh_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-whs-&refcode2=269_2563979_WHNlRS&akid=269%2E2563979%2EWHNlRS)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/1009?c0=em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024.OpRu0f&refcode=kh_em_fr_20241112_b1_kh_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-whs-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241112_b1_kh_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-whs-&countdown=-7&t=3&akid=269%2E2563979%2EWHNlRS)

body:
We just won a REPUBLICAN TRIFECTA and delivered a stunning rebuke to the Radical Left Democrats.

| |

---
| | | **BREAKING NOW: **
**Republicans officially win control of the House**
It's official.

We just won a REPUBLICAN TRIFECTA and delivered a stunning rebuke to the Radical Left Democrats.

They are furious that Conservatives have a mandate from the American People - in fact, they've already started fundraising to destroy our House Majority at the first chance they get.

We've learned a lot this cycle and are making strategic investments to save our Majority. If you want to make the biggest possible impact with your contribution, being one of the first donors of the new Congress is the best thing you can do.
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkT-L5DAMxT-N0zlEdvxnCxcLS7o9jmPhSqPYnhmD4wyOMtmPf2RgqmvuOoHeT0_S-_3pPzGXXK8_cEmOGvm2eXr4LWDh6-WSQ8bCj1y9GMTIATgIL7voRiOi1F1yYCSMUum3obu5WSsdRj1gCjbKGdXFWCkR7YgQpbVdduccABCgFSjdD9bot_kyop2ViUmzccCSGm093VJL930uOWClhEsf1qUr7kZ035h8Z2JiYtpS2Fvqj1xbiqeCiekU8_OCvCUmpmOt_Lbuz5rJqZ1Ey_XK5Ae1PTGhd1p8wOWO-VqZ_Hit6H--869fX9ADSCOEJ1B2gMFwMEozodO3pxz_A3j6rJVSpdP8wakRf8FM6O-9Pv5udM3F-5FLyZs2bByuC-byfAb9e2IPJ_4EAAD__6OXlkc "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")

We wanted to say **THANK YOU** once again for all your support. None of this would have been possible without your support. Each dollar you contributed, every petition you signed, and every poll you answered helped guide us to victory.

Alongside President Trump and our new Senate Majority, House Republicans will not stop fighting for the American People.

God bless you,
House GOP

Family meals are not as common as they used to be. We know they are important, but it can be hard to find the time. Ken and Linda
Koldenhoven joined the Moms for America Podcast with tips and encouragement for making family meals a priority. Their book
"Connecting Around the Table: Discover the Power of Eating Together as a Family" offers practical solutions for today's parents.
You will come away from the conversation empowered to grow closer as a family. Like, share and subscribe.

5 Tips You Can Use to Make Dinnertime Great Again

Dinnertime isn't what it used to be in our culture. Most families find organizing kids, sports, school, and work schedules more
challenging than ever when trying to preserve the valuable table-time that used to be a staple of American life. It's worth
prioritizing this family touch point, as studies continue to reveal the benefits of good food, conversation, and family
connection. That's why this week, we are sharing some ideas you can use to make dinnertime great again.

clean_body: This week on the Moms for America Podcast - Join Debbie Kraulidis as she discusses the Power of Eating Together as a Family with Ken and Linda Koldenhoven If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] November 12, 2024 • Newsletter The Power of Family Meals Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Family meals are not as common as they used to be. We know they are important, but it can be hard to find the time. Ken and Linda Koldenhoven joined the Moms for America Podcast with tips and encouragement for making family meals a priority. Their book "Connecting Around the Table: Discover the Power of Eating Together as a Family" offers practical solutions for today's parents. You will come away from the conversation empowered to grow closer as a family. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] 5 Tips You Can Use to Make Dinnertime Great Again Dinnertime isn't what it used to be in our culture. Most families find organizing kids, sports, school, and work schedules more challenging than ever when trying to preserve the valuable table-time that used to be a staple of American life. It's worth prioritizing this family touch point, as studies continue to reveal the benefits of good food, conversation, and family connection. That's why this week, we are sharing some ideas you can use to make dinnertime great again. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! subject: Where we go from here

body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville. I'll be honest: I'm outraged right now, and I'm sure you are too. But I want to tell you something.

I've worked in politics a long time. I've experienced my fair share of winning and losing. And in all those decades of experience, the best lesson I've learned boils down to this:**We can't give up now.**

I was 42 years old when I won my first campaign. If I'd quit in any of the years prior, I wouldn't've had that win, and I wouldn't have gone on to work for a young whippersnapper from Arkansas named Bill Clinton.

**[So I'm telling ya, we CAN'T give up now. We've got work to do, MAGA Republicans to stop, and a Senate majority to take back. Please, can you chip in $5 right now to make that happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241112-JamesCarville-WhereWeGo-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241112-JamesCarville-WhereWeGo-Pros-sl1&akid=18906%2E9716520%2EizIZKG)**

| | [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241112-JamesCarville-WhereWeGo-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241112-JamesCarville-WhereWeGo-Pros-sl1&akid=18906%2E9716520%2EizIZKG)
---

Donald Trump, JD Vance, and their whole little gang of MAGA cronies are expecting us -- and counting on us -- to just shrink into a corner and give up. Well, guess what? I ain't giving up. I'm gonna keep fighting like I always have because America is worth fighting for.

Whether you're from the bayous of Louisiana or the mountains of Colorado or the beaches of California or wherever else, you've got a job to do as an American: **Care about your country. Don't let the Republicans get away with Project 2025 or their twisted retribution schemes. So I'm asking you to join me:

****[America's the greatest story ever told, and we need to work to end this coming dark chapter as soon as possible. Can you donate $5 or more right now to take back the Senate from the GOP and keep our progress moving the right way? clean_body: | | | Hey, it's James Carville. I'll be honest: I'm outraged right now, and I'm sure you are too. But I want to tell you something. I've worked in politics a long time. I've experienced my fair share of winning and losing. And in all those decades of experience, the best lesson I've learned boils down to this:We can't give up now. I was 42 years old when I won my first campaign. If I'd quit in any of the years prior, I wouldn't've had that win, and I wouldn't have gone on to work for a young whippersnapper from Arkansas named Bill Clinton. | | Donald Trump, JD Vance, and their whole little gang of MAGA cronies are expecting us -- and counting on us -- to just shrink into a corner and give up. Well, guess what? I ain't giving up. I'm gonna keep fighting like I always have because America is worth fighting for. Whether you're from the bayous of Louisiana or the mountains of Colorado or the beaches of California or wherever else, you've got a job to do as an American: Care about your country. Don't let the Republicans get away with Project 2025 or their twisted retribution schemes. So I'm asking you to join me: If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thanks, James Carville Derivative of by JD Lasica. . name: Edward Byers, Medal of Honor Recipient and Ret. Navy SEAL Master Chief
subject: Fighting for America’s Survival
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=270b83bc2946429a80d506d86eab8d2c&_e=WWnXNS_E6t7nHLECDrSe3fE8-wjvq3EWtvpnxtOxKJkTqr8TSmJF7WzsmO50HZmL-O9XSb_vC4X3T8ipRAu6zdQvPEyCSwqML6kPTEfAUTHeh-aAVaVIitc7UdBLm2Ye3Y23X-r3ZwVPxRlmfEWXsfRXGmi2lJEoLl5fV3rcDkXHkTV5xQci5P8kRXMizadJJBwYpFaOa1nhrgQNs2ERBY_tevtHRDN8bMramGgEsm4Wx_a247zu9tZjH34Xb6eF3v90WEGp9HZUxLIUxOYvAuzXk8SYuQaIh_obn0EzXzlmPAfDcIpOv3TEvlEZircJUF1ybbfCqpPlxGgBTCwGYaZJ2mPOmLm9PGMUXAWYEVY8IO-xZAcNFqBrk2eBdG3O_M9xByluQ8ojtUCZG5MhIP5uzU6_PM8fqjdLIuTsvlk%3D)

Peter,

I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order.

**Mark my words:** The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with.

The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed.

If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people.

We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It's happening in our courts. And it's even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State.

When I served to defend Americans' lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically.

_Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics_.

No one is above the law.

My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[I am personally asking for you to support the Kash Foundation and help us restore trust in our institutions by exposing bad actors. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $250, or any amount today? Click here to give >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=270b83bc2946429a80d506d86eab8d2c&_e=WWnXNS_E6t7nHLECDrSe3fE8-wjvq3EWtvpnxtOxKJkTqr8TSmJF7WzsmO50HZmL-O9XSb_vC4X3T8ipRAu6zdQvPEyCSwqML6kPTEfAUTHeh-aAVaVIitc7UdBLm2Ye3Y23X-r3ZwVPxRlmfEWXsfRXGmi2lJEoLl5fV3rcDkXHkTV5xQci5P8kRXMizadJJBwYpFaOa1nhrgQNs2ERBY_tevtHRDN8bMramGgEsm5UL1ID_qODAf9nHYHAiv--J4RHRu6FPVJoIPZgBpmEwbH__oh0PL1gS65pOkj7KSgDsod5zBMGG1znjIL853dF90qTdVCcUomdzH-BYK4bkAYGozWoTp4PtpqWtwvhCPbZnefxq6FQ8a_QP8EsMELTrOi4kft4MWUq-eKJvUg6j_XoUVuFbRd1ai3-KCfa-4w%3D)
The Kash Foundation works in three main areas:
* Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts
* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover
* Veteran and law enforcement financial support

Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption -- such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O'Boyle, and Marcus Allen.

Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans.
