clean_body: Peter, I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic. This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order. Mark my words: The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with. The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed. If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people. We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It's happening in our courts. And it's even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State. When I served to defend Americans' lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically. Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics. No one is above the law. My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens. The Kash Foundation works in three main areas: Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover Veteran and law enforcement financial support Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption -- such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O'Boyle, and Marcus Allen. Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans. It has been an honor to have been friends with Kash for over a decade now, and I hope you can join me to serve their mission. Now more than ever, our nation needs trust in its institutions, which will only happen by exposing and rooting out bad actors. Thank you, Edward Byers Medal of Honor Recipient and Master Chief Special Warfare Operator (SEAL) USN Ret. The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. | Friend, A few weeks ago, President Joe Biden topped Hillary Clinton's "Deplorables" comment by calling the over 75 Million Americans who support President Donald J. Trump "trash."
This message of calling us all trash resonated with the base, and we proudly owned the title. President Trump even rode in a Trash Truck wearing an orange vest to symbolize his unity with the base in owning the label.
On November 5th, the American people delivered a mandate to the world, creating what has been labeled as the "Greatest Political Comeback in American History" and "A Massive Political Re-Alignment."
In honor of that massive shift, in partnership with the Team Imer PAC, I am thrilled to unveil my latest T-shirt design, capitalizing on the success of the "I'm Voting for the Felon" shirts I launched over the summer before the Republican National Convention.
Introducing the "Deplorable Trash Service" T-Shirt!
We sold 100+ "I'm Voting for the Felon" shirts over the summer, and I am hopeful we can sell just as many of these shirts!

name: Steve Simon
subject: High Turnout, Low Drama
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96981902/511868048/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE4ZDgyZjItMThhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UGl2Ukdo7dofl39MAoXmuhFKmovU_2NMACkaw3mEdIk=) | I want to take a moment to thank you for your continued support - and to give you a quick recap of Minnesota’s successful election. My two goals for Minnesota in the 2024 election were "high turnout and low drama.” I’m pleased to say that’s exactly what we achieved. Once again, we saw a strong voter turnout across Minnesota**(about 76%)** – a testament to Minnesotans' dedication to making their voices heard. We are in the running to once again be #1 in America in voter turnout. _It’s clear that Minnesotans remain committed to the democratic process, and with your help, we worked hard to ensure that every eligible voter had the opportunity to participate in a fair, accurate, and secure election._ Thanks to the efforts of election workers, volunteers, and supporters like you, our election went smoothly with minimal disruptions. This “low drama” outcome is no accident. It’s the result of ongoing, tireless work to uphold election integrity, protect our voting systems, and counter disinformation at every turn. But we couldn’t have done it without you. Whether you contributed financially, shared accurate election information, or encouraged friends and family to vote, your support was essential. _**What’s Next?**_ **This is only the beginning. As we look ahead to 2025, we know the work continues. The strength of our democracy depends on our vigilance, commitment to truth, and determination to protect the rights of every voter.** And with more elections on the horizon, we’re prepared to keep pushing for “high turnout, low drama” every time. _**As your Secretary of State, you have my word that I will continue to work hard for our democracy.**_ Thank you for being a part of this journey and for standing up for a fair and secure democracy in Minnesota. Together, we’ll keep defending the truth and ensuring that Minnesotans can always trust in the power of their vote. With gratitude, Steve PS: The work doesn’t stop here! name: Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: [Pennsylvania] Urgent request re: your ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa)
Hi Peter, we have an urgent request regarding this year’s election. If you voted by mail or you voted a provisional ballot, there may be steps you need to take to make sure your vote is counted. **Step 1: Check your ballot status.** If you voted _by mail_ , visit **[vote.pa.gov/MailBallotStatus](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4429?t=4&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa)** to check if your ballot was received. If the status column reads “Record - Ballot Returned,” then your ballot has been counted. If you voted _in person or voted a provisional ballot_ , you must call your County Board of Elections to check the status of your ballot. Go to **[padems.org/cure](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4430?t=5&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa)** to find the contact information for your county. **Step 2: If needed, make your ballot count.** If there is an issue with your ballot, it’s easy to fix, but you need to act quickly. **The deadline to fix any issues with your ballot is _today_ , Tuesday, November 12th in most counties. Please take action to make sure your vote is counted as soon as possible.** You can find information on how to make your ballot count at [padems.org/cure](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4430?t=6&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa), or reach out to our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-833-728-6837 with any questions. **Step 3: Check in with your friends and family to make sure their ballots are counted.** Make sure that the folks in your community who took the time to vote are set, too – you can forward them this email, or direct them to the Voter Protection Hotline. The Senate race is extremely close, and the stakes in this election could not be higher. With votes still being counted, your vote could make the difference. It’s never been more important to make sure that your vote counts! Thank you, — Tammy Baldwin for Senate
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=4525%2E35263%2EkRBzpa)

name: BREAKING JUST NOW - From House Republicans
subject: It's official: Republicans win control of the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We just won a REPUBLICAN TRIFECTA and delivered a stunning rebuke to the Radical Left Democrats.

| |

---
| | | **BREAKING NOW: **
**Republicans officially win control of the House**
It's official.

We just won a REPUBLICAN TRIFECTA and delivered a stunning rebuke to the Radical Left Democrats.

They are furious that Conservatives have a mandate from the American People - in fact, they've already started fundraising to destroy our House Majority at the first chance they get.

We've learned a lot this cycle and are making strategic investments to save our Majority. If you want to make the biggest possible impact with your contribution, being one of the first donors of the new Congress is the best thing you can do.
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkcGK5CAQhp_G3AypMjHOwcPAENjDLAN72KM4atIFRoOa7nn8JQN92svuraD46q-P__e7ebcUKW0_7R401WpKNe1uqrOR53UlRzbyByWDA44cgAMa6LyeENSquqBhFjCKaXxR3U2P0sMq_eAGVB7Ep0JYvbLzZxB-eMG5I33dAQCEGeQk-8l6BD_JWXin1OrYOJyHty30lCr5UF3Ox5EjNXK1z2Xror61dlQmXhkuDJca3FlC_6BUgu9d3hkuLdidXw5UA8PlkRO_5fN7ZmIpF1EobUy8tXIGhvJsu3F2PyxtiYm355Pm45X_-PUBPYCQYjQNJjXAMHOYJ8lQhi_TyP8H8J2TUwupXeF3TrXyJ8xQfp3p_veiK9ofD4qRqpzZOGy7pXipdu3fO7tr_BMAAP__BaeW9Q "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---

Before we wrap up this email:

We wanted to say **THANK YOU** once again for all your support. None of this would have been possible without your support. Each dollar you contributed, every petition you signed, and every poll you answered helped guide us to victory.

Alongside President Trump and our new Senate Majority, House Republicans will not stop fighting for the American People.

God bless you,
House GOP

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: We can still take back the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friends: I know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses. I am, too. But we still have a chance to take back the House, even by the narrowest margin. Right now, the results are too close to call for us in ten battleground races here in California -- plus others in Alaska, Iowa, and Arizona. We have people in the field making sure every valid vote is counted, but we need to have resources to support our staff doing this work.

Here is the link if you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24]

This fight — so we have a check on Trump — will be expensive and will still take more time. But I promise it's worth it.

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bob Casey needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Pennsylvania is now the frontline
| | |
---
Folks, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5A3wFPLFh1vr4P7BFNVdgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFiU4P0S2aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy9kN2Q3ZTZlNy04N2RjLTRkNWItOWYwNS1kNjYzNDVmMTExYjA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTA4X0JER19CUkFWRV9LSVJLM19FTV9SRVZfUEEtQ0ImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0ItMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZyytkDNnWg947VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5A3wFPLFh1vr4P7BFNVdgw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFiU4P0S2aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy9kN2Q3ZTZlNy04N2RjLTRkNWItOWYwNS1kNjYzNDVmMTExYjA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTA4X0JER19CUkFWRV9LSVJLM19FTV9SRVZfUEEtQ0ImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q0ItMjAyNDExMTJXA3NwY0IKZyytkDNnWg947VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

# [Project 2025: Destroy NOAA](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151558818&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTU4ODE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE0MzMxNzMsImV4cCI6MTczNDAyNTE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BcNUmI8sBQhBWyjD9FG6553w-nUAfz2m3eNIcus-cFY)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151558818&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTU4ODE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE0MzMxNzMsImV4cCI6MTczNDAyNTE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BcNUmI8sBQhBWyjD9FG6553w-nUAfz2m3eNIcus-cFY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151558818&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTU4ODE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzE0MzMxNzMsImV4cCI6MTczNDAyNTE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BcNUmI8sBQhBWyjD9FG6553w-nUAfz2m3eNIcus-cFY)

---

---
The massive, fascist manifesto "Project 2025" details the systemic dismantling of the United States government, written and promoted by Trump associates, and now the working template for Trump's next administration
The aggressive roll-back of human and civil rights and liberties captured most of the media's attention during the election cycle, but at the time it was dismissed as speculative and Trump denied his connection to it.
Now that Trump and members of his administration have admitted they're behind it and will be implementing it, there is a lot of ground to cover in what other horrors await.
I'm going to start with one that is personal for me: **This dismantling of NOAA.**
In less than three full pages1, Project 2025 outlines a plan to dismantle almost all of the National Oceanographic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) and its programs.
NOAA houses the National Weather Service, the National Hurricane Center, the Office of Oceanic and Atmospheric Research, and more.
NOAA serves as the lead government research agency for weather, oceans and climate.
Here's part of what P2025 plans for the agency:
**Eliminate:** National Ocean Service surveying functions, transferring their operations to the USGS. The authors here assume the already underfunded USGS is fully staffed with oceanographers - scientists who specialize in ocean science. Ocean science is not interchangeable with geology. Someone who studies volcanoes is not equipped to conduct research on harmful algal blooms, tides and currents, marine debris, salinity and temperatures, navigation, oceanic and tidal ecosystems, arctic climate, and most of all -- weather. I think all climatologists should take geologic coursework (I did) and have a foundational understanding of its functions, and I have the upmost respect for geologists, but they are not a replacement for ocean and climate scientists.
**Cancel** : The 30x30 Executive Order and Associated America the Beautiful Initiative, which prevents further commercialism and industrial activity in sensitive oceanic environments. The program seeks to restore and conserve at least 30 percent of lands and waters by 2030.
**Neuter:** The Marine Mammal Protection Act and the Endangered Species Act.
**Privatize:** Severe weather predictions and alerts.
The authors of 2025 state, without a hint of irony or self-awareness, "Together, [NOAA] form a colossal operation that has become one of the main drivers of the climate change alarm industry and, as such, **is harmful to future U.S. prosperity**."
Climate change and its impacts pose the single[ greatest threat to national security.](https://substack.com/redirect/4a3538fe-1bf6-4515-ae1f-aeb56ba3777f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The United States [spent $165 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/292a264a-5a9d-4852-9684-bed745d83dc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on climate and weather-related disasters in 2022.
Last year, the U.S. [broke the record](https://substack.com/redirect/27b04ed4-b718-45bc-8020-dabff0bac1a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the number of billion-dollar weather and climate disasters with 28 disasters costing more than $91 billion.
And billion dollar events are becoming [more frequent and severe with time](https://substack.com/redirect/b1e1e5f8-8499-47bf-b718-a97c68bc1c8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac0b8b1e-3928-41fe-abe2-a2587c984733?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For the 10-year period of 2010-2019, 131 weather and climate disasters cost the United States nearly **$1 trillion.**
There have already been 127 billion-dollar disasters costing us $680 billion since 2020, and we're not even halfway through the decade. That figure also doesn't include damages to be paid for Hurricanes Milton and Helene.
Both Hurricane Milton and Helene [are expected to cost ](https://substack.com/redirect/13bf990e-2821-46ca-bfe3-3b103e41bba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)more than [$50 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/219d60d9-7eb9-40cf-9558-63d824126a5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _[each](https://substack.com/redirect/219d60d9-7eb9-40cf-9558-63d824126a5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
Final cost estimates range[ as high as $100-200 billion.](https://substack.com/redirect/87ecb242-1c81-4c21-8ad9-4b595c0ec435?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**NOAA 's entire budget for 2025 is $6.6 billion**.
That's **less than 1%** of what we've spent on climate and weather disasters so far this decade. NOAA is the chief agency tasked with researching and preparing for climate and weather related disasters, both short and long term...

clean_body: The massive, fascist manifesto "Project 2025" details the systemic dismantling of the United States government, written and promoted by Trump associates, and now the working template for Trump's next administration | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | Nov 12 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | The massive, fascist manifesto "Project 2025" details the systemic dismantling of the United States government, written and promoted by Trump associates, and now the working template for Trump's next administration The aggressive roll-back of human and civil rights and liberties captured most of the media's attention during the election cycle, but at the time it was dismissed as speculative and Trump denied his connection to it. Now that Trump and members of his administration have admitted they're behind it and will be implementing it, there is a lot of ground to cover in what other horrors await. I'm going to start with one that is personal for me: This dismantling of NOAA. In less than three full pages1, Project 2025 outlines a plan to dismantle almost all of the National Oceanographic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) and its programs. NOAA houses the National Weather Service, the National Hurricane Center, the Office of Oceanic and Atmospheric Research, and more. NOAA serves as the lead government research agency for weather, oceans and climate. Here's part of what P2025 plans for the agency: Eliminate: National Ocean Service surveying functions, transferring their operations to the USGS. The authors here assume the already underfunded USGS is fully staffed with oceanographers - scientists who specialize in ocean science. Ocean science is not interchangeable with geology. Someone who studies volcanoes is not equipped to conduct research on harmful algal blooms, tides and currents, marine debris, salinity and temperatures, navigation, oceanic and tidal ecosystems, arctic climate, and most of all -- weather. I think all climatologists should take geologic coursework (I did) and have a foundational understanding of its functions, and I have the upmost respect for geologists, but they are not a replacement for ocean and climate scientists. Cancel : The 30x30 Executive Order and Associated America the Beautiful Initiative, which prevents further commercialism and industrial activity in sensitive oceanic environments. The program seeks to restore and conserve at least 30 percent of lands and waters by 2030. Neuter: The Marine Mammal Protection Act and the Endangered Species Act. Privatize: Severe weather predictions and alerts. The authors of 2025 state, without a hint of irony or self-awareness, "Together, [NOAA] form a colossal operation that has become one of the main drivers of the climate change alarm industry and, as such, is harmful to future U.S. prosperity." Climate change and its impacts pose the single The United States on climate and weather-related disasters in 2022. Last year, the U.S. for the number of billion-dollar weather and climate disasters with 28 disasters costing more than $91 billion. And billion dollar events are becoming . | | ---|---|--- For the 10-year period of 2010-2019, 131 weather and climate disasters cost the United States nearly $1 trillion. There have already been 127 billion-dollar disasters costing us $680 billion since 2020, and we're not even halfway through the decade. That figure also doesn't include damages to be paid for Hurricanes Milton and Helene. Both Hurricane Milton and Helene than . Final cost estimates range NOAA 's entire budget for 2025 is $6.6 billion. That's less than 1% of what we've spent on climate and weather disasters so far this decade. NOAA is the chief agency tasked with researching and preparing for climate and weather related disasters, both short and long term... name: Houlahan HQ
subject: [Pennsylvania] Urgent request re: your ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Act TODAY to make sure your vote counts
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96984060/511876333/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg2NzlmYS0xZGExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJAHF9TyPVuxj2cCqhmFnkfsY-2xjMlRiMsrNpU3hgA=&emci=593ecce7-13a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=098679fa-1da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21278485)
---
Hi Derek, we have an urgent request regarding this year’s election.
If you voted by mail or you voted a provisional ballot, there may be steps you need to take to make sure your vote is counted – and today is the deadline to take action.
**Step 1: Check your ballot status.**
If you voted _by mail_ , visit **[vote.pa.gov/MailBallotStatus](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96984061/511876336/-39623499?refcode=jtk1076-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg2NzlmYS0xZGExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJAHF9TyPVuxj2cCqhmFnkfsY-2xjMlRiMsrNpU3hgA=&emci=593ecce7-13a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=098679fa-1da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21278485)** to check if your ballot was received. If the status column reads “Record - Ballot Returned,” then your ballot has been counted.
If you voted _in person or voted a provisional ballot_ , you must call your County Board of Elections to check the status of your ballot. Go to **[padems.org/cure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96984066/511876338/1827236310?refcode=jtk1076-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg2NzlmYS0xZGExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJAHF9TyPVuxj2cCqhmFnkfsY-2xjMlRiMsrNpU3hgA=&emci=593ecce7-13a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=098679fa-1da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21278485)** to find the contact information for your county.
**Step 2: If needed, make your ballot count.**
If there is an issue with your ballot, it’s easy to fix, but you need to act quickly.
**The deadline to fix any issues with your ballot is _today_ , _Tuesday, November 12th_ in most counties. Please take action to make sure your vote is counted as soon as possible.**
You can find information on how to make your ballot count at [padems.org/cure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96984067/511876353/1827236310?refcode=jtk1076-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg2NzlmYS0xZGExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJAHF9TyPVuxj2cCqhmFnkfsY-2xjMlRiMsrNpU3hgA=&emci=593ecce7-13a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=098679fa-1da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21278485), or reach out to our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-833-728-6837 with any questions.
**Step 3: Check in with your friends and family to make sure their ballots are counted.**
Make sure that the folks in your community who took the time to vote are set, too – you can forward them this email, or direct them to the Voter Protection Hotline.
The Senate race is extremely close, and the stakes in this election could not be higher. With votes still being counted, your vote could make the difference. It’s never been more important to make sure that your vote counts!
Thank you,

Team Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

clean_body: Act TODAY to make sure your vote counts | | | Hi Derek, we have an urgent request regarding this year’s election. If you voted by mail or you voted a provisional ballot, there may be steps you need to take to make sure your vote is counted – and today is the deadline to take action. Step 1: Check your ballot status. If you voted by mail , visit to check if your ballot was received. If the status column reads “Record - Ballot Returned,” then your ballot has been counted. If you voted in person or voted a provisional ballot , you must call your County Board of Elections to check the status of your ballot. Go to to find the contact information for your county. Step 2: If needed, make your ballot count. If there is an issue with your ballot, it’s easy to fix, but you need to act quickly. The deadline to fix any issues with your ballot is today , Tuesday, November 12th in most counties. Please take action to make sure your vote is counted as soon as possible. You can find information on how to make your ballot count at , or reach out to our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-833-728-6837 with any questions. Step 3: Check in with your friends and family to make sure their ballots are counted. Make sure that the folks in your community who took the time to vote are set, too – you can forward them this email, or direct them to the Voter Protection Hotline. The Senate race is extremely close, and the stakes in this election could not be higher. With votes still being counted, your vote could make the difference. It’s never been more important to make sure that your vote counts! Thank you, Team Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. Box 222 Devon, PA 19333 United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click . name: Team McCormick
subject: McCormick Campaign Statement on the Outcome of the Senate Race in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

We have a quick update on Dave McCormick's race that we want to share with you.

"McCormick is up 30,679 votes with more to come, as ruby red Cambria County is still outstanding. While votes continue to be counted, any way you slice it, Dave McCormick will be the next United States Senator from Pennsylvania," said Elizabeth Gregory, McCormick communications director.

Your support has played an incredible role in getting Dave this far - from being the underdog with a double-digit deficit to 30,679 votes ahead with more to come. Thank you for all of your help in getting Dave McCormick over the finish line.

name: Derek Tran
subject: CA-45 and the House Majority remain too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | |
---
My friend– It’s Derek Tran.
I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue.
I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race.
**We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call.** This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race.
The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district.
And, folks, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense.
[The way things stand, we need to make sure every vote is counted in order to win, so I have to ask for your support. Will you split a contribution between our legal fund and the NV Dems to help us count every vote? Any contribution would go a long way in making sure every voice is heard.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTOs1BM207NH6FRt4uGTzh1L25IdDYFOdmcvNix4HkQ_OhRR91XcChXRY90g8meGZsAmqugulVLwwbEaReIW3hfU8zM-a4VXkfbo3tCtRfcQHH4nqSsFEsTb7-gjnT_anossM9ktdNGGIPYUc7e-PcYZXyI3cpQPmmnhqAeMbyEVxVbpxWye2XwaoyDGlAdaaz5M_q0VP-b62asrjVtMqo02K84PXhW4sMiO36_tQrIUYhO_PVv5Eib0-wATrwOqoMkJ0SqId3Q995tuFYlfSSfSfexXOVudFS2BPrj-25wgjkn5B_ivQ87k9pzPH6AiSMokyGfq_AIj7YTHSi8qRJbJiLKK7fFeYoIEQ_LNK-fGBGhKgPxFftHfxMAoJXHUEmZjvC5b1rWZKGD3s5a-nmEGjRVZtJ6NIIkv0Xz4GQIU4/4be/L2jVi1MNSOGvHu90mqHHhw/h0/h001._rHQIQIuLf3QbIEdDfHvQkfztTYxT5jEVmKdUwb81Wc)

clean_body: | | | | My friend– It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race. We knew this race would be close, and it’s still currently too close to call. This is a true testament to all the work this team has done to close the margin on this race. The path to the Democratic House Majority is still in reach – and it runs through this district. And, folks, with Trump in the White House, the House Majority would be our last line of defense. name: Genesis Code
subject: Patriot Alert: the next war is already here
body:
|
---
This building...

[ ](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
Is protected by blast-resistant steel doors, reinforced concrete, and 24-hour surveillance.
It’s like a bank vault — on steroids. But what’s inside is **not** money. It’s far more valuable...
[And there’s a good chance you’re about to need the mega-resource that’s inside.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
That’s what one of America’s most fearless investigators is convinced of...
His intel shows that a new war on America has already begun. He says practically no one understands this grave threat...
Or is even remotely prepared for it. So he’s put out an urgent briefing...
[Watch his emergency broadcast now, while there’s still time.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
Wisdom and hope sometimes come from unexpected places...
That’s why what’s inside that “super vault” located just a few hundred miles from the North Pole...
Is the key to a shocking story — and may hold the secret to surviving a looming catastrophe.
What’s behind the door?
[Watch this urgent broadcast now for the full story...](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
Please don’t delay: Big Tech could shut this down at any moment.

[Unsubscribe](https://link.myamericanpatriot.org/click/e12506490/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wc3IubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SbXlhbWVyaWNhbnBhdHJpb3Rfb3JnMjQxMTEy/LbmNsUmx0bDc4/qP2hpZHM9bmMzUHRReGFpWVFrWGxz/gZzOW0w/s5t3ba51119)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thank you to the volunteers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2199%2E135344%2Eu6gPhH)

Trudging through rain and snow. Talking with people who are apathetic or slightly hostile. Spending a beautiful Michigan Saturday knocking doors when you could be on a boat, or in the woods, or on the couch watching football.
It takes a lot to be a campaign volunteer. It ain’t easy. But if you’re looking for a reason that our country is headed for something better, a reason to feel hopeful despite our bitter and angry politics, check this out:
More than 50,000 Michiganders volunteered to help my campaign and Democrats up and down the ballot. They knocked on more than 2.2 million doors, sent more than 1.1 million texts, and made more than 5 million phone calls to voters. What did they get for all those efforts? Fame and fortune? Well, no. Maybe a doughnut and a cup of coffee – and a huge thank you from me.
From the first days of my first congressional campaign, some of the most thoughtful, decent, dedicated and patriotic people I’ve met have been campaign volunteers. Before anybody else thought I had a shot to win, they believed, and they were willing to put their shoe leather on the line. From our first “Snow Boots on the Ground” back in early 2018 to the final, massive, statewide effort to get out the vote in this Senate race, all my campaigns have been within the “margin of effort.” I would not be headed to the U.S. Senate without public-spirited Americans willing to sacrifice their time and effort. Thank you for each and every phone shift, door knock, and for the countless times you lifted me up with your smiles, your determination, and your belief in something better.
– Elissa
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov24.k4yPYt&refcode=em241112-1-15&t=2&akid=2199%2E135344%2Eu6gPhH)**

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2199%2E135344%2Eu6gPhH).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2199%2E135344%2Eu6gPhH)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Paul Buskirk for Congress
subject: Paul Buskirk for Congress...Gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Buskirk for Congress campaign
body:
Thank You for Your Support | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d0b3983f1c6/how-can-i-help-the-campaign-12711266?e=a3f26a61c6)
---
| | | | | My friends,
It has been only a handful of days since the election. A great many people in our country are still processing the outcome. I understand. Yet, only our walk through the next few years will provide the true answers to questions many may have.
With the results very much resolved in our 1st District of Kansas, what do I know today?
**The people of our District are truly amazing!**
Kansans, red-blue-or-in-between are truly good people. Generous. Proud. Hardworking. Caring. Headstrong. And while some voices across our district claim that we have little or nothing in common with one another.....my experiences over this last year affirm that this is completely untrue! Once we get past some initial stereotypes and ideologies, we actually have so very much in common. We want our communities to thrive and be welcoming. We want to carve out a good living for our families. And we absolutely want to leave a legacy for our children and their children.
While I am certainly disappointed in the final results in the 1st District, I have absolutely no regrets about walking this journey. I met thousands of colleagues and made so many new friends.
I am so grateful for everyone who provided support to this campaign and to me on this journey. Whether it was advice from experience, words of encouragement, financial assistance, and prayers....I would not have crossed the finish line without you all.
I wish you the very best.
Take great care,Paul
---
|
---
| **MANY voices. ONE passion.****UNITED to provide a legacy for our children.**
---
|
---

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Thank you for supporting my race for CA-03.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
We must push forward with hope.

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-PW_g_MXnbJ-DEn8akQI0A~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpFh0nP0QhaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9yc2Vmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmcsPJgzZ1rwL8JSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt)
| | Dear Peter, I am writing to tell you that I am proud of you, I am grateful for you, and we will persevere. I know we are all disappointed with the outcome of the election, both my own and nationally. But I am proud to stand with you and grateful that you stood with me at this juncture in history. Throughout our nation’s history there have been dark days and dark decades where America has grappled with her identity and selfish ambition has tried to snuff out justice. Although we lost the election, I’m proud we took up the mantle of justice and fought. We were not bystanders when our democracy came under threat. We worked and stood on the side of justice, democracy and freedom. And we will continue this work. I stepped into this race because our democracy and our community was in peril. I stepped in because we have a historic mandate to reinforce the foundations of our democracy from rule of law to civil rights, to women’s rights. We sounded the alarm, mobilized neighbors and awoke civic engagement in our community. I know it feels like a red tsunami has come to wipe out our freedoms. But our work over the previous years has helped reinforce the foundations of our democracy, making us strong and safe against the coming onslaught. We ran a campaign to help heal and uplift our democracy. We ran a campaign to help our community know that they are not alone and that those who feel oppressed have champions. We ran this campaign to tell women that even in the face of our rights and freedoms eroding, _we won't go back_. The organizing and civil society we have built will be urgently needed in the coming years. And while I don’t know the next steps in this fight, I know that we have a firm foundation and a just mission. Generations worked tirelessly to give us the rights and freedoms we have today. They didn’t win every election, court ruling or legislative vote. They lost quite a few. But they persevered and with grit, toil and heart, they secured the everyday freedoms we take for granted from clean air to the right to vote to gender and racial equality. And while we still have miles to go to fully realize these freedoms, we will keep fighting. We will go forward together. And we will prevail. Thank you for your courage, tenacity and grace. Onward, Jessica

---|---
| Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress.
---
Jessica Morse for Congress1079 Sunrise AveSuite B 275Roseville, CA 95661United States
---
[www.morseforcongress.com/](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-PW_g_MXnbJ-DEn8akQI0A~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpFh0nP0QhaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9yc2Vmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmcsPJgzZ1rwL8JSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt "Website")

And while we still have miles to go to fully realize these freedoms, we will keep fighting. We will go forward together. And we will prevail. Thank you for your courage, tenacity and grace. Onward, Jessica ---|--- | Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress. Jessica Morse for Congress1079 Sunrise AveSuite B 275Roseville, CA 95661United States "Website"

name: Team McCormick
subject: McCormick Campaign Statement on the Outcome of the Senate Race in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

We have a quick update on Dave McCormick's race that we want to share with you.

"McCormick is up 30,679 votes with more to come, as ruby red Cambria County is still outstanding. While votes continue to be counted, any way you slice it, Dave McCormick will be the next United States Senator from Pennsylvania," said Elizabeth Gregory, McCormick communications director.

Your support has played an incredible role in getting Dave this far - from being the underdog with a double-digit deficit to 30,679 votes ahead with more to come. Thank you for all of your help in getting Dave McCormick over the finish line.

clean_body: Friend, We have a quick update on Dave McCormick's race that we want to share with you. "McCormick is up 30,679 votes with more to come, as ruby red Cambria County is still outstanding. While votes continue to be counted, any way you slice it, Dave McCormick will be the next United States Senator from Pennsylvania," said Elizabeth Gregory, McCormick communications director. Your support has played an incredible role in getting Dave this far - from being the underdog with a double-digit deficit to 30,679 votes ahead with more to come. Thank you for all of your help in getting Dave McCormick over the finish line. -- Team McCormick ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. This is a historic moment and we want to show how proud we are of this achievement! [**Will you sign the card to congratulate Mayor-elect Nichols on his momentum victory?**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_iXaEBE6RoEOjHEa7LfvrW_CK9SjXQ7Lu4QAWxtS3OvcFnXnhlPpbPaOwmVfBF66y5Gv-mfO1VsZqjwZVut7X3bnZhjOWbmoayS6V3ImyuEYxpX25oIaXdBeqwJSjmNc4mSQqJ3kPXWnJu1RzlT3HowUirQpbV7ldUdh1cRkTvcsqOfpu5Kshe1tb0f_wz9LQ4tbPeYcWIzawiS1UN4v_JLHfIUz41mN7VmnfXU7wVuD4L0UWj_oCIHuXYtoQGWP5f8J5nkV71hmdYVNo-iCixEUu1AA6EBj3SNkOyRKjl-GLzCM83QbbSvhlvgBeuhbxTmF5OyY_qWiggR_KuMPP4xtZ-9PciVkUjkq6QapZmlEvkAY01J_JaETYaVdNCXNjIpJpCWn_9uI_K87sjQKzj-2CHdyuRLv0sjjKRj_rbkw/4be/G9-8yk7bQUKj9l3TsFLtZQ/h2/h001.TimIbePdEiXMS_tGJSrvX2qFEF2kqQWJIMytULSmuSM) | | [SIGN THE CARD TODAY!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_iXaEBE6RoEOjHEa7LfvrW_CK9SjXQ7Lu4QAWxtS3OvcFnXnhlPpbPaOwmVfBF66y5Gv-mfO1VsZqjwZVut7X3bnZhjOWbmoayS6V3ImyuEYxpX25oIaXdBeqwJSjmNc4mSQqJ3kPXWnJu1RzlT3HowUirQpbV7ldUdh1cRkTvcsqOfpu5Kshe1tb0f_wz9LT-m6P-fNodqv6bO0BxwrVSjkaENJvWDWCE5zApE0IM3fJZ_VLTmxQuGUEx0WLWMY7Hh0dBKqb0bWTqZwAcg7u_736j1xY8Ho5pMYTyiBBYIw8Guun6-Z3but31EWhcGMQw5pM2X1DA8DsfzTluiDNwvWRnJqeGz6sjCOIzWWWoXmsdy5iHZDQnb-2EHQuIdWdeKRUXWIQq7CwsqS73ik12ayhze6H__jmW3HL13IFESg/4be/G9-8yk7bQUKj9l3TsFLtZQ/h3/h001.WtClRfIPHNFOY7OW40QYhwRwpiDKKb9u1V_CB_9dDdw)

When we talk about building Black political power, this is exactly what we mean, Peter — helping to elect candidates that provide representation for those in our communities who have gone without for far too long.

This election specifically holds a deep significance given the remarkable legacy of the historic Greenwood District, also known as Black Wall Street, and the brutal Tulsa Race Massacre that left lasting scars on the community.

There is no doubt that the Mayor-elect’s leadership will bring positive change to Tulsa, and we’re excited to celebrate this milestone. [**Click here to add your name to the card!**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_iXaEBE6RoEOjHEa7LfvrW_CK9SjXQ7Lu4QAWxtS3OvcFnXnhlPpbPaOwmVfBF66y5Gv-mfO1VsZqjwZVut7X3bnZhjOWbmoayS6V3ImyuEYxpX25oIaXdBeqwJSjmNc4mSQqJ3kPXWnJu1RzlT3HowUirQpbV7ldUdh1cRkTvcsqOfpu5Kshe1tb0f_wz9LRJ4ZcVHw0DlSB5LLKW0-c4LR9hFPMfa7Y2JYq9avP5RoVx3AKMRuoYNbGDQ952x3RxGBo4SgMpVkswb024rGNbbfgg5RoGfD-cEm91wNSQK8q4XrtU3_2Ks0fNf8YTQM-Z7xAwd9juW0nmZnp5XHrYxAzVL5roivORNyb9hDFmOM4IzsKzudefnFMWiqry03gRs1MXdi1k9BjTf05wG-ETITW8RxKqpjarPvWamRF3FA/4be/G9-8yk7bQUKj9l3TsFLtZQ/h4/h001.SQjDjLNj31idO6B2jELCEXC7fJqeTz_MZPR3TpSLqdc)

Thank you,

The Collective PAC
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPrMUgqcXAg05VHPawgTcaJRNsuW34PIdAHuK-DdoRkae45oullc4q1EZ5uLE6_ftrcdpvrFhU1go-jbah7_qK4fZ7W6SKForpJjXqRwqaVC_zNlfZU4qnGMTZ3hxkfdMLqhgPIvHsZr7FzcjTJQLNMNqtSVs8CNAQCsWejD1QezR8dRcwV90SmVnZSvCXT81ptyHAm5wM3ANsN5wZn1_ENMtH7EZXZxTaUcHKID_w5qUCZqrI3YY0ZhsEVmG4GJi022s9Yi9-wXGs3Mf1ZCIfFpAljoFB5_TjsfZtCN85iOmOGHzDhNXWtrCav7VTMYQxtaLiVibbQZhMlHhbL3j9nWmNYpgUbJwy1hbTsF_ru6FA/4be/G9-8yk7bQUKj9l3TsFLtZQ/h5/h001.O81Sb1XEwMpXDCG3V7d4mkMxa8uDymGUAY5Q9Ucug6M) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

subject: 🗓️What’s next? Join us at our post-election debrief tomorrow!
body:
🧡 Come surround yourself with community! | | | Hey Peter, Here’s your daily reminder that our community is prepared to move mountains to protect you, your loved ones, your friends, and your neighbors from the authoritarian, fascist future that Trump and his administration plan to materialize. Our power has always been rooted in our radical care for one another. ❤️🩹Can you take a moment to process this moment with us? Tomorrow, November 13, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT, we’ll be hosting our “We Create The Moment: Post-Election Debrief” Community Call to honor our emotions, discuss where we go from here, and learn how to continue fighting for our community alongside our Squad of changemakers! Will you join me? **[I’ll be there!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN7DE37muk7CuwvBiD2hAXP6B3QfJz1F9plf-oTFkiJW93MhdXvhKxGTiaSaHr24ri1PjJOZXODjYHJy4dCO0bncrYHE7UmJQodl7F1KgiDY0jLySfUdCNIpJCn1dnRedAByrGzjv6ZhxGJuo1KI11OGkTrim9vySKGUtyUvjcNU0NcuxU_l5rdAFDQRcbABfjkB3uRBWfbv8uTg0BJpfzzYezlvSOPBtzR8xIMXXmdoIjrILhd0QotJb9s7n2dBbijUckcNKxYvv8om0MX25rn/4be/drfYYCMwTveLWORSOZB9DQ/h0/h001.c8m3Mcny9QLgAXC4pCn6eEI7x6PHU8SZxLugicn02MQ)** ⬇️ **Check out our last email for all the details!** Together, we’re more powerful than Trump and his MAGA henchmen. This moment is calling us to come together and fight hand in hand for a future that protects us all. [☑️ **Sign up now to receive the Zoom link to join our call!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN7DE37muk7CuwvBiD2hAXP6B3QfJz1F9plf-oTFkiJW93MhdXvhKxGTiaSaHr24rhcynAFYToMCz_3JjYiw1gG0YnmMchKkQPx6bRUwi4nSisD1ppZlh-P9ii9bI_Uz_Y48lUrVO-QhKroWik9urhtyHkVEmNFE9mpLkZP0UfrqMWSgmt7IQfwDbjpro6kjuJmyGVJpDb_RerquxAUKQLGwYJlK5FH54vkwX7EQp875uZbnl1d4OM0T_Czh4tX1RqUL6kaoYaFz6hKqrba6jS2/4be/drfYYCMwTveLWORSOZB9DQ/h1/h001.2AK35Ds_125VAD-l99n4Aw-E5_YLDyC95OtfUA4Zh-c) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Greisa** , **United We Dream Action** Date: Wed, Nov 6, 2024 at 5:39 PM Subject: Undocumented and Freedom Bound!
Hey Peter, I want you to know that**you are deeply loved and supported.** Today is a difficult day, and we know you’re feeling sad, angry, and the multitude of emotions in between. But know this - we stand with you! And know that the results of this election do not define the value of our community or reflect the strength of our community. Another four years of a Trump administration is not what we envisioned, but we cannot let fear or frustration define us. It’s okay to feel, to grieve, and to process, **but we must also rise above despair**. We are resilient, and together, we will build the power to keep pushing for change we know we deserve. History is on our side, and this is one moment in our longer arc towards justice. **Yes! This moment is scary but resilience and resistance flow in our veins.** We as immigrants have had to prepare for hard, extraordinary circumstances all our lives. We didn’t back down when Trump won for the first time in 2016, and we won’t back down now. Despite today’s loss, we know there are more of us who want to unite our home with compassion than those who want to divide us with hate. We will continue to fight for our vision of the future—where everyone is free to thrive and live unapologetically. Together, we are unstoppable, and we will rise again, stronger and more determined than ever. **Our community has always been a powerful force against the hatred and bigotry aimed at us and our loved ones. Time and time again, we’ve stood strong, supported one another, and fought back against those who seek to divide us. We’ve built a network of care, courage, resilience and POWER—and we’re ready to protect one another.** Alongside you, we will practice radical hope, be bold and courageous, will not be afraid to speak truth to power, and refuse to live in isolation. 🫂 Can we take a collective breath together? On Wednesday, November 13, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT, we’ll be hosting our “We Create The Moment: Post-Election Debrief” Community Call to feel the power of being in community and make meaning of this moment together. Will I see you there? **[RSVP NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN7DE37muk7CuwvBiD2hAXP6B3QfJz1F9plf-oTFkiJW93MhdXvhKxGTiaSaHr24rig-1Mdeu-ORz2qcJ9Q5-BlhTf3rD7K3Pf8g1PTrZbfIN1LQXYm8wNvi75HTJn02ksVg5Nzg0p6na5HCZejhjRdO7zBGQrEWSEt6PEiFXibpIU6sQ1r_cY1RAs2t_N5yk4PCri8ZOxr4PIWbzrVK3ugclhWV37ezSHTHhXHjCIKGsmgGHvSohFbG44T_ZKp4ilzxURzvoidczQdi46IUPC9/4be/drfYYCMwTveLWORSOZB9DQ/h2/h001.LqUGePNYN6HHuEK4Nq8BAE-iwix4_0sL_gSS28Mdzm4)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN7DE37muk7CuwvBiD2hAXP6B3QfJz1F9plf-oTFkiJW93MhdXvhKxGTiaSaHr24rgASFO4LpWJjnpUUsq0zGjB4dxpUpDR-NAZOnLMr5PzNF3mA1HFZEwFTv1VNYMITp74XxfANEXbdv097iTZ8HDhN9leC1DqwtcvQg4AU3bHOkSK43FDIQ6DeeOcVQdX2_dWRHGY49sw4xIHnYskmfCEZnvYZC-YNEMTfI2DxZ1C4DHf4DBG9c60qglpSgXUSQrmc2976SzudjJsG2RGCnOK/4be/drfYYCMwTveLWORSOZB9DQ/h3/h001.0odeMnGdLyGXgaBVQ69uCBVdFS_JEXAYOAXP0pYAUZA) 🧡 As we take care of our community and stand up for one another, know that it’s important to replenish our mind, body, and spirit. Remember: Our power has always come from our care and love for one another and ourselves. No politician can force us into the shadows. We at UWDA have been proudly declaring that we are Undocumented and Unafraid, Queer and Unashamed for 16 plus years. We’re ready to fight, and together, we will win! In solidarity, Greisa and the United We Dream Action team P.S.: 📲 Need a break from scrolling? Request a Love Note on Demand from our sister organization, United We Dream. body:
I'm counting on you
#

Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
[**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going. Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by splitting $5 or more right now between myself and Ruben Gallego?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-casey.ov9ih3&refcode=em241112-2-160e&t=1&akid=3561%2E734936%2EBq8yfq)

name: Democratic House Majority
subject: Democrats can still flip the House
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
The fight is not over yet. We know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses, but we still have a chance to take back the House.

The fight is not over yet. We know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses, but we still have a chance to take back the House. [_**Can you chip in to these recount funds to ensure we count every vote and win the seats we need to flip the House blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96987590/511888570/570715589?refcode=email_111224_DCCC-Recount-Split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc3YjMwZi0yN2ExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-mhL3A0mV9SACju-jaEFb6JUfiz_nQjMKo62PeT-Gg=) Right now, the results are too close to call for six battleground races. **We have people in the field ensuring that every vote is counted, but need to make sure these campaigns continue to have resources to support this staff.** We have the opportunity now to take back the House majority and create a Blue firewall to fight against a national abortion ban, cuts to Medicare, and prevent a Project 2025 takeover. But, this fight will be expensive and long. We cannot do this without you. [_**There is still time to fight and take back the House and we need to leave it all on the field. name: April McClain Delaney
subject: I couldn’t be more grateful.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Since the beginning of this campaign, our message has been clear: it’s time for common sense, common ground leadership that puts people over politics, defends our freedoms and values, and builds a future centered on unity.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96987948/511890010/-743377158?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-11-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWYxZDgyNGYtMjhhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7hGUG0xowyM0Ge6ra87JsKsEDEpUhU5CGPAHBrmOuxw=)
---
| Dear Peter,

I want to extend my heartfelt thanks for your incredible support of our campaign. Your friendship, generosity, and commitment not only helped us build crucial momentum in this critical race but fuel a movement driven by the values of unity that Maryland’s 6th District – and our country – truly need. With your support, we’ve been able to expand our outreach, build a diverse coalition, and make a powerful impact across our communities. At every step, you’ve made it possible for us to share our vision of an inclusive, thriving Maryland.

Since the beginning of this campaign, our message has been clear: it’s time for common sense, common ground leadership that puts people over politics, defends our freedoms and values, and builds a future centered on unity. Staying true to our values, we can now begin the critical work of empowering Maryland families – lowering costs and creating good-paying jobs, improving infrastructure, driving investment into our communities, and defending our fundamental rights and freedoms. Together, we are going to move our 6th District forward, guided by values that uplift and unite us all.

Thank you once again for standing with us. Your commitment and belief in this campaign mean more than words can express. I am truly humbled by the trust you have placed in me and deeply honored to have you by our side. With your support and continued partnership, I am hopeful for our future and confident in the progress we can achieve together.

With deepest appreciation,

April McClain Delaney
---

name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Quick poll: Ranked choice voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111224_1&amount=25]
Bolts: Native Leaders Organize to Defend Alaska’s Ranked Choice Voting System [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_RankedChoiceVoting.png]
Friend - "Ranked choice" voting is a popular tool in the push to make the voting process more democratic and enable citizens to have a greater voice when they go to the polls.
If you’ve never heard of it, the explanation is simple : the voter gets to rank the candidates in the order they prefer them, instead of just picking one. This helps empower a diverse slate of candidates and also acknowledges that, if your first choice didn’t win, you’d certainly prefer a second candidate who more closely resembles your beliefs rather than having the other main party win by default.
The use of ranked choice voting is still being discussed, including in states like Alaska, where an effort is underway to get rid of it.
With the debate continuing, we need to know how interested you are in fighting for the implementation of ranked-choice voting.
Do you approve of ranked choice voting?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111224_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111224_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111224_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111224_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111224_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111224_1&amount=25]

body:
| | | **BREAKING via CNBC:****"Trump's victory could change abortion rights in America"**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/20735?ask=5&t=16&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241112-AddYourName-OpposeAbortionBansSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241112-AddYourName-OpposeAbortionBansSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=18916%2E9716520%2EZRnkzy)
**[We have 69 days before Trump takes office, so we need to respond _immediately_. Sign our petition NOW to oppose abortion bans everywhere >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20735?ask=5&t=17&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241112-AddYourName-OpposeAbortionBansSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241112-AddYourName-OpposeAbortionBansSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=18916%2E9716520%2EZRnkzy)**
**Now is the time to act, team.** With a second Trump administration coming and a conservative majority in the Supreme Court, **we NEED to make sure Democrats EVERYWHERE are ready to stand against threats to reproductive freedom.**

Republicans have been celebrating abortion bans that Donald Trump's Supreme Court justices made possible -- and now they're ready to push for a _national_ ban! But THOUSANDS of Democrats are rallying together to **STRONGLY OPPOSE** them -- **and we need to make sure YOU are one of them!**

**We NEED to be loud and make our voices heard.** So please, if you're ready to stand against Trump's anti-abortion agenda, **sign our petition before MIDNIGHT:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/20735?ask=5&t=18&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241112-AddYourName-OpposeAbortionBansSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241112-AddYourName-OpposeAbortionBansSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=18916%2E9716520%2EZRnkzy)

| | The fight is not over yet, team. We know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses, but we still have a chance to take back the House. [**Can you chip in to these recount funds to ensure we count every vote and win the seats we need to flip the House blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96988785/511892495/630911360?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.12_DCCCRecount_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTQ1MTg0Ni0yOWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gmBKgiit9n02MLFuJCVRbWPJa1k9AAZWXmTSKs1IuQ0=) Right now, the results are too close to call for six battleground races. **We have people in the field ensuring that every vote is counted, but need to make sure these campaigns continue to have resources to support this staff.** We have the opportunity now to take back the House majority and create a Blue firewall to fight against a national abortion ban, cuts to Medicare, and prevent a Project 2025 takeover. name: COURIER || Democracy's newsroom
subject: Trump’s win was built on right-wing lies. Let’s build a media network that tells the truth.
body:
From Fox News and Sinclair to X and Joe Rogan, an entire network of right-wing influencers fueled a relentless cycle of fear-mongering and misinformation.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96988906/511892966/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNkYzIwYjItMjlhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lzo0gwzAur-bCMyhFhRq86IngTSWPAURiWKAt_Hh5pg=&emci=b0504136-11a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=13dc20b2-29a1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
There’s no sugar-coating it – the right-wing media handed Donald Trump this election. From Fox News and Sinclair to X and Joe Rogan, an entire network of right-wing influencers fueled a relentless cycle of fear-mongering and misinformation.
**In the end, their propaganda machine didn’t just amplify Trump’s message—it set the agenda. They manufactured outrage, spun up economic panic, and shifted the national conversation, steering millions toward Trump.**
We’ve seen enough to know it’s time to build a progressive, pro-democracy media network that’s powerful enough to counter these forces, and we’re asking for your help.
[**Can you chip in $25 now to support COURIER’s local newsrooms and help us grow a progressive media strong enough to fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96988907/511892967/-593472309?refcode=20241112_Mission&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNkYzIwYjItMjlhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lzo0gwzAur-bCMyhFhRq86IngTSWPAURiWKAt_Hh5pg=)
At COURIER, we’re doing what the traditional media won’t. We don’t chase profits or sensationalize—we’re dedicated to fact-based, community-centered reporting that holds power accountable and cuts through the far-right’s propaganda.
**Here’s how COURIER is creating a progressive media network that can take on right-wing disinformation:**
* **Publishing local, values-driven news** : Our 11 state-based newsrooms focus on the issues that matter to their communities, with pro-democracy, fact-driven reporting that counters right-wing narratives. In states like Pennsylvania, Arizona, and Michigan, we’re one of the most-followed local sources, bringing truth to the heart of these battlegrounds.
* **We already reach millions** : With 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, COURIER’s message is reaching Americans where they are—with perspectives that challenge right-wing disinformation. We’re committed to making fact-based reporting accessible and free for all.
* **News, right where people are** : From TikTok to Twitter, our creators and social media experts are redefining what progressive news can be. We share our content directly in the online spaces where people actually get their news. This election cycle alone, our TikTok presence exploded, surpassing 1 million followers and amassing over a billion video views.

**Right-wing media has had decades to build this power. Now it’s our turn.**

clean_body: From Fox News and Sinclair to X and Joe Rogan, an entire network of right-wing influencers fueled a relentless cycle of fear-mongering and misinformation. Peter, There’s no sugar-coating it – the right-wing media handed Donald Trump this election. From Fox News and Sinclair to X and Joe Rogan, an entire network of right-wing influencers fueled a relentless cycle of fear-mongering and misinformation. In the end, their propaganda machine didn’t just amplify Trump’s message—it set the agenda. They manufactured outrage, spun up economic panic, and shifted the national conversation, steering millions toward Trump. We’ve seen enough to know it’s time to build a progressive, pro-democracy media network that’s powerful enough to counter these forces, and we’re asking for your help. = At COURIER, we’re doing what the traditional media won’t. We don’t chase profits or sensationalize—we’re dedicated to fact-based, community-centered reporting that holds power accountable and cuts through the far-right’s propaganda. Here’s how COURIER is creating a progressive media network that can take on right-wing disinformation: Publishing local, values-driven news : Our 11 state-based newsrooms focus on the issues that matter to their communities, with pro-democracy, fact-driven reporting that counters right-wing narratives. In states like Pennsylvania, Arizona, and Michigan, we’re one of the most-followed local sources, bringing truth to the heart of these battlegrounds. We already reach millions : With 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the 90 days before Election Day, COURIER’s message is reaching Americans where they are—with perspectives that challenge right-wing disinformation. We’re committed to making fact-based reporting accessible and free for all. News, right where people are : From TikTok to Twitter, our creators and social media experts are redefining what progressive news can be. We share our content directly in the online spaces where people actually get their news. This election cycle alone, our TikTok presence exploded, surpassing 1 million followers and amassing over a billion video views. Right-wing media has had decades to build this power. name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=nato8q69Lpy6q6KTDNmoi%2FXIYpFdifoDaXRDf7xp94t0LtUUbXr1KOdMEAu7yfqRI5cT78H59WuGhGPlv%2B9DgyZ7aKSghAUrwHyxmlYiSdDZN7H7HdCXIbspKPXeMulG1YZvxXhnz%2FAb2E%2FKcfs70LqeWqhc1PDTm1MS%2FZm6YcDkLhD3Ku07fUZUkPpAwvXIBmw3QB6lPwCLQ2TmDCB6t%2FWXqw%2BSwhpy5U0H54TdaiKaqiG3ioApcchSZAAMD9YgHceUrEtqLgehUzbezmjDDLHoxkish1B2VSQyWmos8H6h2VLMQaa8AaIw3wRNFEKf6DJELgwGyPFS8YMwUGu4mf9Iklpv6Yj8R6aDlpq6VjRio6vgZaael8u5XJ93F7Lc%2F8ks4%2B%2FgE5K4dlxex%2BnUFtebcGCijewaqRzNGSNdKZJT6g1WGJXcwL3sgII3xk53]

# [#]
Team,

I am beyond thankful and humbled by your support in my reelection campaign. Thank you for believing in me and joining this fight with us. I’m honored and thrilled to share that our campaign for Congress was able to declare victory in California’s 25th District, and I’m looking forward to serving for another two years.

I couldn’t have made it without your support. Thank you for standing by our side since day one, for giving our campaign the fuel we needed to beat our MAGA opponent, and for your unwavering faith and commitment to our cause.

While we were able to clinch victory here at home, it goes without saying that we didn't get the results we were hoping for in races up and down the ballot across the nation.

As we face another Trump presidency and a Republican Senate, there are a lot of unknowns right now. We do know, however, that our fight for progress has never been more important than it is right now.

And in Congress, you can count on me doing just that. Fighting for the future of our district, our state, and our country.

My team and I are prepared to fight for the next 4 years. Thank you for standing with us.

Sincerely,

Dr. Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

name: Diane Sare
subject: Did you vote for me? Let's fix this mess!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241112_gtv&n=1)
---
Friend - Many people have commented on the peculiar 12-15 million vote discrepancy between the 2020 U.S. Presidential Election and the "voter turn out" in 2024. Due to the groundbreaking work of groups like NY Citizens Audit which found over 300,000 excess votes counted in New York State in 2020 (that's votes in excess of voters who voted), it may not have been possible to add all those disembodied votes in 2024, preventing a Harris victory. That's a good start, and Dick Cheney will not be haunting the White House through a Harris Presidency. But don't you think we should level the playing field, and actually create the conditions where qualified candidates have access to the voters, and the voters have access to qualified candidates? That's why I don't want to let go of this issue. If you voted for me, and/or know of others who did, please go to your County Board of Elections website to see how many votes for Diane Sare were recorded in your election district. If you're not sure how to do this, and want to join the follow-up election monitoring activity, please **_join the GUARD THE VOTE zoom meeting tonight at 7:30 pm._** | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/tues_11_12_guard_the_vote_post_election_action?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241112_gtv&n=2 "RSVP for Tues. Post-Election Guard the Vote") [RSVP for Tues. Post-Election Guard the Vote](https://www.sareforsenate.com/tues_11_12_guard_the_vote_post_election_action?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241112_gtv&n=2)
---
Finally, if you have placed lawn signs on public easement, please remove them, and if you see any of my signs by the roadside anywhere, kindly remove them and put them in the trash or whatever recycling available in your area for such things.
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241112_gtv&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241112_gtv&n=3)
---
\--Diane Sare

Team our race in Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still too close to call. Kirsten is neck-and-neck with her extremist Republican opponent — but there are still thousands of lawful ballots that need to be counted. Together, our grassroots campaign overcame millions of dollars from super PACs supporting our opponent. Arizona voters heard Kirsten’s message of reproductive rights, water security, and lower costs, and they showed up to the polls. **Now, we’re working hard to make sure every lawful vote is counted correctly. ** **We'll need your help in this fight too. We need to make sure every single lawful vote is counted — and prepare for a potential recount before a winner is declared.** **[Will you split a donation between our campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party now? # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Peter,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It 's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.
---

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[So please, split $5 or more between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96989523/511895219/1089970663?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2524-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDY1YjM1MzAtMmRhMS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=B9CKGNWrh_eB3y8G_UqiV-H3kwcJ18oQzCtL0fEGotM=)**
