subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I’m counting on you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995)
Peter,
We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep working with us.
I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe every person’s voice should be heard.
That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.
[**I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to help us keep going:****Will you help us fight to ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice is heard by donating $****5****or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?refcode=em20241112-4&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995)
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?amount=15&refcode=em20241112-4-el&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?amount=25&refcode=em20241112-4-el&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?amount=50&refcode=em20241112-4-el&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?amount=100&refcode=em20241112-4-el&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?amount=250&refcode=em20241112-4-el&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?refcode=em20241112-4&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995)

Democracy means ensuring everyone's voices are heard and that they matter. Pennsylvania is the birthplace of democracy, and I’m not giving up that fight. I hope you’re not ready to give up either.
**Let’s finish this strong:**[**Invest $****5****or more in the fight to ensure every PA voter's voice is heard.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241112-4?refcode=em20241112-4&refcode2=4833_552475_tdx995&akid=4833%2E552475%2Etdx995)
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

body:

---|---
Dear Peter,

Last week's U.S. election set the stage for a new, dark chapter in the fight for reproductive rights. A second Trump administration promises to be more disastrous for our movement than the first.

Peter, none of this would be possible without your generous support. Every prayer, every vote, every survey response, and every generous donation have been instrumental in our victory last night. I mean it when I say it - THANK YOU! But the work is far from over. As I watch returns continue to trickle in, our key races to keep the majority are looking very, _very_ close - and some could even wind up in a recount. As Speaker, I promised to see our conservative House candidates to the very end, even beyond Election Day. And now, as the votes are being counted, they need us more than ever. So, Peter, **[**can I count on you to spare a few bucks to help us maintain our momentum and bring our candidates home?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2b20d7159e3a49b4b97643d4b13ce597&_e=ymyZLy5y3k5-4ZXc9dSC_WL2xlfFSNzsh29A7PcBBQyl_ZTfLnEfWPRKzVt99S9MNQxxblzzR2jbjehp150CxgNB--WyUXQ6Xjk4M4w1v3_xsYiI7Fzt1NRstyHq4PO4Z9tVZ_2SE7T2sBRXysHkCnj-GolsUFeOtkRz9JJtT7dz2Hg_60KINz5qTOyg-5OLpbtAkTQm2Mc84TVaWqx2bsfD6ZMGihW0KPrS5PN85eZ-kYpzSRJpmZMuTn0NGrs17cps6d6l-kUetriKMB7Fuou80AWwE1f8wKus0KbBB6KSOf2B38kqRhSn0tA1eRy2cSZRnfrYTH07qEVZOMzYbEBUiILDZkkH1hWxe1YS1zcMYkTgJH02HRvmJnBN8AUrxrLBCX66VYruohcNa2CeNaUvsGNgmdWlRgNhrRTjWTYbpNyE3aXpCBEL8WFVWHS00tsv3q0QPZBcLyOYwG01THide3b6bcQwSAjpeByNB8M9-Nj9NlKC0jsBXbYsnrd2sQxX5EAHyd1u4WyBeVc6ww%3D%3D)** Thank you for your support. **[](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM3ODI2NTMwMjQxODA3NDcxLFwiclwiOjEzNzgyNjU0NDg0MzIyODg5N30iLCJzIjoiMzYzY2QxYjAwNjY0YTkxNyJ9)Dear Peter,**
We invite you to join us for an important **United College Park (UCP) Community Townhall** on Saturday, November 16th, at 10:00 a.m. at [Restoration Christian Fellowship Center](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTM3ODI2NTMwMjQ5MTQ3NTEwLFwiclwiOjEzNzgyNjU0NDg0MzIyODg5N30iLCJzIjoiYmNhMDBjYWU0YTBlZTc4ZiJ9). While the national election has ended, our work at the local level continues. By staying informed and participating in decisions that shape College Park, we can make a meaningful impact on our community.

| | |
---
|
---
**This Town Hall will provide crucial updates on the following issues:**
| | |
---
|
---
* **Battery Storage Facility Approval on Welcome All Road:
** We’ll discuss the recent decision to rezone land for a $400 million battery storage facility—approved without a public hearing—raising concerns about safety, transparency, and adherence to zoning laws.

* **Sale of Bill Evans Baseball Field and Badgett Stadium Practice Field:
** Gain insight into the recent sale of these valuable recreational spaces, with an emphasis on transparency concerns and missed opportunities for public input.

* **Closure of a Popular Rock Climbing Wall:
** Learn more about the proposal to close this beloved recreational space and what UCP is doing to support residents who want to keep it open.

* **Winter Closure of Park Bathrooms:
** Despite significant investment in park bathroom facilities, the council has voted to close them for the winter. These facilities are equipped with heating and air, and we’re questioning the need for this seasonal shutdown.

* **Recall Effort for Ward 1 City Councilwoman:
** We’ll provide an update on the ongoing recall effort for Councilwoman Jamelle McKenzie, driven by community concerns about transparency and her role in recent decisions affecting College Park.

* **Erosion of Transparency:
** We’ll clarify and provide updates on Resolution 2024-01, which redefines the weak mayor structure, affects consent agendas, and limits citizen input.

* **Upcoming Elections for Wards 2 & 4
**

|
---

**Your voice matters.** UCP is committed to creating a space where residents can express concerns, ask questions, and receive direct, transparent answers from community members.
Please join us on November 16th (and bring a friend!) to learn more and get involved. Together, we can help build a better, more accountable College Park.
**Location:** Restoration Christian Fellowship Center, 2455 Roosevelt Hwy, College Park, GA 30337 **Date and Time:** November 16, 2023, at 10:00 a.m.
If you have any questions or would like more information before the Townhall, please feel free to reach out to us at [UCP Contact Information].
We look forward to seeing you there!
**Best regards,** **United College Park**

name: AOC
subject: Q&A
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
What questions do you all have for me?
#
Hey everyone,
I’ve taken the last few days to rest, think, and reflect. I’m not here with any hot takes, because the task before us is massive.
One thing that I am interested in is you all. I’m interested in what you have to say, and **I’m most interested in hearing what you need from me**.
As your public servant — as a person — I’m really curious about your questions, what you would like to hear about, or what you’d like to receive from me.
[Will you take a moment to share with us right now? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2024-post-presidential-survey/?source=em20241112-7566-P_ENG_SUR_CTR&t=1&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ)
I’ve been getting a lot of questions to this effect: “What's the game plan? What do we do? What’s next?”
What happened is so massive that it’s going to take a second to collect how to prepare.
But in the meanwhile, my recommendation is to join and enter community. Whether it’s your church, your knitting circle, mosque, temple, or an interest group: **get into physical community**.
I will be doing more direct communication via this email list, and will continue to share answers to your questions.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20241112-7566-P_ENG_SUR_CTR&t=2&refcode2=7566_2526796_mLlAKZ&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241112-7566-P_ENG_SUR_CTR&t=3&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=4&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=5&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=6&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=7566%2E2526796%2EmLlAKZ)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Let’s finish strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Peter,

We’ve done such incredible work together. Today, I’m asking you to keep
working with us.

I’ve always stood up for the people of our Commonwealth — and I believe
every person’s voice should be heard.

That’s why we have to see this across the finish line.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33469?t=1007&amount=10&akid=3222%2E52803%2EJqXZWZ ]I’ll never stop fighting for Pennsylvania, but I need you with me to
help us keep going. Will you help ensure that every Pennsylvanians' voice
is heard by splitting $10 or more right now between myself and Angela
Alsobrooks?

name: Team Kennedy
subject: The Final Step:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Can we count on you once again?

|
---
| | | | [**Can we count on you once again?**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Americans Stood Tall — Let’s Take the Final Step
[A NEW DAY FOR OUR NATION](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
We the People sent a message LOUD and CLEAR: we rejected censorship, war, and Big Money control over our government agencies. We chose freedom, accountability, and a future grounded in health and transparency.
With President Trump’s return to the White House, RFK Jr. is joining him in Washington as a trusted partner, committed to restoring integrity and breaking the corporate grip on our failed, dangerously mismanaged health agencies.
Together, they will fight for truth and work to dismantle a system that has put profits before people for far too long.
RFK Jr.’s unwavering fight against this menacing oligarchy has ignited a powerful movement across America. In the face of silenced voices and a tightly controlled narrative, _he held his ground_ , inspiring a fierce wave of defiance and resilience.
**And with you by his side, he overcame legal barriers, ballot challenges, and every hurdle put in his path— _no matter the cost._**
[**Now, we face the final step: clearing the campaign debt incurred to make this journey possible, and most importantly, keep Bobby safe.******](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=6)********
[Help Retire Kennedy Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=7)
After the Biden administration unjustly denied him Secret Service protection, Kennedy's campaign took on the heavy cost of private security to keep him safe as he delivered his message to reclaim America.
Now, as he prepares to enter Washington, we need to retire this campaign debt so he can focus entirely on his mission to Make America Healthy Again.
We’re on the verge of real change, and we’re taking the fight to the heart of the problem in Washington, D.C.
[**Your gift today—whether $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or more—will go directly toward paying off our debt and ensuring Bobby can devote his complete attention to the huge job he’s got ahead of him in Washington.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=8)
Every penny raised will go directly toward closing this debt and empowering him to tackle the hard work ahead.
Can we count on you once again to help close this chapter and send Bobby to Washington fully equipped for this mission?
[Yes, you can count on me to help retire debt for Bobby](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=9)
Thank you for standing with us and championing this cause.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_11_12_24_nd1&n=10)
|

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Picking ourselves back up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
A week ago, we got knocked down hard. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96990713/511899510/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDVmM2I2NC0zMWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsU2aQs9eKyK5NKAkdb8t_JGG0hgijag7oKVul407QY=)
---
Peter, A week ago, we got knocked down. Hard. Now, it’s time to start picking ourselves up and getting back in the fight. There are countless ways we’ll need to hold the line for freedom and democracy over the next four years — organizing our communities against harmful and hateful policies, fighting Trump’s overreach in court, supporting local community organizations, and generally looking out for one another. **And there’s one other fight I’m thinking about:[Flipping North Carolina’s Republican senate seat in 2026.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96990714/511899511/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDVmM2I2NC0zMWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsU2aQs9eKyK5NKAkdb8t_JGG0hgijag7oKVul407QY=)** Once we retake the U.S. Senate, we can stop Donald Trump’s most extreme policies, block his most far-right judicial nominations, and slow down the incalculable damage he’s going to try doing to our country. **We’ll need to flip 3-4 Republican seats in 2026 to retake the majority, and North Carolina will be Democrats’ top target.** After all, we just won at least five statewide races here, including Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and Secretary of State. Peter, I know how down so many of us have been feeling over the past week. I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t scared and saddened, too.But we cannot give in to hopelessness or inertia. **We need to get back to work — the sooner, the better.** [**Chipping in to turn North Carolina bright blue in 2026 is one way you can take action right now. Your investment will help Democrats register new voters, organize, and start running early ads to highlight how bad Thom Tillis is for this state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96990715/511899512/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDVmM2I2NC0zMWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsU2aQs9eKyK5NKAkdb8t_JGG0hgijag7oKVul407QY=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately:_ **** | | **[DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96990717/511899514/-1960556440?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDVmM2I2NC0zMWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsU2aQs9eKyK5NKAkdb8t_JGG0hgijag7oKVul407QY=)**

clean_body: A week ago, we got knocked down hard. | = Peter, A week ago, we got knocked down. Hard. Now, it’s time to start picking ourselves up and getting back in the fight. There are countless ways we’ll need to hold the line for freedom and democracy over the next four years — organizing our communities against harmful and hateful policies, fighting Trump’s overreach in court, supporting local community organizations, and generally looking out for one another. And there’s one other fight I’m thinking about:= Once we retake the U.S. Senate, we can stop Donald Trump’s most extreme policies, block his most far-right judicial nominations, and slow down the incalculable damage he’s going to try doing to our country. We’ll need to flip 3-4 Republican seats in 2026 to retake the majority, and North Carolina will be Democrats’ top target. After all, we just won at least five statewide races here, including Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and Secretary of State. Peter, I know how down so many of us have been feeling over the past week. I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t scared and saddened, too.But we cannot give in to hopelessness or inertia. We need to get back to work — the sooner, the better. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = If you can’t give right now or aren’t quite ready to get back in this fight, that’s OK. ## **The Sean Spicer Show Line up - watch at 6pmET**
[YouTube.com/seanmspicer ](https://substack.com/redirect/1a82c494-fa3a-4009-b87c-c279beb534d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tonight: Senator Tommy Tuberville on Senate Majority Leader race and Chad Wolf on border security
Tomorrow: Jason Theiman, NRSC Executive Director
Thursday: Panel - Patrice Onwuka, Doug Collins, Rob Bluey
Friday: Steve Bannon, Dr Peter McCullough
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97e175a7-9a56-45e6-aa5e-71b4409ee747?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **WHAT I 'M READING**
CNN 'will axe top stars in layoffs that'll see hundreds fired'
https://x.com/seanspicer/status/1856410286267199657
Senate Republicans should not be able to hide behind a secret ballot for Leader.
https://x.com/seanspicer/status/1856324027255603277
Pretty obvious high level staff handling personnel in the Trump transition are leaking decisions to CNN
https://x.com/seanspicer/status/1856310414671266120
## **CHECK OUT THIS PHOTO**
This was back stage at the March 3, 2016 debate in Detroit. Trump was already sizing up Rubio - no one would have guessed what the next 8 years would have yielded.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/001f9646-6e59-4b19-ab15-ffee76eb92ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## We are in for a very different 4 years
While we have lived with the consequences of 4 years of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris' policies there is a bright side. Over the past four years groups like America First Policy Institute and the Heritage Foundation have created options for policies and personnel and its going to be like nothing we have seen before.
In conversations with senior folks in the Trump orbit I can tell you two things are going to be VERY VERY different in a second Trump Administrarion: people and process. ...

name: 4Patriots
subject: CIA Warns: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid
body:
| | | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa) here at any time.
---
| | |
---
November 12th, 2024
|
---
| | |
DEADLY STRIKE TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID COMING | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_ **Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR** [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa) Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa) [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa) **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
2. Plug in the solar panel.
3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 6 hours to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS ARE RAVING ABOUT THEIR SOLAR GENERATOR** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19055/6374453/0c5dfff7f85138cc3e633fc733b257b99a2aa68c/659d53ff48cdc47d77d2ff752ec52d7ecd4cfffa)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Notice: Meat Warning
body:
| | | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) here at any time.
---
| | |
---
November 12th, 2024
|
---
| | | HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming - Prepare Now! |
# HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now
**The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while
Taste great
Store without refrigeration
Can't break the bank **Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:** This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. And most importantly, it tastes delicious! **Introducing for the first time ever...** [**The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) **And[right here on this page](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b), you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts.** Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[you need to act fast](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. **And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.** [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. **And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.** Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. **This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.** When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Joseph L.**
"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." **Danielle M.
4Patriots Employee**
"I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." **Michael M.**
"My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where's the meat"." **Ernest K.**
"It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19068/6374453/645a7bbe79eccb1cac2bc774bd4ae7a8c72e4977/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b)
---

| This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by **newsletter@gunowner-news.com**

514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US

[1-Click Unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/one_click_unsubscribe/19068/6374453/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) | [Edit Profile](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/edit_profile/19068/6374453/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) | [Manage Subscriptions](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/unsubscribe/19068/6374453/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) | [Report Spam](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/report_spam/19068/6374453/c81ab74cf77e1ebb1a8eb5442399f3cf69fd774b) |

name: Heather (VPP)
subject: Some news to be proud of.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our hard work paying off across the country:
| Friend, last week was unbelievably tough. Like millions of Americans, I am devastated by the results of the presidential election.

But despite the bad news, we also have _so many_ wins to be proud of. **I want to take a moment to share those victories with you today.**

Thanks to the help of dedicated grassroots supporters like you, **the Voter Protection Project was able to pour in an immense amount of resources to help Democrats flip and defend key House seats:** ✅ Kristen McDonald Rivet in MI-08
✅ Josh Riley in NY-19
✅ Janelle Bynum in OR-05
✅ Pat Ryan in NY-18
✅ Angie Craig in MN-02
✅ George Whitesides in CA-27
✅ Marcy Kaptur in OH-09 **We’re also thrilled to have supported Democrats in some of the most closely contested Senate races, all of whom secured major victories:** ✅ Jacky Rosen in Nevada
✅ Ruben Gallego in Arizona
✅ Elissa Slotkin in Michigan
✅ Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland
✅ Lisa Blunt Rochester in Delaware _These are monumental wins._ Wins that will provide a crucial check on Trump and the GOP’s power and defend our democracy for years to come.

Grassroots donors like you are what make our fight possible, and your hard work is paying off in big ways all over the country.

**I have so much hope that we can build on these gains and keep moving forward.** [The fight continues → Can you help us keep electing incredible Democrats by chipping in $7?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85023?t=6&akid=18015%2E878179%2EVR-qSW) | [**DONATE TO ELECT MORE DEMOCRATS UP AND DOWN THE BALLOT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85023?t=7&akid=18015%2E878179%2EVR-qSW)
---
Thank you. Onward,

Heather
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18015%2E878179%2EVR-qSW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18015%2E878179%2EVR-qSW).**

clean_body: Our hard work paying off across the country: | Friend, last week was unbelievably tough. Like millions of Americans, I am devastated by the results of the presidential election. But despite the bad news, we also have so many wins to be proud of. I want to take a moment to share those victories with you today. Thanks to the help of dedicated grassroots supporters like you, the Voter Protection Project was able to pour in an immense amount of resources to help Democrats flip and defend key House seats: ✅ Kristen McDonald Rivet in MI-08 ✅ Josh Riley in NY-19 ✅ Janelle Bynum in OR-05 ✅ Pat Ryan in NY-18 ✅ Angie Craig in MN-02 ✅ George Whitesides in CA-27 ✅ Marcy Kaptur in OH-09 We’re also thrilled to have supported Democrats in some of the most closely contested Senate races, all of whom secured major victories: ✅ Jacky Rosen in Nevada ✅ Ruben Gallego in Arizona ✅ Elissa Slotkin in Michigan ✅ Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland ✅ Lisa Blunt Rochester in Delaware These are monumental wins. Wins that will provide a crucial check on Trump and the GOP’s power and defend our democracy for years to come. Grassroots donors like you are what make our fight possible, and your hard work is paying off in big ways all over the country. I have so much hope that we can build on these gains and keep moving forward. | Thank you. name: Emerge HQ
subject: Our down-ballot victories!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
We’re proud to say our state and local trailblazing women are paving the path for progress for their communities!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96991226/511901679/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYjgxNWUzLTM0YTEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W1pZzEyFKFhb4eK5w8JNcZX5SYGtbSbTLf2AHpSlH7Q=)
---
| Peter,

We had over 550 Emerge alums on the ballot across the country last week, and most of those races were at the state and local levels. We are on track to have a win rate of around 70% overall – _**and we are already at 71% for our state legislative contests alone.**_

Congratulations to _**Cindy Nava (NM SD9)**_ , one of the first former DACA recipients to be elected to office; _**Sujata Gadkar-Wilcox (CT SD 22)**_ , first Indian-American in the Connecticut State Senate; _**Hanadi Nadeem (NV AD34)**_ , the first Muslim woman in the NV Legislature, _**Alyia Gaskins**_ , the first Black woman mayor of Alexandria, VA; **_Kyra Harris Bolden_** who was re-elected as the only Black woman justice on the Michigan Supreme Court; and _**Senator Keturah Herron**_ who was re-elected to the Kentucky State Senate and remains the first out LGBTQ+ person of color in the body.

We’re proud to say our state and local trailblazing women are paving the path for progress for their communities!
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96991229/511901689/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYjgxNWUzLTM0YTEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W1pZzEyFKFhb4eK5w8JNcZX5SYGtbSbTLf2AHpSlH7Q=)
Thanks to you and your support, there is no other organization in Democratic politics that is consistently successful in getting women into office – year after year. Now more than ever, our state and local elected offices will be centered on protecting our rights and carrying on that momentum. This is what Emerge does best – and our work is just getting started as we’re ramping up our efforts to recruit and train our new class of Democratic women.

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96991444/511902267/1575385346?refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzM1NzI5NC0zNWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zo8N8l38f79mXNo3wJU64sUEdto16486qj5b8nqtwn8=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96991445/511902268/1575385346?refcode=jtk5649-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzM1NzI5NC0zNWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zo8N8l38f79mXNo3wJU64sUEdto16486qj5b8nqtwn8=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Missouri joined with the rest of the nation by sending a message— a rejection of the past, and mandate to deliver a conservative agenda! And I will answer the call! While President Trump’s victory took some by surprise, those of us on the ground saw it coming a mile away. I spent the year crisscrossing Missouri, talking with voters from every walk of life, and what I heard was this, “Life’s too expensive, my community is too dangerous, the world is more unstable and something needs to change." Well, I can tell you this: change is coming, hope is coming, and a new wave of peace and prosperity is coming to Missouri and beyond! _**Watch the campaign unfold by clicking the link below!**_

name: Terry Schilling
subject: ALERT: Terry Schilling Joins Charlie Kirk
body:
It’s Time to Play Offense on Family Issues
| | |
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vPsJY1fp7L5xBvoHzJ1ZtQhkZlkMFOPUKF8YN98m7Igb86Vim_0zM5u74SWSvBvmB8AK87MMHGustSaKLHUs7kYIc0V-LDgpJT5u_5TmFymn0twt9cdxTscADgz8H3Xki5oO4m4jY4AJlHUNqgeE1rrMFGPU3ZFy66R7ReWzdd4Yq8nqYBbG7kLIYafUZQwb94hUlK32MCs3_o84e8YXse0QFBQlUxlg98j8HZq_Gp4=&c=yxofAMMdEhd2IjeG61MCjMx7Me9LL2j4CgKPvaMePhodv3oA3jrdig==&ch=F4oKfowhiYb_S3umIl4tbUWvAHh6KEZnMXWjXNRFMz0II19LkwSjGQ==)
---
| Friends,
I can't believe it's only been a week since the American people put their confidence in President Trump and re-elected him to serve at the White House!
We are of course ecstatic, but here at APP, the work has only just begun...
As part of every election cycle, pundits, pollsters and every political entity on the planet conduct rounds and rounds of analysis to determine what pushes candidates across the finish line. One thing that set President Trump apart was that he was the first presidential candidate since 2004 to put family issues at the forefront of an election cycle.
It is no coincidence that he crushed the far-left this time around - Americans concerned about their families are what sent him to the White House again!
Because of your support, we were able to fight for families across America. Big Family made a BIG difference - thanks to you!
---
| I just joined our friend, Charlie Kirk,[ to talk about how we helped President Trump and Conservatives win the Culture War this election:](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vPsJY1fp7L5xBvoHzJ1ZtQhkZlkMFOPUKF8YN98m7Igb86Vim_0zM6ZwJwVXIAohxsf3wOPBPMEs-9lVt2kKP0acz6p7anKEYwHvSKPcJv2rVkaulu_-6Ky5CXagWZV-80v14JLCExntW4yDN_Ucdp_Hp6g4-gycJsv602Cft4U9aRQBThRpmTEfzP1v5i6aXrdoBFYCGR2ULAOFb9pLS7WkNcBPicT4WJFq6nENdBW9EcHm4wEe2NVG8UXb8U6wBaYzAjy7qec=&c=yxofAMMdEhd2IjeG61MCjMx7Me9LL2j4CgKPvaMePhodv3oA3jrdig==&ch=F4oKfowhiYb_S3umIl4tbUWvAHh6KEZnMXWjXNRFMz0II19LkwSjGQ==)
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vPsJY1fp7L5xBvoHzJ1ZtQhkZlkMFOPUKF8YN98m7Igb86Vim_0zM6ZwJwVXIAohxsf3wOPBPMEs-9lVt2kKP0acz6p7anKEYwHvSKPcJv2rVkaulu_-6Ky5CXagWZV-80v14JLCExntW4yDN_Ucdp_Hp6g4-gycJsv602Cft4U9aRQBThRpmTEfzP1v5i6aXrdoBFYCGR2ULAOFb9pLS7WkNcBPicT4WJFq6nENdBW9EcHm4wEe2NVG8UXb8U6wBaYzAjy7qec=&c=yxofAMMdEhd2IjeG61MCjMx7Me9LL2j4CgKPvaMePhodv3oA3jrdig==&ch=F4oKfowhiYb_S3umIl4tbUWvAHh6KEZnMXWjXNRFMz0II19LkwSjGQ==)

clean_body: It’s Time to Play Offense on Family Issues | | | | == | Friends, I can't believe it's only been a week since the American people put their confidence in President Trump and re-elected him to serve at the White House! We are of course ecstatic, but here at APP, the work has only just begun... As part of every election cycle, pundits, pollsters and every political entity on the planet conduct rounds and rounds of analysis to determine what pushes candidates across the finish line. One thing that set President Trump apart was that he was the first presidential candidate since 2004 to put family issues at the forefront of an election cycle. It is no coincidence that he crushed the far-left this time around - Americans concerned about their families are what sent him to the White House again! Because of your support, we were able to fight for families across America. Big Family made a BIG difference - thanks to you! | I just joined our friend, Charlie Kirk,== | == | == - now is not the time to sit idly by, now is the time to play offense! That's why I've directed our team to be bulldogs for President Trump - ripping apart anyone who gets in the way of his agenda to serve the American people. And we need your help to do it! APP will be working with President Trump to influence Executive Orders that protect women's sports, kick the woke and destructive policies out of our military and take down transgender ideology. Our team will also help ensure the White House and government agencies are filled with staffers who support family values and will fight against the globalist agenda. == | | == | Your donation will help our team continue to fight for families with President Trump! On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. _**There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days.**_ Team Mary is prepared for any and _all_ scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes.** **We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96992923/511907800/1428481835?refcode=WTEFHW43_20241112_PeltolaSplit_PL_MO&sourceid=1055428&refcode2=gampem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjFjNjExMi0zYWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCYHd5W-7Ip-tVf5rUfqf-5ljOyAih9hBANICkZykpM=) Peter, we're getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through.

**The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, Peter.** Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they're coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best).

On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted.

_**There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won't know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days.**_

Team Mary is prepared for _any_ and _all_ scenarios, and we're ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work — however long it takes. _And that takes time, and money_.**

**We can't ensure every Alaskan's voice is heard without your support.** **[So please, will you split a donation between EMILYs List and my campaign to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people's hands?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96992924/511907801/1428481835?refcode=WTEFHW43_20241112_PeltolaSplit_PL_MO&sourceid=1055428&refcode2=gampem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjFjNjExMi0zYWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCYHd5W-7Ip-tVf5rUfqf-5ljOyAih9hBANICkZykpM=)** | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96992925/511907802/1428481835?amount=15&refcode=WTEFHW43_20241112_PeltolaSplit_PL_MO&sourceid=1055428&refcode2=gampem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjFjNjExMi0zYWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCYHd5W-7Ip-tVf5rUfqf-5ljOyAih9hBANICkZykpM=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96992926/511907803/1428481835?amount=35&refcode=WTEFHW43_20241112_PeltolaSplit_PL_MO&sourceid=1055428&refcode2=gampem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjFjNjExMi0zYWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCYHd5W-7Ip-tVf5rUfqf-5ljOyAih9hBANICkZykpM=)

clean_body: Our race results are STILL changing by the minute | = Peter, we're getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through. The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, Peter. Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they're coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won't know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days. Team Mary is prepared for any and all scenarios, and we're ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work — however long it takes. And that takes time, and money. We can't ensure every Alaskan's voice is heard without your support. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! \-- Mary Peltola = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d2151043b95d47c6bbf1b6ef4989733a&_e=GkVPufGpDAO51PBy986F5C8OoW1hhiw3C__c0QRwF2zZ-CRKWO7NOg9DkvEiJrO4vqfrOZ1G0kfr6_2kdrVoQf09MED0V6b4ARKEqKfiUAwT28tpfrPT5HRp8hzP6GF2Qhh0tE-EVn5elTGiheYbPPZSof5OVS4Wcfacf7Iuw4505bAvddxOC9VYRRlf56Qdy6Hx9Acj4iECo8aRdQQ3tZlTfVMOnInMWfoqM09V19EGBosIjUR0zbT762mCmyZ8IDZaunMVAKA6y9OVE03malGyIeB8XCEveOrqEDIgCzar4u_I69iWGmAYmfJwyLUBfFtsO93To8yy02JHQeiqyX3gL6cu0R25qjA6emC-OQnZbzRyIlLzeXZFgs1bCMGavui1XIu9jeIQ08kBH-JcqQ%3D%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

subject: Update: CA-41 is too early to call >>>
body:

I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.

name: Katie Porter
subject: A reality millions of parents are facing right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39292%2E3422442%2EPgnoCM)
Derek,
I care deeply about the world my kids grow up in. That’s one of the main reasons I ran for office in the first place, as a political newcomer in 2017.
Being a parent means helping my kids understand what’s happening in our country, including what Trump’s win means for their future and the future of the people they care about.
On Election Night, I went to pick up my daughter Betsy from water polo practice. She got in the car, and she was crying. At first, I thought maybe the coach yelled at her (not uncommon) or that someone hit her (water polo does get physical). I asked her, “Honey, what’s wrong?”
Tears continued to fall down her face, and she sniffled. “Mom, Trump’s going to win,” she said to me. “What if I get raped and I need to have an abortion?”
Betsy is twelve. That’s something no twelve-year-old should have to worry about.
I leaned over and gave her a big hug, and I reassured her, “Don’t worry. Mom is a fighter, and I am not going to let anything bad happen to you.”
It was heartbreaking for me to have that conversation with my daughter. It also reminded me how scary this time is for people and why we can’t give up. Democrats need to be ready, and we need to have strategies on both the state and federal levels to protect people’s fundamental freedoms.
I know that many of us are tired after fighting so hard for the past few months and years for the future of this country. It’s hard to think about soldiering on.
But, I am not giving up—for Betsy and for the millions of girls growing up with fewer rights than their mothers. I hope you’ll join me.
More soon,
Katie

**[Will you donate today to help us build a movement that stands up for freedom and withstands everything Trump and his allies try to throw at us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241112-1?refcode=em20241112-39292&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39292_3422442_PgnoCM&akid=39292%2E3422442%2EPgnoCM)**

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241112-39292&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39292_3422442_PgnoCM&akid=39292%2E3422442%2EPgnoCM)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39292%2E3422442%2EPgnoCM).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Looking Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
With Election Day officially a week ago, I want to reflect on what the results mean for our nation.

Hi Peter, With Election Day officially a week ago, I want to reflect on what the results mean for our nation. We cannot underscore the victories we secured here in North Carolina. I am re-entering the House with 3 Democrats by my side — Don Davis of NC-01, Deborah Ross of NC-02, and Alma Adams of NC-12. We are also ushering in Democratic Governor Josh Stein, Lieutenant Governor Rachel Hunt, Attorney General Jeff Jackson, Secretary of State Elaine Marshall, and Superintendent of Public Instruction Mo Green. Despite our efforts, we did not bear witness to the first Black woman President of the United States. With short notice, Kamala Harris handled this whirlwind of a race with the utmost grace and composure — giving it her all. We are grateful for her efforts to fight for our freedoms and build a better future for all. Now, we must continue this fight, Peter. I have never backed down, and never will. I remain committed to defending our democracy, fighting for our freedoms, and uplifting the common good. * * *

Democrats are trying to process the results from November 5 in different ways. Adam Schiff had his own reaction to Donald Trump’s victory. And Adam Schiff refused to say two words following the 2024 election. name: JanePAC
subject: Let’s talk about what’s next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Our local climate champions need you in this fight.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96993447/511909947/1328794144?refcode=ea.2dfa9744-3da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.2dfa9744-3da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkZmE5NzQ0LTNkYTEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QbA9FLmfSSCYrrSf5XFXzYEr8KK4_9iXDygw9VgkMuo=&emci=b1c9d73b-2ea1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=2dfa9744-3da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
The election results left us all feeling shaken. Losing the presidency and the Senate to climate deniers and corporate lackeys is no small blow. **But Jane’s not giving up the fight and neither should you.** We need you in this fight now more than ever. At JanePAC, we’ve always believed in the power and influence of local officials in the climate fight. This election reinforced that belief. **Even as we saw some losses at the federal level, we achieved dozens of key victories at the local level, from Tennessee to Texas, from California to Colorado.** State and local officials are the strongest firewall against the incoming administration’s plans to undo the progress we’ve fought so hard for. Our endorsed climate champions are not solely fighters for our planet, they’re also champions for reproductive rights, public education, and working families. They’re exactly the kind of leaders we need at all levels of government. The JanePAC candidates who won their elections are now in critical positions to make a real difference. Local offices like city councils, boards of supervisors, water districts, and university regents have immense localized power. Our champions can now: ✅ **_Influence zoning regulations, building codes, and infrastructure projects, ensuring development aligns with sustainable practices and climate resilience._** ✅ **_Make decisions on local energy sources, water management, waste disposal, and transportation systems — all crucial aspects in the fight for a sustainable future._** ✅ **_Improve college affordability and implement climate priorities such as putting the university system on a path to sustainability._** The corporate lackeys and climate deniers want us to roll over and take what’s coming. They want the fear and exhaustion to break our will and end our fight. **But Jane and the team are doubling down on our strategy and our mission.** While not all of our races have been called, we have already won dozens of key down-ballot races in Tennessee, Texas, California, Florida, Pennsylvania, Arizona, Minnesota, New Mexico, Nebraska, Wisconsin, and Illinois. To name only a few of our critical down-ballot wins:
* **In Minnesota,** Ann Johnson Stewart won a senate seat in a special election and defended the State Senate’s majority.
* **In Oregon,** Anthony Broadman flipped a longtime Republican district and gave the Oregon State Senate a Democratic supermajority.
* **In Colorado,** Elliott Hood won a seat on the University of Colorado’s Board of Regents, where he will work to move campuses and facilities to net-zero emissions.
* **In California,** Sade Elhawary is on her way to the State Assembly, and social justice organizer and civil rights attorney Ysabel Jurado joins the Los Angeles City Council.

And we’re not done yet — votes are still being counted, and more wins could be on the way. Together, we can make sure that even if national leaders turn their backs on climate action, local leaders across the country will keep fighting. Onward, Team JanePAC | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96993448/511909948/2105508926?refcode=ea.2dfa9744-3da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.2dfa9744-3da1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkZmE5NzQ0LTNkYTEtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QbA9FLmfSSCYrrSf5XFXzYEr8KK4_9iXDygw9VgkMuo=)

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Three for One!
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Hi Friend,
On January 6, 2025 , I’m hosting a Happy Hour Reception from 5-7pm at Federal House in Annapolis- and it’s a three-for-one deal! Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells will join me for a pre-session reunion and a chance to discuss our legislative goals for the coming months.
This year has brought some surprises, but Melissa, Vaughn, and I are ready for anything that comes our way in 2025. Together, we’ll continue to fight for the rights of all Marylanders.
If you’d like to join us, click here [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] or visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] . If you prefer to contribute by check or money order, mail your donation to Friends of Jazz Lewis, c/o Rice Consulting, 17 W Courtland St, Ste 210, Bel Air MD 21014.
Hope to see you there,
Jazz
bit.ly/JazzJan6 [bit.ly/JazzJan6]
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, On January 6, 2025 , I’m hosting a Happy Hour Reception from 5-7pm at Federal House in Annapolis- and it’s a three-for-one deal! Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells will join me for a pre-session reunion and a chance to discuss our legislative goals for the coming months. This year has brought some surprises, but Melissa, Vaughn, and I are ready for anything that comes our way in 2025. Together, we’ll continue to fight for the rights of all Marylanders. If you’d like to join us, click here [] or visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [] . We need to secure every possible vote

name: PA Dems
subject: PA: Act TODAY to make sure your vote counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter, we have an urgent request regarding this year’s election.

If you voted by mail or you voted a provisional ballot, there may be steps you need to take to make sure your vote is counted – and today is the deadline to take action.

**Step 1: Check your ballot status.**

If you voted _by mail_ , visit **[vote.pa.gov/MailBallotStatus](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96993879/511911526/-39623499?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241112_ENG_CaseyCure_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU1YWVkNC0zZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ytfQ1yvWmMpfFKuD7beAVlFW0Xxuco8NWq65wwpw2HU=&emci=62c6baea-0ea1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f4e5aed4-3fa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=25616296)** to check if your ballot was received. If the status column reads “Record - Ballot Returned,” then your ballot has been counted.

If you voted _in person or voted on a provisional ballot_ , you must call your County Board of Elections to check the status of your ballot. Go to **[padems.org/cure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96993880/511911527/1827236310?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241112_ENG_CaseyCure_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU1YWVkNC0zZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ytfQ1yvWmMpfFKuD7beAVlFW0Xxuco8NWq65wwpw2HU=&emci=62c6baea-0ea1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f4e5aed4-3fa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=25616296)** to find the contact information for your county.

**Step 2: If needed, make your ballot count.**

If there is an issue with your ballot, it’s easy to fix, but you need to act quickly.

**The deadline to fix any issues with your ballot is today,_Tuesday, November 12th_ in most counties. Please take action to make sure your vote is counted as soon as possible.**

You can find information on how to make your ballot count at **[padems.org/cure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96993881/511911528/1827236310?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241112_ENG_CaseyCure_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGU1YWVkNC0zZmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ytfQ1yvWmMpfFKuD7beAVlFW0Xxuco8NWq65wwpw2HU=&emci=62c6baea-0ea1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=f4e5aed4-3fa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=25616296)** , or reach out to our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-833-728-6837 with any questions.

**Step 3: Check in with your friends and family to make sure their ballots are counted.**

Make sure that the folks in your community who took the time to vote are set, too – you can forward them this email, or direct them to the Voter Protection Hotline.

The Senate race is extremely close, and the stakes in this election could not be higher. With votes still being counted, your vote could make the difference. It’s never been more important to make sure that your vote counts!

Thank you,

PA Dems

name: Team Engel
subject: Control of the House depends on our race — and it’s still being counted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Peter, our race in Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still too close to call.
Kirsten is neck-and-neck with her extremist Republican opponent — but there are still thousands of lawful ballots that need to be counted.
Together, our grassroots campaign overcame millions of dollars from super PACs supporting our opponent. Arizona voters heard Kirsten’s message of reproductive rights, water security, and lower costs, and they showed up to the polls.
**Now, we’re working hard to make sure every lawful vote is counted correctly.**
**We'll need your help in this fight too. We need to make sure every single lawful vote is counted — and prepare for a potential recount before a winner is declared.**
**[Will you split a donation between our campaign’s Recount Fund and Lucas Kunce now? The stakes are higher than ever, and every bit makes a difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84147?refcode=em20241112-8666&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8666%2E614464%2EVJZwkp)**

name: Derek Tran
subject: Too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|

Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. There is a LOT of counting left to do, Peter. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked choice voting process plays out in the coming days. Team Mary is prepared for any and all scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes. We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Fair Shot PAC and Mary Peltola will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! \-- Mary Peltola Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

subject: Update from CA-47: Victory hinges on us counting every vote.

body:
| Hi there, Dave Min here, Democratic nominee in California’s 47th Congressional District. I wanted to give you an update on my race here in CA-47: **It’s currently still too close to call.** From the moment I launched this campaign, we knew it was going to be a tight race. And right now, my team and I are still working to ensure every vote is counted. **Bottom line: This race isn’t over.** There are tens of thousands of outstanding ballots yet to be counted in this race, and ensuring that every eligible vote is counted will be a long but important process. [**That’s why I am reaching out today: We need the resources to ensure that every vote in this race is counted: Will you split a donation between DASS PAC and my legal fund so we can protect the vote in California’s 47th district?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96994282/511913174/304515657?refcode=em-11.12.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc1ZjY3NS00MWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ej52rR0Pe0cwgIGo342pHMAvvf0t2NM3pAKfpEceX-o=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96994283/511913175/304515657?refcode=em-11.12.24-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTc1ZjY3NS00MWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ej52rR0Pe0cwgIGo342pHMAvvf0t2NM3pAKfpEceX-o=)**

Hello,

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you agreed that we need to protect Social Security from Republican cuts.

But our records indicate that you didn’t complete questions 3 and 6. These questions are vital to shaping our strategy to save Social Security.

So we’re re-opening our poll and giving you a second chance to complete them. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241112_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22535%2E4449941%2Ed9XE2C)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20241112_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22535%2E4449941%2Ed9XE2C)

Fight for Reform

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Thanks to your loyal support, Senate Republicans took back the Senate majority, and President Trump won the White House. | Thank you, Fellow American.

Thanks to your constant support and generous contributions of time and effort, Republicans took back the Senate majority and elected Donald Trump to another term as President.

We are excited about this incredible opportunity to pass legislation to **Make America Great Again** and restore us to the prosperity we enjoyed thanks to President Trump.

We are humbled by the hard work and generous donations of our volunteers, donors, and every supporter who stepped up to this critical effort.

**Senate Republicans couldn't have done this without you, Fellow American.

[But there's still work to do. With votes to still be counted in Pennsylvania and Arizona, we have a chance to increase our Senate majority!](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=2476287bed33434286502647938d2810&_e=PhpBtU3UKTJeGt1oWA_LkDuMFW0VqJCBJeU6FlgmgVQ1xGTg22jiML-uPSlS1LJAkvfbWEf9YRqCtneJU-UeK2ui6p2ELNzIHyTyOWb9i2X7BxfSAP16H-bYKF1vxLdN2h85G3FbclaHuatWZk-hKSL6UR3sXsWbOzv-Rm5wcdeaqbs6qanxhWY7KQL1ppg60QUAJXiLxXcl8exjMWscSaHnjVQ42kDR0K17RkR1dfEFfPQKlN39Ug1I0SnPAXcqooOdMZQNCZeUkKrRHpKvupc7wjrBPJLTqz95G5W1OBwfDdDBI44Hbpy9mo3xZxi2atcdDiu5bp4rsJlI0x7CmoZrHKTzWGJgEtLGiPNt2Y3KrSo-X2Cxm2LmrBF4NGBbJTeaqvxo0R45nQRyyLmnOeKM00R2jSw2qe3azWp5rvOU-5yjYEgp4I-mx_FqgzIVndCXWH9RNvDPegb5NFFmww%3D%3D)

| Peter,

**Last Tuesday’s election showed us an alarming trend that could impact our race in 2025. Donald Trump gained ground across the country, including in key counties across Virginia.**

This election was a crucial test for Democrats as we approach 2025. National Republicans are feeling the momentum after Tuesday’s win, and they think that 2025 will be a key opportunity to keep this Governor’s seat red. We can’t afford to let Donald Trump and his allies gain any more ground next year.

We must demonstrate that Virginia is not turning its back on progress or on our neighbors. We must have the resources to continue our campaign for stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families. And we must show that we can build a future that brings people together and listens to the challenges facing all Virginians.

Next year, National Republican groups and GOP leadership will work relentlessly to defeat us. We need to build a strong foundation now.
