We missed our $100,000 Veterans Day goal yesterday, but it's not too late to help us make up this gap. Our partners at the NFL are generously offering a match to help the USO continue to provide critical support to service members -- but only for a limited time. So please:
**[Can our military heroes count on you to step up with a matched donation of $29 or more before our extended goal deadline at midnight tonight?](https://links.e.uso.)**
I come from a family with a deep tradition of military service, and I currently have loved ones serving our country. For me, supporting our service members is not just an act of gratitude, but a continuation of a legacy -- and it's the right thing for patriotic Americans like us to do.
Yesterday, today and every day, it's up to military supporters like us to ensure that service members don't feel forgotten. So please, **[make a gift of $29 or more that will be matched and go TWICE AS FAR to support our heroes!](https://links.e.uso.)**
[RUSH $29 (BECOMES $58)](https://links.e.uso.)
---

Jamie Finfrock, USO

body:
| | | **IT’S OFFICIAL!** New reports are coming in that we didn’t just keep the house. We expanded our majority. And I couldn’t be prouder that I helped make that happen. My name is Ryan Mackenzie. I’m a state representative, smart conservative, proud father, and Trump-endorsed candidate. I just won a hard-fought race to get rid of Pennsylvania's most liberal Congresswoman. I flipped this seat from blue to red and it’s all thanks to the help of patriots like you. But my fight isn’t over. The Left isn’t going to take this defeat lightly. They’re going to fight us tooth and nail to stop the **MAGA** agenda. Just like in 2016, they’re ready to do **EVERYTHING** they can to get in Trump's way. They’ll work with **FAKE** Conservatives to put Congress in **DEADLOCK.** And if Republicans let them win, our mission to save America will be **DEAD IN THE WATER!** So we need to be ready. I’m on my way to D.C. to put America First again and **PROTECT OUR MAJORITY!** But I need to have patriots like you behind me to get the job done. It’s going to be a long 4 years, but if we stand together we will make this country great again. Add your name now and join my fight to **SAVE AMERICA!**

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: We’ve got to get back to it
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96995109/511916434/-1824625245?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFiNDRlYS00NWExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=585QuZgy-D4U0gSnKUl-Syk4NpxuJq9KU40aY2sM31o=)
Peter, There are a lot of things I want to say, and a lot of things that will be left unsaid, but I want to say thank you. Things didn't go as we’d hoped on Election Day, but I am very, very grateful for the tremendous support that we’ve seen from this coalition that we’ve built – teachers, farmers, small business owners, hospitality workers, and more. I’m incredibly proud of the campaign that we ran and the kind of message that we delivered to working-class voices around this district and around this country. I want to thank all of our volunteers, thank my incredible team, thank anybody who made a contribution to the campaign, shared a story about the campaign, voted for me. Thank you. It means a lot. Like a lot of Americans that woke up today, I’m standing by the belief that no matter who our president is, or who our member of Congress is, we’ve got to get back to it. **This work is not over. In fact it’s just begun.** Thank you for all of your support and look forward to working together more. Rebecca
---
|
---

Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. clean_body: | = Peter, There are a lot of things I want to say, and a lot of things that will be left unsaid, but I want to say thank you. Things didn't go as we’d hoped on Election Day, but I am very, very grateful for the tremendous support that we’ve seen from this coalition that we’ve built – teachers, farmers, small business owners, hospitality workers, and more. I’m incredibly proud of the campaign that we ran and the kind of message that we delivered to working-class voices around this district and around this country. I want to thank all of our volunteers, thank my incredible team, thank anybody who made a contribution to the campaign, shared a story about the campaign, voted for me. Thank you. It means a lot. Like a lot of Americans that woke up today, I’m standing by the belief that no matter who our president is, or who our member of Congress is, we’ve got to get back to it. This work is not over. In fact it’s just begun. Thank you for all of your support and look forward to working together more. Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. Consider supporting her campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI 54702 United States

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

name: History Facts
subject: Did George Washington have a British accent?
body:
By 1770, the total population of Great Britain’s 13 colonies in America was approximately 1.5 million.
---

# [Did George Washington Have a British Accent?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smv080&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smv080&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smv080&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| B y 1770, the total population of Great Britain’s 13 colonies in America was approximately 1.5 million. It raises the question: Since much of the population of the fledgling U.S. descended from Brits, would the American speech pattern at the time have sounded British? Could someone like George Washington, one of the most famous early Americans, have had a British accent?

name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvania is now the front line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.

His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬, and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.

Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, and they need the resources to keep it up.

Pennsylvania is now the front line for standing up to Senate Republicans, and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=78e6c87279944cb88fd6c6d3e7d07498&_t=qLQ_7vqqtS2vmghJL523y3haRzWLxCN2dzdrjNctKLgwL-sO6j3hD9HZgnWD1HQWtxR0KlL4s46q2ktrFM5avr8wZsjs8OP48tm7HCHfcYHamRilc90qeEGnseB6jlkI)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=78e6c87279944cb88fd6c6d3e7d07498&_e=qjwOTI5ufCZsNfmDkYuVO2fKSwmq6p-zi-YfryU7LXan3G8tP1igfzZDQBrMrC18qfCL3gF4VsJC3YWJ4JBMqAjV6ZAtZVMevAVWfh-ONDRogvqDwYpF1ABvoiijSmOp5T6dgyOqggsMf6NIUqZTDKIrMsCzuFiakLW1l7ADTRGBHwCExfyYQ3P9uZXUD-0r2QJuzCDTCxPJ38xrOlG46_MBRNaw4SFqRLV3hhOVkc-rt6YHvFgnRwepLxrKLpycAMRiucCLrHHZHknCR8WFkrkq8F_9rmNqPA3FVYeORnNMEVRJQQoesUvb4zecv6QsKftgxWW7f5T0A_pZAnKy7dbIepnillocG0jl2tsAVT8vLRj9DYFeCjgbGcYa7fOsSceSD_Gh5W5P3Od2RG5G2RXC1OHCZdRh_pX589RvYkU%3D)
---
| Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. **And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=78e6c87279944cb88fd6c6d3e7d07498&_e=qjwOTI5ufCZsNfmDkYuVO2fKSwmq6p-zi-YfryU7LXan3G8tP1igfzZDQBrMrC18qfCL3gF4VsJC3YWJ4JBMqAjV6ZAtZVMevAVWfh-ONDRogvqDwYpF1ABvoiijSmOp5T6dgyOqggsMf6NIUqZTDKIrMsCzuFiakLW1l7ADTRGBHwCExfyYQ3P9uZXUD-0r2QJuzCDTCxPJ38xrOlG46_MBRNaw4SFqRLV3hhOVkc-rt6YHvFgnRwepLxrKLpycAMRiucCLrHHZHknCR8WFktTAoHGm5kSuN3sM8sCsgQAFQdAuKO0L1JpDcA8QjA8CsT1l8Dii3686TcCH2aCXYJRIlBnAENWBRdBovmIBSmCicOukH_alujtE6vjrKI4Vqk4owKp7SfEFZZ6vxbzt6xiAD-9_CXtgEUdL65Ws1x4%3D) **We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=78e6c87279944cb88fd6c6d3e7d07498&_e=qjwOTI5ufCZsNfmDkYuVO2fKSwmq6p-zi-YfryU7LXan3G8tP1igfzZDQBrMrC18qfCL3gF4VsJC3YWJ4JBMqAjV6ZAtZVMevAVWfh-ONDRogvqDwYpF1ABvoiijSmOp5T6dgyOqggsMf6NIUqZTDKIrMsCzuFiakLW1l7ADTRGBHwCExfyYQ3P9uZXUD-0r2QJuzCDTCxPJ38xrOlG46_MBRNaw4SFqRLV3hhOVkc-rt6YHvFgnRwepLxrKLpycAMRiucCLrHHZHknCR8WFkieVZSLL8Wfa_Hfw5xQVnHM2OPLqahdQ3T7c3JcKPLWGyDcbuAav32r7cBz2rCJgVp7yPaTTUMNcXYTKAu-X8K9YzssZm4ur1MEK1pWyEYSaPvQNDvnXugf_p7mujNMMcPgPcaRAhE_gRBCqw-I1TFA%3D)

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=78e6c87279944cb88fd6c6d3e7d07498&_e=qjwOTI5ufCZsNfmDkYuVO2fKSwmq6p-zi-YfryU7LXan3G8tP1igfzZDQBrMrC18qfCL3gF4VsJC3YWJ4JBMqAjV6ZAtZVMevAVWfh-ONDRogvqDwYpF1ABvoiijSmOp5T6dgyOqggsMf6NIUqZTDKIrMsCzuFiakLW1l7ADTRGBHwCExfyYQ3P9uZXUD-0r2QJuzCDTCxPJ38xrOlG46_MBRNaw4SFqRLV3hhOVkc-rt6YHvFgnRwepLxrKLpycAMRiucCLrHHZHknCR8WFkuYFL1USxLKoRtEtdi0u-3E4ANQ1mpxPiR4OIIQdMrSfWY3wJJFxrHB6A2ZcEpZAcP7258CpDQ_MvXcXLQGNNXJ4W0RHg4f7qLkCuWhXjmePRKhvDD-DCeyMuYbWkjGQirHsPE196iTmcvs1cjjYHIs%3D)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year.

Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie - "The Democratic Party needs to determine which side it is on in the great economic struggle of our times"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1011?refcode=email-20241112_v&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, after the
election, Bernie didn’t hold back — he said the Democratic Party must
choose between the elites and the working class. Nancy Pelosi didn’t like
that.

Pelosi claims the party already represents the interests of the working
class. If Democrats like Pelosi refuse to acknowledge and reflect on the
realities of this election, Trump’s GOP will keep winning elections cycle
after cycle.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20460?t=1060&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]Chip in now to help Bernie & Our Revolution build a party that will be
responsive to the working class and take on the billionaire class!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20460?t=1061&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ][IMG]

Bernie said, “The Democratic Party needs to determine which side it is on
in the great economic struggle of our times, and it needs to provide a
clear vision as to what it stands for. Either you stand with the powerful
oligarchy of our country, or you stand with the working class. You can’t
represent both.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20460?t=1062&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ][IMG]

We will be working with our movement and progressive champions like Bernie
to chart our path to transform the Democratic Party AND resist the
right-wing extremism of the next Trump term.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]Can you chip in to stand with Bernie and help fund our fights ahead? We
have a lot of work to do to get big money out of politics, address the
failures of the Democratic Party, and fight Trump.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

In The Guardian, Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese
built on Bernie’s important critique. Joseph said, “There was a
fundamental failure by the Harris campaign to acknowledge people’s
economic pain or adopt Bernie Sanders-style populism, which is where the
energy was within the Democratic party in 2016 and 2020.”

“We need a populist economic left willing to challenge corporate power,”
he said.

If the Democratic Party leaned into the economic priorities of the working
class and embraced Bernie’s agenda of raising wages and delivering on
healthcare and housing, the election could have turned out differently.
And if Democrats fail to adapt, the GOP could keep growing its support
amongst the working class.

It’s on us right now to strategize as a grassroots progressive movement
and find a path forward. We must fight Trumpism and the billionaire class.
We must build for a future where Democrats embrace the economic and social
issues that make a winning coalition AND a material difference in the
lives of the working class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241112nd&akid=7220%2E5885482%2EYF28cd ]Can you make a donation today to help us build a party who will embrace
Bernie's agenda?

Thank you,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

name: DNC HQ
subject: An explanation about where we go from here
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer message than we usually send, but we hope you’ll take a few minutes to read it. As we reflect on last week’s results, we want to say **thank you** and explain how your support made an impact during this election cycle: For the first time ever in a single election cycle, the DNC invested in all 57 state parties, increasing our yearly investment in state parties by 25 percent. That’s funding that went toward hiring organizing staff across the country -- in battleground states and beyond -- and building state party infrastructure that made important down-ballot wins possible. Here are just a few: In Montana and Arizona, voters passed measures to codify the right to an abortion in their states’ constitutions. Nebraska voters approved mandatory paid sick leave for workers, while Missouri voters passed a minimum wage increase and enshrined guaranteed paid sick leave into law. And while several congressional races have yet to be called and will determine the majority in the House, Democrats won critical Senate races in battlegrounds like Wisconsin, Nevada, Michigan, and Arizona. Your support helped make wins like these possible, and we are incredibly grateful for you. But now, our focus has to turn to what’s next. As a Trump presidency begins, we’ll need to make sure we don’t lose the organizing, tech and data infrastructure we’ve built all over the country. We’ll need to organize against destructive legislation and executive orders. We’ll need to put ourselves in the strongest possible position to win local and statewide races on the ballot next year and set ourselves up to take back Congress and the White House. **We’ll need a strong Democratic Party to do all of this work. And we need to start now. That’s why we are asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. You can use this link to pitch in:** [**https://democrats.org/go/**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241112_2329_fr&refcode2=2331_22930333_yyccS2&akid=2331%2E22930333%2EyyccS2) You may not have been considering chipping in to support the Democratic Party today, but we hope this explanation was helpful. Thank you for everything, The Democrats _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=em_20241112_2329_fr&refcode2=2331_22930333_yyccS2&akid=2331%2E22930333%2EyyccS2)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

That’s funding that went toward hiring organizing staff across the country -- in battleground states and beyond -- and building state party infrastructure that made important down-ballot wins possible. Here are just a few: In Montana and Arizona, voters passed measures to codify the right to an abortion in their states’ constitutions. Nebraska voters approved mandatory paid sick leave for workers, while Missouri voters passed a minimum wage increase and enshrined guaranteed paid sick leave into law. And while several congressional races have yet to be called and will determine the majority in the House, Democrats won critical Senate races in battlegrounds like Wisconsin, Nevada, Michigan, and Arizona. Your support helped make wins like these possible, and we are incredibly grateful for you. But now, our focus has to turn to what’s next. As a Trump presidency begins, we’ll need to make sure we don’t lose the organizing, tech and data infrastructure we’ve built all over the country. We’ll need to organize against destructive legislation and executive orders. We’ll need to put ourselves in the strongest possible position to win local and statewide races on the ballot next year and set ourselves up to take back Congress and the White House. We’ll need a strong Democratic Party to do all of this work. And we need to start now. That’s why we are asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. You can use this link to pitch in: You may not have been considering chipping in to support the Democratic Party today, but we hope this explanation was helpful. Thank you for everything, The Democrats If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Patriot,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!

subject: 2 MAJOR victories in Florida 🌴
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Freedom Fund
body:
Did you see these 2 key victories? We have you to thank. | | | [](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=5728e469b0d54d399e0a163895559d90&_e=VYmjkjJvrF5zbvLbDnEtcqd6EIICe6pNeVK-0UwYn_5Vtm5P_65TMbUl1k55DDKXzULEYQpHaw1qfOdlmfAT5sF-8dFeVr2-a4BoYOtNkzK3qEynHA4nRG8l5FBlvbjuds4Jb5Z8AvFoR_naavyrG6VCUGVEttrtRgDKUCholkgVEgbsIeE4XEnvsPrEIAACQsMUp_cCshgTRB8k8FMm_BtvDZ6tR1puhWlWl1QkA05_bbC9yfFkaNVHMxeYBDtJi_-KttJ6P5buje0djLvaFOLHYjN91WAJQW98r1dRkaCo_gZYPCYsa08PSVTk3JAF0cvRrM4sdVtSUm_yrMbIsIgcj6cfizxpV6VE8QWB10MwrZvXNDq5cXa8YwPopYLAa4hn76NIZff3nVow6zkvc0qfm8YjkIJubNpMJ2gD3xQ%3D)
---
Friend, This year, Florida Freedom Fund fought hard against two deceptive and dangerous ballot amendments:
* **Amendment 3** , which would have legalized recreational weed without restriction and given one company a constitutionally protected monopoly on the marijuana market.
* **Amendment 4** , the pro-abortion Trojan horse that would have mandated abortion until birth for virtually any reason.

And now that polls have closed in Florida:
* **Amendment 3 is****defeated****.**
* **Amendment 4 is****defeated****.**

**_Winning these campaigns is a big deal, because changing the constitution is a big deal._** Once an amendment passes, it’s effectively permanent—and any problems it may create cannot simply be "fixed" by legislation. With your help, we fought back and got the truth out about the fine print on these amendments and the real motivations behind those who funded these campaigns. **[**This is the power of engaged conservative activists like you, friend.**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=5728e469b0d54d399e0a163895559d90&_e=VYmjkjJvrF5zbvLbDnEtcqd6EIICe6pNeVK-0UwYn_5Vtm5P_65TMbUl1k55DDKXzULEYQpHaw1qfOdlmfAT5sF-8dFeVr2-a4BoYOtNkzK3qEynHA4nRG8l5FBlvbjuds4Jb5Z8AvFoR_naavyrG6VCUGVEttrtRgDKUCholkgVEgbsIeE4XEnvsPrEIAACQsMUp_cCshgTRB8k8FMm_BtvDZ6tR1puhWlWl1QkA05_bbC9yfFkaNVHMxeYBDtJx-ivV8o5AHfOsvCAPynJedueeW8NW5HqU8g8qF1iY-MZ32Au5cdrGPu51IAi8H5dP6WaUASAsauTmYsN4rW_OivnpDESb51Qr3OfgywDkOoSmhKbNHVeOVNGbBUvdhyFp7xY2Vv1N7co5a4wwOuLSALUv3VTi56T6MK5NOCMblk%3D)** These are just the first victories of the Florida Freedom Fund. With your support, we plan to keep on fighting — and winning — for conservative causes and candidates in our state. We don’t know what our next fight will be just yet. But we plan to be ready to take it on. Are you ready to keep winning, friend?
---
[**DONATE TO OUR NEXT VICTORY TODAY**](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=5728e469b0d54d399e0a163895559d90&_e=VYmjkjJvrF5zbvLbDnEtcqd6EIICe6pNeVK-0UwYn_5Vtm5P_65TMbUl1k55DDKXzULEYQpHaw1qfOdlmfAT5sF-8dFeVr2-a4BoYOtNkzK3qEynHA4nRG8l5FBlvbjuds4Jb5Z8AvFoR_naavyrG6VCUGVEttrtRgDKUCholkgVEgbsIeE4XEnvsPrEIAACQsMUp_cCshgTRB8k8FMm_BtvDZ6tR1puhWlWl1QkA05_bbC9yfFkaNVHMxeYBDtJAZkR6ig7MlW0mHTicJ5_axTAKOlK_RDysgjjU9MhBKHV4DEwDL88cmJvRCTSMp6aJ0SgOMhQIDSaDHY300U24RqGCY5wMrEkApqBA_uoO3oj73xt3EhpOWImTCN6tGhrFgJN6a6KuWZYiQhZav0RadgkMhAzdJ44TfMGOMqsUAs%3D)
---
Thank you,Florida Freedom Fund

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96995905/511919299/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZmNTQ4Ni00YmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtj2Vx_cudaCgQDvKLUfPN7ysBLA87u_0unfYBn4200=&emci=494d9c79-2fa1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a16f5486-4ba1-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=7878003)
Friend, we’re getting new info about my race by the minute, and I urgently need your support before the next surge of details come through. **The most important thing to know right now is this: This race is far from over, team.** Across Alaska, thousands of in-person votes remain to be counted, and they’re coming from areas with large Alaska Native populations (where I often perform best). On top of those in-person ballots, we estimate that there are still at least 41,000 absentee and early votes that are yet to be counted. **_There is a LOT of counting left to do, team. But the reality is, we likely won’t know who won until the ranked-choice voting process plays out in the coming days._** Team Mary is prepared for _any_ and _all_ scenarios, and we’re ready to fight to ensure that every single vote is counted. **The catch is, while other campaigns are done fundraising, we still need to power this work – however long it takes.** **We can’t ensure every Alaskan’s voice is heard without support.** **[So please, will you split $25 between Eric Swalwell and I to ensure that we have the resources to keep this seat in the people’s hands?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96995906/511919300/475712278?&refcode=E11550-20241112-StillCounting-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZmNTQ4Ni00YmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtj2Vx_cudaCgQDvKLUfPN7ysBLA87u_0unfYBn4200=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96995907/511919301/475712278?express_lane=true&&refcode=E11550-20241112-StillCounting-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZmNTQ4Ni00YmExLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtj2Vx_cudaCgQDvKLUfPN7ysBLA87u_0unfYBn4200=)

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

clean_body: ...it’s needed now more than ever It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Peter,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

Bob Casey

name: Jeff Larivee
subject: Did you see Zoe's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Team: Want to make sure you saw this note from Zoe. The fight for the House is not over -- and right now we are ahead or expected to pull ahead once all the ballots are counted in several races in California, Iowa, and Alaska. We have the chance to create a Blue firewall against a national abortion ban, cuts to Medicare and Social Security, and prevent a Project 2025 takeover. Can you help make sure we have the funds to support this effort?

Here is the link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24]

Jeff

Friends: I know you’re heartbroken, tired, and devastated given the recent election losses. I am, too. But we still have a chance to take back the House, even by the narrowest margin. Right now, the results are too close to call for us in ten battleground races here in California -- plus others in Alaska, Iowa, and Arizona. We have people in the field making sure every valid vote is counted, but we need to have resources to support our staff doing this work.

Here is the link if you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24]

This fight — so we have a check on Trump — will be expensive and will still take more time. But I promise it's worth it.

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: Free Thinker Daily Sponsor
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1OwzAQhJ_GvjXyru04PfjQEgUOVAipBZWbsZ3GwmlCfsnbo5bS6-jbnU9j6jaGctFEbQliFVxPEAnfEMRx4G_mcNh1y-plfl7NHP0lJvhwIye8s2dr3CYf5_We9_X6cf_RbM0Ed3pYWn9nb5WJr02Il1Tl1GmBBkpLvQbFQUiZZZJWWpRKcCZTyDKwkAGWquTMSASOyrE1DRoZCgBA5DJjmMjUCiuYd0akYAwjgl2LkrLzfqjC-ct3zoS4JLapadTVMLT9VawgWDTuMzmPNvqx_7uyTU2wuCkTLCaCxc_Tfnc0Jyu-CS-uk_H81Mz9MX9_pZ127RxiDH2qiGCn_y900vgbAAD__9J9bNQ)

We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **“health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.”** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, “**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
“It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
“Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.”
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

clean_body: We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called “health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline. “This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.” Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems. Dr. Gundry explains, “These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.” The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home. “It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. “Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.” The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: “If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints,” Dr. Gundry says... “Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible.”
